And we are suffering the repercussions of that. If we don’t raise enough, we risk not having enough support to fight as hard against these Socialists.

Here is the good news. If YOU can chip in JUST $10 we can make a comeback.
[**DONATE $10**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=2b22fa4de1834269bf8ea3f9cf6fdeef&_e=ChjGq_p6bwZKxRLBK9vleZElLuxAwWGiEVnJRKmgP0CVUqD0S-jfLqF9-LfQ3Aedp3PgyuDZFOdeDwoikYQ4wtn0vc6jdYywyBzCvvhRf6Eh-ktWWuB6VNSDDnCzNxpKya6P9M2VZrbB9SLvZodlMMoXA0u1PwDiP7syabGNk_nssPojsTMqfR2ins_j2MaZmN2Q1AxOj8op3k6hSurdzlo2JshNfmvdEwgFbOOty8SXoR8T66dGZPkcj5T-gPQI9Lvc3cpiZ8seJJEjy4szkMus61Uo3pMdn4555gbI15wUGTN0Omt3OnTCFgmJlZYFcqPK4lkezUlWuSgJUiNrto84p-8HNmmx22kAlEWaPYE6XnjGqrF1gfLWoG1XVosH0ledLehNN_1GjVfqSEuf_jbkluZ0Fy9Mp8xISRFgJuFxBwRIZ7ll5ZU4O-Ordt_XI2XWllqmEU2R54wJ6guPgGcIPAcjn9Vz6MfwMsWYAZlgdrvlQxd6Km-ddjpZBAVhCTPl-4F5YiHLMTXBiyXnPfy32xI7pkwc12QhBCLJRds%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

**I’m in an all-out dash to raise as much cash as possible ahead of next Thursday’s end of quarter fundraising deadline.**

I’m stressed for a number of reasons:
1. I’m actively trying to discourage other Republicans from hopping in the race; no one wants a contentious primary
2. I have to make my fundraising numbers public – meaning everything we brought in as a campaign between July 1st and September 30th. My Democrat opponent is going to use this to gauge how much of a threat I really am to her.

**So, we’re hitting on all cylinders and that means placing ads on Facebook in an attempt to introduce myself to a wider audience**.

I wrote a personal check for $6,000 to pay for them up front;** with a newborn I don’t have the cash to spare, but this seat is a MUST WIN if we’re going to flip the House Republican – so it’s worth it**.

**[Will you take 45 seconds to watch my ad here? If you support my message, would you chip in a few dollars, so I double the amount of time I’m able to keep it running online?](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=fa45c325a8eb4f369bddbc594bf89b89&_e=j_VgGc12_n-iAgXy6bSas_fvPzExysXXrNTGH7BUOuSkI-HlK-4nMkX-y_NF2KeZ_ozHXO1rqfDALcfR_p1eHVdASnl0_AxSVHYAYwGzWuaY8wB3JaBBUN8T7pufY6ucuUoRWxiH6GdqhMZ6vax6HnXv_OaqX2DocngswMaFlueE0SrY65W9fga4je91-7-K9tAAZ0gHF5I1SSpKSdRE9q5ZJXNQSp2LoPbvY-b1ew9BnIgg42nBxHkkYx5HClKnlAc9K_9pGrOpwRioBxAFjuqcXSQZvaRwpNEMqo-HmX-vjBTCVzOoHiczo3xN-fxCpb1vqeSKH-xHCXpegmjRpja8beW3SuHa5Dr3jfCqhMk1sRJ6OR9k9n2TaxQAL6Jdf9xXHpFLmsHlSNhz6n0y9AArQs0b9o6JnNOUyO1194LRy0UezE0aHEADGfCLDdsRzT2cs-V9NpOqOlwjzTBRdjMt7rJpFkop6i2h2GkN_Ug%3D)**

[](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=fa45c325a8eb4f369bddbc594bf89b89&_e=j_VgGc12_n-iAgXy6bSas_fvPzExysXXrNTGH7BUOuSkI-HlK-4nMkX-y_NF2KeZ_ozHXO1rqfDALcfR_p1eHVdASnl0_AxSVHYAYwGzWuaY8wB3JaBBUN8T7pufY6ucuUoRWxiH6GdqhMZ6vax6HnXv_OaqX2DocngswMaFlueE0SrY65W9fga4je91-7-K9tAAZ0gHF5I1SSpKSdRE9q5ZJXNQSp2LoPbvY-b1ew9BnIgg42nBxHkkYx5HClKns4e7N4BFeSITXkYjjo6v9tWWZjV6SqhBE_qGwF5PK50T982zb7oZxOBgdRzEf_5tDf4_2S8138sifU9E2PVAvpbZhp1BHuKrY8qeMmaGn7yAAdEHDAYZHoKVAOQrVSp15UhiiAYKMGdeZ9hduqpVwrPghAqFEzm2F0QzJC_7Fcgy9a63opdDMpkXupdPb2AwFDdiyY9KHIbNLMY8Px_dsxIGD7GGahPRjpSTkVKHc3Q%3D)
| [**PLEASE HELP ME KEEP MY AD RUNN ->** **› › **](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=fa45c325a8eb4f369bddbc594bf89b89&_e=j_VgGc12_n-iAgXy6bSas_fvPzExysXXrNTGH7BUOuSkI-HlK-4nMkX-y_NF2KeZ_ozHXO1rqfDALcfR_p1eHVdASnl0_AxSVHYAYwGzWuaY8wB3JaBBUN8T7pufY6ucuUoRWxiH6GdqhMZ6vax6HnXv_OaqX2DocngswMaFlueE0SrY65W9fga4je91-7-K9tAAZ0gHF5I1SSpKSdRE9q5ZJXNQSp2LoPbvY-b1ew9BnIgg42nBxHkkYx5HClKnwjqjtjvi-VXbTgqmBVAL20Ni2H73k6y2Tn05ZqGBTyZFbRnkfnWLF7HUg_X9K8wmz1b1UReeKiC47mEOLs_NpAsC_keowbyOHvkDIo0gb3ZtqRSJ12MwakpkycTiYmTqsyRdCVNEDtjLVjk8oy826Wn8kemXUHyWJzIvKEXTYOJtl7It7YWCOpn15oL7lR8KSfKRbU2pBc8PwKodb0OXY-DEUgVg7WAXqPlw-65jLLU%3D)

**[I need to raise another $6,000 by Wednesday evening and I’m asking you to help me reach that goal. Our country is too important to leave Democrats in charge for two more years.](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=fa45c325a8eb4f369bddbc594bf89b89&_e=j_VgGc12_n-iAgXy6bSas_fvPzExysXXrNTGH7BUOuSkI-HlK-4nMkX-y_NF2KeZ_ozHXO1rqfDALcfR_p1eHVdASnl0_AxSVHYAYwGzWuaY8wB3JaBBUN8T7pufY6ucuUoRWxiH6GdqhMZ6vax6HnXv_OaqX2DocngswMaFlueE0SrY65W9fga4je91-7-K9tAAZ0gHF5I1SSpKSdRE9q5ZJXNQSp2LoPbvY-b1ew9BnIgg42nBxHkkYx5HClKn5768uO0KjfzPc2DzfDNZyyPqiAhrPpRQ2BBMbJ3C3LS9BJmYgSdwgxADVuKAPYWt9hVEgGEF3dI7q7yP_HlsVX5QRybN4RFN3C9bi3zV8CxaTigKbM8hWedt0xYcR5_trP-89NmA7i-vgxgBLyIO742t6nB5Aog_w89VxodTiZcivMSJPWU21-GfMwV9EXtHsjU8urIrACoS6SLRp7fK5s7RqH-HMMK9yB110KYSNIE%3D)**

Thank you
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

**P.S.** I have no money to invest in this campaign. **What I do have is a lot of pride** , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can,**[chip in $5 or $10 today to help send me to Congress and hold career politicians accountable.](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=fa45c325a8eb4f369bddbc594bf89b89&_e=j_VgGc12_n-iAgXy6bSas_fvPzExysXXrNTGH7BUOuSkI-HlK-4nMkX-y_NF2KeZ_ozHXO1rqfDALcfR_p1eHVdASnl0_AxSVHYAYwGzWuaY8wB3JaBBUN8T7pufY6ucuUoRWxiH6GdqhMZ6vax6HnXv_OaqX2DocngswMaFlueE0SrY65W9fga4je91-7-K9tAAZ0gHF5I1SSpKSdRE9q5ZJXNQSp2LoPbvY-b1ew9BnIgg42nBxHkkYx5HClKnZ4esDpn7rO2Ej_W5uIRtFjG6hsgsTRVeL2L8r-iiibqDIPy2idvaaPtluf0HIo2exAtYyposjMU3mt-0cuXsoNAYot9GjlbLWAzwVRuoHMv9ZPu6dPM2-FXBngwHWpbYEYEdAJ3QEHZCCC7TiGVaDr306exK07_Pie8tlKAIll46ZVwYe4sDlvQTWuXmxV2o6APcQXbNnMhb3u_J0qmMCrGiYdeN42pqt_SlAoyB8L8%3D)**

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Georgia will decide control of the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84j2GaRNOq_sz9ri9y88Vs84pkcfg0CPtvP47cMVdG_JGN16Kgb4GNVTaJyCh6ktXpSv0F0bLW3ouE0WLA_jWOCpIfJM9R3ZMF_RJH0P0R5IPjT-yjv1xi-gUw0gZhBu3m36qU12A4bveZF1kh-ILVFQ9EVfU1BX16Ldqd0VLF29AL6clZknKfxx3A1L9CL_HLrEQhSaX6d5voy3RZzXlGVrBFwtwl4j_dz5GPexospTzfIJR_8PlPJ77YRNxS1ecgHLvElDIovx1xj7uoQarzSDTt1bY3myJrNVqoYd735InAglauundTW-C7VKL_l-OvE6ZJr5p_GMZ_0ZZB1vIocI/3fp/ex3iMZ7_Ro6MnDvTvo4I4w/h0/ummKls4mTveixPdusD9GPEdgWB0ny6JaqnX-v16198c)
Derek,

I'm one of the most vulnerable incumbent Senate Democrats up for reelection next year, and I need your help: while I've spent my time in office providing pandemic relief to struggling families, fighting for voting rights and delivering on our progressive priorities, extremist Republicans are doing everything they can to attack me and smear my record.

Here's why: experts at _POLITICO_ say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority _hinge_ on keeping Georgia blue. This race will decide Senate control – but while GOP megadonors and dark money groups have millions to spend to try and buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support. **And unfortunately, with time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're falling incredibly short of our goal.**

**So I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help today. This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That's just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you're with me, Friend. That's why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

I'm calling for your $3 to defend my House Democrats right now >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-)**

Republicans posted record-breaking fundraising**SIX** months in a row.

Kevin McCarthy has already raised **$43 MILLION** this year.

Trump's shady political groups have **$102 MILLION** in the bank.

And right now, we're not on track to meet my **MASSIVE** End of Quarter goal by my deadline in just 72 hours.

I need you to understand what's at stake.

**If we fail to hit my End of Quarter goal, it would be a massive blow to our chances of keeping the House. **

This is the most important deadline our House Democrats have ever faced.

**Can I count on you to stand on the right side of history with me and chip in $3 to defend my House Democrats? **

body:
The President is destroying the fabric of our country by... | | |
---
| |
---
| Friends,

Americans are sick of what they are seeing in Washington, D.C. as our country is being ripped apart by the far left.

In order to make our country better we must take control of the direction we are heading. Power-hungry politicians like Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and Joe Biden must be stopped. Their agenda is destroying the American dream at a record pace.

_I need your help._ I am working to make sure Republicans regain control of the House as soon as possible. This will allow us to fire Pelosi and bring common sense back to our Country. Please help me fight by supporting my political efforts. Please [(click here)](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=70ce3da09b&e=a9d1410029) to donate.

The challenges facing our nation are great, but our opportunities and potential are even greater. With hard work, our brightest days are yet to come.

Yours in the fight,

Tracey Mann

P.S. I will continue to stand for Kansas as we move forward and do everything in my power to ensure our kids have a bright future. _Please[(click here)](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=41ac237306&e=a9d1410029) to donate today and help take our country back. _

name: Eli Bremer
subject: What real courage looks like
body:
Will you join the fight for what is right?
| | | | [](https://eliforcolorado.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctiirly-ykykmujid-y/)
---
[Visit our website](https://eliforcolorado.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctiirly-ykykmujid-j/)
| | | Olympic gymnasts testified on Capitol Hill last week, giving their account of the appalling actions of convict doctor Dr. Larry Nassar and how a system that was supposed to protect them failed.
I just want to say that I am so proud of and humbled by these brave young women for their valor and courage to share their terrifying experiences and speak out against a corrupt system. These women are an example of how we can fight injustice.
[**_But it is also a reminder that we have to stand up for what’s right. _**](https://eliforcolorado.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctiirly-ykykmujid-t/)
After these accounts first came to light, I worked with a bipartisan group to reform the Olympic oversight system so that no young woman would have to experience trauma like this again. [**_Not because it was politically expedient, but because it was right. _**](https://eliforcolorado.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctiirly-ykykmujid-i/)
[**Join me in standing for what is right. Give**** _$10, $25 or $50 today!_**](https://eliforcolorado.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctiirly-ykykmujid-d/)
---
[Donate Now](https://eliforcolorado.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctiirly-ykykmujid-h/)
Thank you for fighting with me.
****

**Veteran, Olympian, Lifelong Republican, Fighter for Colorado,**
**Eli Bremer**

Donald J. Trump September 27th, 2021
Just eight months ago, the whole world knew that if you illegally violated America’s borders, no matter where you came from, you’d be immediately caught, promptly detained, and swiftly removed—perfect precision clockwork. Our border was the envy of nations. Now, our border is the laughingstock of the globe. Anyone, from anywhere, can just illegally walk across our border, turn themselves in, and then be on to the city of their choice. No testing, no masking, no mandates. Free healthcare, deliveries, and medical services in our emergency rooms, all paid for by taxpayers. Drugs pour through like water. Our border agents are disrespected, denigrated, and demoralized.

Now, news reports indicate another 20,000 Haitians are staged in Columbia preparing to make the trek to our Southern Border. But that’s just the beginning. Wave after wave are heading our way, INVITED here to break our laws by Biden, Mayorkas, and the Marxist Democrats. Indeed, at this very moment, House Democrats are preparing to pass a Reconciliation Bill that includes total amnesty for millions of illegal aliens, and removes all limits on green cards and chain migration. Democrats are playing for keeps—Republicans better fight hard, fight strong, and stay united for America, or we won’t have a Country left.

Donald J. Trump September 27th, 2021
The Republicans in the Senate have the cards, including political cards, to stop the onslaught of Democrat Legislation that will further lead to the destruction of the United States. body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58421273:63yXO22No:m:1:3103520637:182DB0427C214E060733D5A7ED3E1966:r "Headline") Peter, I have always been the Jihad Squad's number one target. They are terrified of a strong conservative woman, and they have tried to remove me from Congress several times. **They even told Majority Leader McCarthy to take "immediate action" to shut me up.** It didn't work then, and it won't work now. I am a problem for the Jihad Squad, and **[I need your help to make even more trouble for these America-hating, Terrorist loving women.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58421273:63yXO22No:m:1:3103520637:182DB0427C214E060733D5A7ED3E1966:r "I need your help to
make even more trouble for these America-hating, Terrorist loving women.")** I won't allow them to enact their ridiculous policies:
* [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58421273:63yXO22No:m:1:3103520637:182DB0427C214E060733D5A7ED3E1966:r "Crossing")**I won 't allow them** to teach our children that the color of their skin makes them born racist monsters.
* **I won 't allow them** to open our borders to anyone who can walk over a river.
* **I won 't allow them** to cut funding to Israel's Iron Dome - the system that defends Jewish children from random Hamas rockets falling on their schools.

That makes me a problem for the Jihad Squad, and **[they are coming after me with everything they have. So I need your IMMEDIATE help to fight back.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58421273:63yXO22No:m:1:3103520637:182DB0427C214E060733D5A7ED3E1966:r "they are coming after me with everything they have. So I need your IMMEDIATE help to fight back.")** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58421273:63yXO22No:m:1:3103520637:182DB0427C214E060733D5A7ED3E1966:r "The Squad") The latest - they are cutting funding for the Iron Dome - a move they KNOW will result in the deaths of Israeli women and children at the hand of their Hamas terrorist friends. **If they are willing to let these children die, do you think they will stand up for your children? These are Members of Congress who take pictures smiling with members of Hezbollah.** One of them once said: _" There's kind of a calming feeling I always tell folks when I think of the Holocaust." **A CALMING FEELING?!?**_ We cannot allow this to continue - we won't be shouted down, we won't let them destroy America, and we will never abandon Israel. **[We will stand, and we will FIGHT.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58421273:63yXO22No:m:1:3103520637:182DB0427C214E060733D5A7ED3E1966:r "We
will stand, and we will FIGHT.")** They don't scare me, **[and I hope they don't scare you.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58421273:63yXO22No:m:1:3103520637:182DB0427C214E060733D5A7ED3E1966:r "and I hope they don’t scare you.")** Thank you for your support. God Bless America. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58421273:63yXO22No:m:1:3103520637:182DB0427C214E060733D5A7ED3E1966:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Peter, Closing up shop...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Battleground races are neck and neck.
Hi Peter, it's Marco Rubio --
My apologies for emailing you again but I just finished reading a Bloomberg article showing Democrats officially breaking $100,000,000 raised this year alone. _Top Democrats spent months rubbing elbows with Big Tech executives, Hollywood 's richest Socialists, and liberal billionaires to shatter their fundraising record._
[**We have our work cut out for us.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58423941:JbOENE2NJ:m:1:3253819041:1ACA4A057E7A7E55707FA44255025814:r)
Democrats have the benefit of deep-pocketed Liberal Elites, but we have a movement of a MASSIVE grassroots network of proud American Patriots -- like you.
**Now we need to prove it. Republicans have a critical fundraising deadline in just a few hours from right now.[Top GOP leaders are worried we'll miss it so I'm reaching out ONE LAST TIME to personally request your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58423941:JbOENE2NJ:m:1:3253819041:1ACA4A057E7A7E55707FA44255025814:r)**
We need another 1,289 contributions by midnight tonight -- I'm hoping you can be one of them.
**[COUNT ME IN >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58423941:JbOENE2NJ:m:1:3253819041:1ACA4A057E7A7E55707FA44255025814:r)**
Besides me, just look at how many Conservatives tried to reach you up to this point:
_\-- Jim Jordan asked
\-- Kevin McCarthy asked
\-- Steve Scalise asked
\-- Tim Scott asked
\-- Marco Rubio asked
\-- Newt Gingrich asked
_
If we don't get urgent support before midnight, we'll have to close-up shop and accept defeat. **That isn 't something I'm willing to do. This is my final attempt to reach you before our deadline expires.**
[**You 've always put America first before. Don't back down now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58423941:JbOENE2NJ:m:1:3253819041:1ACA4A057E7A7E55707FA44255025814:r)
Thanks for all you do,
_\-- Marco Rubio_

clean_body: | = | | I’ll be blunt, folks. The Virginia Governor’s race is the most important in the country in 2021 and a recent poll shows a tied race. With so much on the line for Virginia and our country, I’m stunned that more Virginians aren’t stepping up and donating right now. = I mean, think about it: My opponent Glenn Youngkin said he is running to be Virginia’s governor because of Donald Trump. And media outlets like The Washington Post are reporting that Youngkin is undermining our democracy by “playing footsie with the ‘big lie.’” And, with Roe v. Wade hanging on by a thread, Glenn Youngkin could bring a Texas-style abortion ban to Virginia. Look, early voting has already begun, and right now, Donald Trump’s handpicked guy has a real shot to win. Don’t let it happen. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Terry | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. Educators and allies, Last week, we emailed you about our endorsement of Brandon Mosely in California’s 42nd District. What we didn’t talk about then was Brandon’s opponent, Rep. Ken Calvert. **Rep. Calvert is a proud, vocal Trump supporter who not only voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election results, but also signed an amicus brief to the U.S. Supreme Court asking them to.** [_**There should be no place in Congress for anyone who perpetuates dangerous lies and misinformation for the sake of political gain. Contribute now to support Brandon’s campaign and help us restore integrity and leadership to CA-42.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36596175/308569248/-898086359?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210928mosely3_EEE_180DO_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmYzliN2ZkLTViMjAtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o23acJr847g8mnt85tO4X8jo9TQrjZhtd8Md7lsaaI0=) While Calvert has been spreading lies and encouraging the overthrow of a fair and free election, Brandon Mosely has been doing what he’s always done: Giving back to his community. Ever since he was inspired by his fifth-grade teacher to become the first in his family to graduate college, Brandon has devoted his career to his community. As a pastor, a nonprofit director, and as a history teacher, Brandon is changing people’s lives for the better every day. Rep. Calvert, on the other hand? Not so much, and his vote to validate the Jan. 6 insurrection is proof. We’ve got to get him out of Congress and replace him with someone who will be a voice and advocate for our community. [_**That someone is Brandon Mosely, and we’re working to help him win in 2022. Chip in now to support Brandon’s race and elect responsible leadership for CA-42.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36596179/308569254/-898086359?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210928mosely3_EEE_180DO_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmYzliN2ZkLTViMjAtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o23acJr847g8mnt85tO4X8jo9TQrjZhtd8Md7lsaaI0=) [_****_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36596183/308569257/-898086359?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210928mosely3_EEE_180DO_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmYzliN2ZkLTViMjAtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o23acJr847g8mnt85tO4X8jo9TQrjZhtd8Md7lsaaI0=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Ken Calvert. Rep. Calvert is a proud, vocal Trump supporter who not only voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election results, but also signed an amicus brief to the U.S. Supreme Court asking them to. = While Calvert has been spreading lies and encouraging the overthrow of a fair and free election, Brandon Mosely has been doing what he’s always done: Giving back to his community. Ever since he was inspired by his fifth-grade teacher to become the first in his family to graduate college, Brandon has devoted his career to his community. As a pastor, a nonprofit director, and as a history teacher, Brandon is changing people’s lives for the better every day. Rep. Calvert, on the other hand? Not so much, and his vote to validate the Jan. 6 insurrection is proof. We’ve got to get him out of Congress and replace him with someone who will be a voice and advocate for our community. = = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your support, Elect Educators Everywhere | Elect Educators Everywhere is designed to help elect teachers, school counselors, college faculty, and all types of public educators to office from coast to coast. Friend, Welcome to the Laurie Bishop for Montana team! Laurie is running to represent Montana’s new congressional district to stand up for every Montanan in Congress and make progress on the issues facing our communities each and every day. **Our team is ready to hit the ground running, but a campaign of this size requires a lot of resources to get off the ground. Early investment from supporters like you is critical to our success.** **[Will you help us ensure Laurie crosses the finish line next year by investing in her race today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36601478/308589771/1931503143?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210706welcome1_tb_new_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTQ5YzIyMC02MjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NQ6-wVk6atS9A8O-TMO2jqjPOM5YyKuhtHRq9zs61Dw=)** As a long-time advocate and public servant, Laurie is ready to show up and fight for the resources and tools that our communities need to thrive. From establishing livable wages and equal pay, to improving our health care system and expanding access to mental health services, to championing efforts to increase affordable housing and childcare, Laurie has the empathy, passion, and experience to deliver for Montanans across the second district. **This is just the beginning of what’s sure to be a long, challenging campaign — especially since this new seat could make-or-break Democrats’ majority in the U.S. House.** **[Laurie is counting on folks like you to make this a grassroots-powered campaign. name: Dave Giles for Congress
subject: American Freedom
body:
Hello Peter! Our freedoms are being taken away by the left socialist. As Americans we believe in th
| | |
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/261510?id=4112847.4612.1.c279fbe2c1ba937f246d4420a759b35f)
---
**__Hello Peter!**
---
**Our freedoms are being taken away by the left socialist.**
As Americans we believe in the freedom to achieve and make a better life for ourselves, just like our forefathers. **I will go to Washington to stop the Madness.**
Stop the overreach of DC taking away states’ rights and your personal rights,
both guaranteed by the Constitution and Bill of Rights. **I am TECHNICALLY COMPETENT**
I have a bachelors’ degree in electrical engineering, multiple internet certifications, Rescue Diver and I am a Jet Pilot. **I am BUSINESS ORIENTED**
For the better use of taxpayer dollars. I have an MBA, worked for the largest oil company in the world and have a federal firearms license. **I am CHRISTIAN**
I have a bachelor’s degree in theology with two master’s degrees, my doctorate as ABD. I have written an advanced theology book
and I attend church weekly. I am well educated, experienced and capable of representing you in DC.
**"Which is Good for You!"**
I will make your life better by reducing legislation, government overreach and provide effective use of your tax money. I am asking for you to support me.
---
| | [ Donate to Ameica ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/261510?id=4112847.4613.1.3a573bb69f2d1a4dd65509e9b756d415)
---
And sign my petition to be on the Primary Ballot (cd9 voters).
---
| | [ Sign my Petition at AZSOS ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/261510?id=4112847.4614.1.9adb720b15188ad25ae9bd87fef006d2)
---
We need to redirect our taxpayer money to help the American people such as our veterans, our homeless, our infrastructure. I will support voter integrity, term limits, secure borders, balance our budget and reduce the debt for our children.
# Congress Continues to Fail Us.
# I plan to correct this issue.
They Spend more money that what we have.
I’m demanding accountability from Congress.
I will fight to **protect our Constitutional Rights**
and **make Congress accountable**!
---
I will COMMIT and DEVOTE 100% of my time!
---
We can **Win District Nine** and **"Stop the Madness"**.
---
Sincerely,
---
|
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/261510?id=4112847.4615.1.875052cd011fde4a9da3f057da9d9cdc)
---
**Dave Giles**
Candidate
United States Congress

clean_body: Hello Peter! Our freedoms are being taken away by the left socialist. As Americans we believe in th | | | | Hello Peter! Our freedoms are being taken away by the left socialist. As Americans we believe in the freedom to achieve and make a better life for ourselves, just like our forefathers. I will go to Washington to stop the Madness. Stop the overreach of DC taking away states’ rights and your personal rights, both guaranteed by the Constitution and Bill of Rights. I am TECHNICALLY COMPETENT I have a bachelors’ degree in electrical engineering, multiple internet certifications, Rescue Diver and I am a Jet Pilot. I am BUSINESS ORIENTED For the better use of taxpayer dollars. I have an MBA, worked for the largest oil company in the world and have a federal firearms license. I am CHRISTIAN I have a bachelor’s degree in theology with two master’s degrees, my doctorate as ABD. I have written an advanced theology book and I attend church weekly. I am well educated, experienced and capable of representing you in DC. "Which is Good for You!" I will make your life better by reducing legislation, government overreach and provide effective use of your tax money. I am asking for you to support me. | | And sign my petition to be on the Primary Ballot (cd9 voters). | | We need to redirect our taxpayer money to help the American people such as our veterans, our homeless, our infrastructure. I will support voter integrity, term limits, secure borders, balance our budget and reduce the debt for our children. Congress Continues to Fail Us. I plan to correct this issue. They Spend more money that what we have. I’m demanding accountability from Congress. I will fight to protect our Constitutional Rights and make Congress accountable! I will COMMIT and DEVOTE 100% of my time! We can Win District Nine and "Stop the Madness". Sincerely, | | Dave Giles Candidate United States Congress Arizona's 9th District "Facebook" "Instagram" "LinkedIn" "Twitter" ©2021 Dave Giles for Congress | PO BOX 5394 | Mesa, Arizona 85211 | (480) 664-4971 | "Web Version" "Forward" "Unsubscribe" |

name: Farah Melendez (Team Nikki)
subject: Are you all in to defeat Ron DeSantis, team?
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

I’ll cut right to the chase: Ron DeSantis is running for President instead of leading Floridians in times of crisis.

He’s now left the state on political trips more than a dozen times in recent months—including a visit to New York for a fundraiser this past weekend.

Meanwhile, he’s playing politics with the lives and health of Floridians. DeSantis just appointed a surgeon general who stoked vaccine hesitancy and embraced conspiracy theories.

And he’s even following Texas’ lead on anti-choice legislation. Just last week, Florida Republicans introduced abortion ban legislation almost IDENTICAL to the Texas law.

Team, our September fundraising deadline is less than 72 hours away. If we want to fight back against DeSantis and radical anti-choice Republicans, we can’t afford to fall short.
Please click here to chip in now if you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-september-eom?refcode=tue]

DeSantis is America’s most dangerous Governor, and that’s why Trump Republican donors from across the country are rushing to fund his re-election campaign.

If supporters like you can step up now and help us build a winning campaign, I know our grassroots movement will overpower DeSantis' army of GOP megadonors.

If you’re in a position to chip in and help us finish September strong, you’ll make a big difference in the fight to defeat DeSantis. Please click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-september-eom?refcode=tue]

Thanks!
Farah Melendez
Campaign Manager

clean_body: Dear Friends, I’ll cut right to the chase: Ron DeSantis is running for President instead of leading Floridians in times of crisis. He’s now left the state on political trips more than a dozen times in recent months—including a visit to New York for a fundraiser this past weekend. Meanwhile, he’s playing politics with the lives and health of Floridians. DeSantis just appointed a surgeon general who stoked vaccine hesitancy and embraced conspiracy theories. And he’s even following Texas’ lead on anti-choice legislation. Just last week, Florida Republicans introduced abortion ban legislation almost IDENTICAL to the Texas law. Team, our September fundraising deadline is less than 72 hours away. If we want to fight back against DeSantis and radical anti-choice Republicans, we can’t afford to fall short. Please click here to chip in now if you can. [] DeSantis is America’s most dangerous Governor, and that’s why Trump Republican donors from across the country are rushing to fund his re-election campaign. If supporters like you can step up now and help us build a winning campaign, I know our grassroots movement will overpower DeSantis' army of GOP megadonors. If you’re in a position to chip in and help us finish September strong, you’ll make a big difference in the fight to defeat DeSantis. Please click here to chip in now. [] Thanks! body:
#

**$20,000** sounds like a lot of money.
**$5** doesn’t.
But when you contribute **$5,** and someone else chips in $15, and another person is able to give $25, it goes a long way towards helping us to hit our **$20,000** FEC end-of-quarter goal.
That is why we are asking you to step up today and make a contribution of $5, or whatever you can afford, to help us meet our $20,000 goal.
If you are able, you can make a contribution using the link below:
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/MondaireEOQDeadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36609974/308621643/-271015136?refcode2=34e0ce29-6f20-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&refcode=em210928-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGUwY2UyOS02ZjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AKAeuMAwKYUIo4-H0JjIYx1l65lL9C47GUnbO7gV7cM=)**
If we don’t hit this goal, we might have to cut back on our voter outreach efforts as we enter our election year.
That could spell bad news — because there’s a huge likelihood that after redistricting, our district will get much more competitive.
**[So it’s very important that supporters like you pitch in whatever you can, whenever you can, to help us crush our goals, win the primary, and re-elect Mondaire.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36609977/308621646/-271015136?refcode2=34e0ce29-6f20-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&refcode=em210928-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGUwY2UyOS02ZjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AKAeuMAwKYUIo4-H0JjIYx1l65lL9C47GUnbO7gV7cM=)**

Team Mondaire

name: John Stossel
subject: How you and I can overthrow the fake news media
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Center for Independent Thought
body:
Your donation will help me produce more videos, reach more viewers, and expose the truth about the corrupt media, government, an
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zbb6r1qd59s2m2hdvtg22n07cv415s3m6d08to58_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkorr7djl69pn8cbkmdqj6drh6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfacbl6uqjcs5lchj3aodm6pp3aopmclhj8p3h63jj4dj4eqoeaptjcpjr7dj3c3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eap6cdj76mr30tr3coon1cj26pp238h1e8he4933cph61ob6cjj6eoh5u)

[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zm53pha17lp6j99dlo1rilqd9bq7j05taj6vudlg_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c3gmcp76cth2bs)

Friend,

I have watched the mainstream media transform into a merchant of half-truths, woke propaganda, and a non-stop push for bigger government. **I need your help to push back.**

**_I left my ABC News job because they resisted my attempts to report on unintended consequences of big government programs_**. They wouldn't let me explain how free market capitalism was saving lives and lifting billions out of poverty.

Fox News let me, but after 7 years, I gave up my show on FBN because I wanted to reach younger people, people who haven't already made up their minds.

That is why I created **Stossel TV and partnered with Center for Independent Thought.**

Stossel TV has produced more than 400 videos explaining the benefits of free markets and the harm done by big government. Thanks to social media, we don't need TV networks anymore. Young people don't watch Fox or CNN. They surf the web and get their news from Facebook, YouTube, Instagram, Twitter, etc.

A surprise benefit of posting video on the internet is that our videos keep finding new viewers. We've gotten more than 450 million views.

[**You can help Stossel TV reach millions of people by making a donation today. Please click here or one of the links below to donate >>>**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2znkjpj1404nj070ugpckm5dl644up3inrkp3s2go_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c3gmcp76cth2bs)

[**Donate $20.22 >>>**
**Donate $50 >>>**
**Donate $100 >>>**
**Donate $250 >>>**
**Donate $500 >>>**
**Donate $1,000 >>>**
**Donate $5,000 >>>**
**Donate ANY Amount >>>**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zj946r209r12ruturo9opgo9kvb8i67vu5t45590_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c3gmcp76cth2bs)

My reporting is different from most news on cable and the networks. Most of that is "Donald Trump said today ... !" "Congress just passed ... " "Biden will promise ... " At a time when media is polarizing and politicized, Stossel TV maintains journalistic integrity by covering topics such as Socialism vs. Capitalism, Anti-racist Racists, and Social Media Censorship. We challenge the alarmism that demands more regulations.

These topics remain important year after year, election cycle after election cycle, and that's why our videos keep finding new viewers.

This allows more people to keep learning the truth--years after the video was first released.

**Stossel TV 's rapidly growing views demonstrate people want to hear the facts and think for themselves--despite mainstream media's pro-government, anti-business bias. **

[**Please help me spread our message of free markets, civil liberties, and individualism by making a donation today >>>**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z30mb2v324frb2do3n5mn51dnu65o1vq8a8l3vs8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c3gmcp76cth2bs)

[**Donate $20.22 >>>**
**Donate $50 >>>**
**Donate $100 >>>**
**Donate $250 >>>**
**Donate $500 >>>**
**Donate $1,000 >>>**
**Donate $5,000 >>>**
**Donate ANY Amount >>>**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z652doqd1vumqsqj18g5qoej1rlnvra9s0r5vfuo_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c3gmcp76cth2bs)

Your donation will help me produce more videos, reach more viewers, and expose the truth about the corrupt media, government, and political elites.

[**Please click here to make a donation.**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2znl1mviuou3d9mthrak646aesdof57jo6hk8l9no_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c3gmcp76cth2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

In liberty,

[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3he6ffts3bolldlnh2a74m2c2pikola5tnfttao_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c3gmcp76cth2bs)
John Stossel
Journalist - _Stossel TV_
Center for Independent Thought

Paid for by Center for Independent Thought

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Can we talk about Maggie?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
**1,017 votes.** That was the margin in Maggie's U.S. Senate election in New Hampshire in 2016. **Now Maggie is up for re-election in 2022, and you better believe Mitch McConnell can count to 1,017.** Because if we lose just one seat, McConnell will retake that gavel and grind the Senate to a complete halt until the next presidential election. **[So right now I need you to defend our Senate majority by making a donation to Maggie's campaign before the FEC deadline on Thursday →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36612029/308628839/-1669436104?refcode=e20210928_jo-eoq&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yjk4OTA3ZS03NDIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z2npMp9Wkpw3_DuW9BQXjw5FtzWrSwE45RxogTH88nE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36612030/308628840/-1669436104?refcode=e20210928_jo-eoq&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yjk4OTA3ZS03NDIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z2npMp9Wkpw3_DuW9BQXjw5FtzWrSwE45RxogTH88nE=)

[Another amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36612033/308628843/-1669436104?refcode=e20210928_jo-eoq&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yjk4OTA3ZS03NDIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z2npMp9Wkpw3_DuW9BQXjw5FtzWrSwE45RxogTH88nE=)
Maggie has been a leader in the fight to address the climate crisis, make college more affordable, protect a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions, tackle the opioid crisis, and build an economy that works for everyone.
But McConnell will stop climate action in its tracks. He’ll stop student loan debt relief. He’ll block judges who will uphold women's reproductive rights. And he’ll protect a corrupt tax system that funnels wealth to special interests.
**Winning a Senate election means investing early. It means investing in organizing and community mobilization over many months. It means having resources and infrastructure to combat the inevitable GOP onslaught of misinformation and attacks.**
_Because they’re coming. And we have to be ready._
**That’s why I’m asking you today, friend: Will you chip in right now to support Senator Maggie Hassan’s re-election campaign and keep Democrats in the majority?**
| [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36612034/308628844/-1669436104?refcode=e20210928_jo-eoq&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yjk4OTA3ZS03NDIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z2npMp9Wkpw3_DuW9BQXjw5FtzWrSwE45RxogTH88nE=)

Jon

That’s why I’m asking you today, friend: Will you chip in right now to support Senator Maggie Hassan’s re-election campaign and keep Democrats in the majority? | = Thanks for helping Maggie out, Jon | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States To receive fewer emails, click Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Maggie for NH

Friend,
**At NextGen, today is our favorite holiday! **
Today, September 28, marks National Voter Registration Day. Since 2013, NextGen has registered more than 1.4 million young voters,**so it’s no surprise that National Voter Registration Day is a pretty big deal over here. **
We’re working to make sure every young person has the resources to participate in upcoming elections, **but we can’t do it without you.**
[Act now: Check that your voter registration information is up to date or register to vote if you haven’t yet! ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36612455/308631381/929659484?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDYxOTYyNi03NTIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mmHSZS4RgLLCubp_sMf24dAJVqhlDNsl_SCmNMqm3Zs=&emci=ca4c9da3-ca1f-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=24619626-7520-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=6787172)

name: Trull, Chris
subject: New Colossus
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
Peter - the national news is busy reporting what a busy week it is for Congress and that's 100% true. Gwen is working night and day to further Biden's agenda with the bipartisan infrastructure bill and the Build Back Better package while avoiding a government shutdown and raising the debt ceiling. [_**We need your help to keep a progressive champion like Gwen on the front lines.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/41NgKbZvloc80oXxf_9eejsf4dLhO4HbkqdKBgKQ-HY=/Pm__Vq57GNa3l1p0u6d4Ixgzf3oQlfJbnd3KRVYl6Tg=?refcode=092821)
What you probably don't see on the national news is Gwen is also doing.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/41NgKbZvloc80oXxf_9eejsf4dLhO4HbkqdKBgKQ-HY=/Pm__Vq57GNa3l1p0u6d4Ixgzf3oQlfJbnd3KRVYl6Tg=?refcode=092821)
_" Give me your tired, your poor, your huddled masses yearning to breathe free. These are the words mounted on the pedestal of the Statue of Liberty, and they could not be more true in the early 1900s than they are now."_ -Gwen Moore
On Sunday, Gwen visited Wisconsin's Ft. McCoy that recently received thousands of Afghan refugees. Gwen and Rep. Omar wanted to ensure that the Afghan refugees were being treated with dignity and respect. Further, she joined with the Congressional Black Caucus in condemning the treatment of Haitian refugees seeking asylum. All people should be treated with dignity and respect.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36614058/308637859/683353327?refcode=20210928_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWU5OGY1ZC03NzIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGeX_hdCSLLmtrIJjg6gTAqrcRONcbXNwYxg2iPuv5U=) Friend, I'm the most vulnerable incumbent Senate Democrat up for reelection next year, and I need your help: While I've spent my time in office providing pandemic relief to struggling families, fighting for voting rights and delivering on our progressive priorities, extremist Republicans are doing everything they can to attack me and smear my record. Here's why: Experts at _POLITICO_ say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority hinge on keeping Georgia blue. This race will decide Senate control – but while GOP megadonors and dark money groups have millions to spend to try and buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support. **And unfortunately, with time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're falling incredibly short of our goal.** **So I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help today. I need to raise another $8,346 to fight back against GOP attacks and protect my seat – and I'm counting on you to help me get there:[ Please, will you give $15 or more right now – to be split between my campaign and Seth Moulton's – so we can win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36614059/308637860/683353327?refcode=20210928_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWU5OGY1ZC03NzIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGeX_hdCSLLmtrIJjg6gTAqrcRONcbXNwYxg2iPuv5U=) ** As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history. But here's the deal: **With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to retake control – and NBC News confirms that they're coming after me as a top target for defeat.** That's why we have to fight back _now_ – and it's why falling short of important goals like this isn't an option. Because if we fail to keep Georgia blue, Mitch McConnell will be back calling the shots and obstructing our Democratic agenda at every turn. **The battle for Senate control will be won or lost in Georgia, friend. So if you care about defending our Democratic Senate, I'm counting on you to rush your immediate grassroots support before it's too late:** [**Please, split a contribution between my campaign and Seth Moulton's – before our crucial midnight deadline – to help us fight back against GOP attacks, keep Georgia blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority! **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36614060/308637861/683353327?refcode=20210928_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWU5OGY1ZC03NzIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGeX_hdCSLLmtrIJjg6gTAqrcRONcbXNwYxg2iPuv5U=) I appreciate it – thank you so much. — Raphael Warnock

body:
With the end of quarter deadline coming up in two days, I know you’re probably getting a deluge of emails asking for your hard-earned dollars. So, I wanted to take a minute to explain why contributions from grassroots supporters like you are so important to our campaign. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36616070/308644482/-1314262958?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210928eoq3_ec_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzFhMWI2ZC03YzIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fO_KGMU-ichw36IZGuucMLdeAXlyq0mWXUiRK9S7kZY=)

Hey Peter. With the end of quarter deadline coming up in two days, I know you’re probably getting a deluge of emails asking for your hard-earned dollars. So, I wanted to take a minute to explain why [contributions from grassroots supporters like you](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36616071/308644486/-1314262958?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210928eoq3_ec_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzFhMWI2ZC03YzIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fO_KGMU-ichw36IZGuucMLdeAXlyq0mWXUiRK9S7kZY=) are so important to our campaign. When you chip in to support Dr. Martin’s campaign for all Tennesseans, you’re helping us do three main things:
1. **Run critical outreach programs all over Tennessee.** Right now, that means funding our 95 County Tour to get Dr. Martin out in front of the communities he’s running to be a voice for (23 counties down, 72 to go!). Down the road, we’ll shift those resources into persuasion and Get Out the Vote efforts to help voters cast their ballot while making the case for why Dr. Martin is the best choice for Tennessee.

2. **Close the gap between our campaign and Bill Lee’s dark money machine.** We simply don’t have the deep-pocketed corporate backing that Gov. Lee’s campaign does. By relying on a swell of grassroots support, $5, $10, or $50 at a time, we can close that gap and put ourselves in a position to go toe-to-toe against our corporate-backed opponent.

3. **Demonstrate support from a wide-ranging, diverse swath of Tennesseans.** People invest in causes they believe in. Nothing better shows the support Dr. Martin has from all Tennesseans — from every part of the state and every kind of background you can imagine — than people putting their dollars behind this movement to bring real leadership back to our state.

And don't forget: Dr. Martin is _still_ working around the clock treating Tennesseans with COVID-19 (thanks to Gov. Lee’s incompetence and denial that has caused the pandemic to last even longer), so he has less time to focus on fundraising. I hope all of this is helpful information, and [_**I hope you’ll contribute whatever you’re able to help this campaign — _our_ campaign — bring power back to the people of Tennessee.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36616072/308644491/-1314262958?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210928eoq3_ec_all_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzFhMWI2ZC03YzIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fO_KGMU-ichw36IZGuucMLdeAXlyq0mWXUiRK9S7kZY=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

So, I wanted to take a minute to explain why contributions from grassroots supporters like you are so important to our campaign. | = Hey Peter. With the end of quarter deadline coming up in two days, I know you’re probably getting a deluge of emails asking for your hard-earned dollars. So, I wanted to take a minute to explain why = are so important to our campaign. When you chip in to support Dr. Martin’s campaign for all Tennesseans, you’re helping us do three main things: 1. Run critical outreach programs all over Tennessee. Right now, that means funding our 95 County Tour to get Dr. Martin out in front of the communities he’s running to be a voice for (23 counties down, 72 to go!). Down the road, we’ll shift those resources into persuasion and Get Out the Vote efforts to help voters cast their ballot while making the case for why Dr. Martin is the best choice for Tennessee. 2. Close the gap between our campaign and Bill Lee’s dark money machine. We simply don’t have the deep-pocketed corporate backing that Gov. Lee’s campaign does. By relying on a swell of grassroots support, $5, $10, or $50 at a time, we can close that gap and put ourselves in a position to go toe-to-toe against our corporate-backed opponent. 3. Demonstrate support from a wide-ranging, diverse swath of Tennesseans. People invest in causes they believe in. Nothing better shows the support Dr. Martin has from all Tennesseans — from every part of the state and every kind of background you can imagine — than people putting their dollars behind this movement to bring real leadership back to our state. And don't forget: Dr. Martin is still working around the clock treating Tennesseans with COVID-19 (thanks to Gov. Lee’s incompetence and denial that has caused the pandemic to last even longer), so he has less time to focus on fundraising. Hey everybody,
I just stepped out of our evening strategy meeting and wanted to make sure I reached out to our strongest supporters immediately. **This race is incredibly close.** There are now two polls that show Glenn Youngkin with a lead and _the Cook Political Report_ has moved Virginia from Lean Democrat to a Toss Up.
But here’s the thing, y’all — there’s still time to turn this around. Early Voting started 10 days ago and tens of thousands of Virginians have voted already, but one thing is clear — we’re going to need all hands on deck, Derek. **That’s why the DPVA is setting a $21,000 pre-debate fundraising goal.**
I see the work that Terry puts in everyday on the trail. We need to show him that we’re willing to work just as hard and that we have his back tomorrow on the debate stage and all the way through November 2nd.
**The only way we’re going to win this thing and send Terry McAuliffe to Richmond with a Democratic majority is by out-organizing Glenn Youngkin and the Virginia GOP.**

name: Greater Georgia
subject: ICYMI: KELLY LOEFFLER DISCUSSES NATIONAL VOTER REGISTRATION DAY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, SEPT. 28, 2021
ICYMI: KELLY LOEFFLER DISCUSSES NATIONAL VOTER REGISTRATION DAY
ATLANTA - In case you missed it, Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler joined radio show host Bill Edwards on his WTKS Savannah morning show today to discuss Greater Georgia's mission to register and engage voters, fight for conservative values, and defend election integrity. Today is National Voter Registration Day, and Kelly also encouraged everyone to ensure their information is updated before the upcoming Oct. 4 registration deadline to vote in local and municipal elections.
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EE_Bnc6PYNGc62QUiizIGPfyY6ZxnwXy3ywQFNX86a5BEv66yJFfh5CJaGujmB2ym_RPtrmm-8pUQbv5o_yVy9gZlQL91EFyYL-Ebzibztzmr4qafVnqb_qEkPkKH11nRBoltdh-4U3J6XMEeDrtXLNdBheZsM-l1iBWOHWoEa7hC_qAWGzVUBnkkH2evPlVP8TGoSmH8Oc=&c=sCqvzkOsGcd-AmHkIA60lB-WgkKbxz5qp2yG1dfcVh65X2wWisXQtg==&ch=KrC33z7pi_8wUhQKHAmKTeTKR2Xak2UowkVQXr3W0UIsbA4DS-OXNg==) or below to see a message from Kelly encouraging Georgians to register to vote:
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EE_Bnc6PYNGc62QUiizIGPfyY6ZxnwXy3ywQFNX86a5BEv66yJFfh5CJaGujmB2ym_RPtrmm-8pUQbv5o_yVy9gZlQL91EFyYL-Ebzibztzmr4qafVnqb_qEkPkKH11nRBoltdh-4U3J6XMEeDrtXLNdBheZsM-l1iBWOHWoEa7hC_qAWGzVUBnkkH2evPlVP8TGoSmH8Oc=&c=sCqvzkOsGcd-AmHkIA60lB-WgkKbxz5qp2yG1dfcVh65X2wWisXQtg==&ch=KrC33z7pi_8wUhQKHAmKTeTKR2Xak2UowkVQXr3W0UIsbA4DS-OXNg==)
---
| Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EE_Bnc6PYNGc62QUiizIGPfyY6ZxnwXy3ywQFNX86a5BEv66yJFfh-LbW54go5gp7HcWNNgNS8JD3MfRubklJ3T4H1XwHiqtzmHcSEQaMZJyyURPHiXZf5y18FbbsTKNIXdYfFDtD4nmez6piOe6zFsfmMMrf0dzj2k5TPp77To=&c=sCqvzkOsGcd-AmHkIA60lB-WgkKbxz5qp2yG1dfcVh65X2wWisXQtg==&ch=KrC33z7pi_8wUhQKHAmKTeTKR2Xak2UowkVQXr3W0UIsbA4DS-OXNg==) to register to vote.
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EE_Bnc6PYNGc62QUiizIGPfyY6ZxnwXy3ywQFNX86a5BEv66yJFfh5CJaGujmB2yWu34ihQn3BytWTiJXwTEIwJgXyZSO4tU76vxfy6oFruxXmNWJ6od5eaeeaQXY6nzBq5_aTWrKDJXw7e2xLfLpg==&c=sCqvzkOsGcd-AmHkIA60lB-WgkKbxz5qp2yG1dfcVh65X2wWisXQtg==&ch=KrC33z7pi_8wUhQKHAmKTeTKR2Xak2UowkVQXr3W0UIsbA4DS-OXNg==) to check your voter status and information.
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EE_Bnc6PYNGc62QUiizIGPfyY6ZxnwXy3ywQFNX86a5BEv66yJFfh5CJaGujmB2yuKhrF68sZgg2n5Z6YvPORji362R72z2akCq0Czl9DZ74J6ts2fJN-X7ghk-McD3j4AAr3jZ25L2O-_i7BBhnsw==&c=sCqvzkOsGcd-AmHkIA60lB-WgkKbxz5qp2yG1dfcVh65X2wWisXQtg==&ch=KrC33z7pi_8wUhQKHAmKTeTKR2Xak2UowkVQXr3W0UIsbA4DS-OXNg==) or the photo below to listen to the full interview:
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EE_Bnc6PYNGc62QUiizIGPfyY6ZxnwXy3ywQFNX86a5BEv66yJFfh5CJaGujmB2yuKhrF68sZgg2n5Z6YvPORji362R72z2akCq0Czl9DZ74J6ts2fJN-X7ghk-McD3j4AAr3jZ25L2O-_i7BBhnsw==&c=sCqvzkOsGcd-AmHkIA60lB-WgkKbxz5qp2yG1dfcVh65X2wWisXQtg==&ch=KrC33z7pi_8wUhQKHAmKTeTKR2Xak2UowkVQXr3W0UIsbA4DS-OXNg==)
---
| As Kelly said:
"We know that elections have consequences. Everything's at stake, and we have to make sure that we're engaged, that folks are getting out to register. Right now, conservatives are getting out-registered by the Left here in Georgia by about 7,000 votes a month ... We've got to engage. We know that there's about a million disengaged conservatives across our state. Our voices have to be heard through our votes, and we will not stop [the Left's] insanity unless we stand up and use our voices to vote ... Fortunately S.B. 202 has passed, it's been signed into law. I'm working hard to make sure people understand that we will have election integrity if it's implemented properly. We need to have free elections that are free of fraud. Georgians deserve that, and their voices have to be heard because this is a dangerous moment for our country, and it seems like Biden has even more in store for us.
"Please get out and register. If you've moved or changed your address, please check on the secretary of state's website to make sure that you're registered in the right area, that your address and your precinct are up to date ... these types of things can really save our country, and that's what's at stake here - saving our state from the socialist agenda that you see being pushed every day in Washington, and saving our country from being stripped of the freedoms that Biden and his folks are every single day trying to take away from us.
"Now's the time to mobilize. Don't get discouraged - let's band together. I see it across the state. People are getting involved more than ever. We just have to keep that momentum and build on it."
---

It's time, friend.
The end of our first quarter on this campaign draws near and waiting on the sidelines is no longer an option. **It’s time to choose your fighter for Florida’s 15th District.**
(_**[If you’re already solidly on Team Eddie, chip in to help us reach our goal of 500 grassroots donations before midnight on the 30th](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36617680/308650775/-847830491?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210928eoq3_TE_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDk1MmU4MS03ZTIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kgVacY23CE-rtgPMne_Cms24jeVwlFn5EMB-34F4o18=)**_. But if you’re not, read on for a preview of Florida’s biggest match up since The Undertaker vs Edge at WrestleMania XXIV).
**The Incumbent** : Scott Franklin. Trump Republican who embraced the Big Lie and voted to overturn the 2020 election results. He also voted against COVID relief and against infrastructure. The only thing he’s voted for is to shut down the government. Put it all together and you get someone who has a background of service that we respect (seriously!), but who has chosen to disregard all that in order to tow the Trump Republican line.
_(Cue raucous boos)_
**The Stakes** : The Crisis Deluxe Package. Climate crisis, healthcare crisis, housing crisis, democracy crisis, cost-of-prescription-drugs crisis, workforce crisis, and more. It’s a mad world out there right now, folks, and the consequences are all too real.
_(Cue anxious tittering and grumbling)_
**The Challenger** : University of Florida graduate and former comedian who spent the last decade working in activism (MoveOn.org, The Democratic National Committee, Priorities USA), whose experience in politics and activism has given him a great deal of insight in how things get done in Washington. Progressive. A consensus builder. Non-flexible principles with room to compromise on the tactics and implementation. It’s. . . Eddie Geller!
_(Cue stupendous cheers! The people have their champion
and his name is Eddie Geller!)_

subject: Do you want the IRS tracking you?

# **Friend — Joe Biden wants the IRS to track ALL of your bank transactions over $600. **

---
This is Washington overreach at its absolute worst, and I’m taking action to stop it.

I’ve signed on to a plan that would STOP the IRS from further invading Americans’ privacy, but I want to know what YOU think about it. **Will you take this quick poll?**
**SELECT YOUR ANSWER:**
[🔘 NO: Joe Biden’s IRS shouldn’t track my bank transactions.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/3cd2fd54b23911fb/d6c1650e60a138b0c3d6b838967d376c)

[🔘 YES: Joe Biden’s IRS should violate Americans’ privacy](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/3cd2fd54b23911fb/8198b0a8aa858419c3d6b838967d376c)[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/3cd2fd54b23911fb/95434202b392fefac3d6b838967d376c)

The IRS has no business harassing taxpayers, targeting people based on their political beliefs, and violating Americans’ right to privacy.

That’s what I think at least, and I want to know if YOU agree. [**Take our quick poll now and let me know what you think.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/3cd2fd54b23911fb/35ef7d4eca1f9d24c3d6b838967d376c)

name: Rod Dorilas
subject: I'm not your stereotypical Republican.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
body:
My Haitian immigrant parents picked crops to put me through school - 30 years later, I'm running for Congress. This could only happen in America. |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=4b5011e677794f2c8dfa29e0f97dcc21&_t=azSmf0FizuHTkJAaSGyStPtWnID6xnCZCfSPnMpd3f3BbSOu9-f6QrKMcye3YFKJxaozkOGf4fafx6X32y10-ONkdUnRM1NEWfwQRHSTG9lCDgCKzfCnh6DoJG4INcsz52pk_7-A41kGTPJ3s9fM0ErUYOisbahp2evEcdEAuAk%3D).

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4b5011e677794f2c8dfa29e0f97dcc21&_e=sizvtncEZpqNIwVwY5ESlTPNBI4phpQgqaZcy_zDbX2dRMfRetsXkumlnPrvfpav3rD6iKj9NSo7sQAsk_-ZmJIr-Mz2JAs2DWU4dkez8XnQ0TmfxbOQPLxSytuRu2u0sZG3q3TUGYJ8F6DqHDxdm-wZBDpLEWsTtd6-dxDiu95sSfa8cOhn4o1tlReFenQ-ao9h_8FUGVbK4QEyqiu7N2S_BwtOV7zaYJlqqCA1_I6iNkt6VJxvo7kPGwsyQnqzxAAYWwOMMNHV12y321bbcrCJNbm0pvSX_xQ5Tn_0Rsx7h9KGGGaaWtHOp2XBmIS2tqpCguqas8uwjoykaH62oCtG01A2d29_BifCApt3SmuDKFv4lhS1urRGlWzSdT-QlPCQ2cR-k5Ux3H1ES8I1pDEFXz2ZKp35X82-53exNCYwY9kMCPCP96_tmWqmvVYNvdZHAce9HHz85BfzkwlHmQBJnL6v2bjk3OX3Pops_qM%3D)

---
Fellow American,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4b5011e677794f2c8dfa29e0f97dcc21&_e=sizvtncEZpqNIwVwY5ESlTPNBI4phpQgqaZcy_zDbX2dRMfRetsXkumlnPrvfpav3rD6iKj9NSo7sQAsk_-ZmJIr-Mz2JAs2DWU4dkez8XnQ0TmfxbOQPLxSytuRu2u0sZG3q3TUGYJ8F6DqHDxdm-wZBDpLEWsTtd6-dxDiu95sSfa8cOhn4o1tlReFenQ-ao9h_8FUGVbK4QEyqiu7N2S_BwtOV7zaYJlqqCA1_I6iNkt6VJxvo7kPGwsyQnqzxAAYWwOMMNHV12y321bbcjTZ4VOi8i6MgEUSPxHNeInWk98-7A_-9Do8s_PA6PKyQvRgv7i1BJ-0Ndegoi0B4atVUX515m9NejNw1170461_t_t7q0cC9EBDmF2XdAYSlNVS5qJvX2ow1rpxarnNFHjyNs-Iwdp0OpHkkwclbhJMk9E2ay4k-cmX6hycKDGeRytpxp82LGMacti59RWgGjsdFXSXsxe1Non6A6EACYY%3D)
My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today.
* I’m a military veteran (**I joined at 17**),
* I’m a lawyer (**I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school**)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ _**freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction**_.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4b5011e677794f2c8dfa29e0f97dcc21&_e=sizvtncEZpqNIwVwY5ESlTPNBI4phpQgqaZcy_zDbX2dRMfRetsXkumlnPrvfpav3rD6iKj9NSo7sQAsk_-ZmJIr-Mz2JAs2DWU4dkez8XnQ0TmfxbOQPLxSytuRu2u0sZG3q3TUGYJ8F6DqHDxdm-wZBDpLEWsTtd6-dxDiu95sSfa8cOhn4o1tlReFenQ-ao9h_8FUGVbK4QEyqiu7N2S_BwtOV7zaYJlqqCA1_I6iNkt6VJxvo7kPGwsyQnqzxAAYWwOMMNHV12y321bbcrRsMJw2JHy7KLAZxiNh5rWo6AnrwASou_op_iSNPUCtAP9bSm2wk4QGteS5G1SDLow23iBAC_lLi_mexPxMvT9rivtNH54U5wW4rBZigM21RAGOvUysQbK_4cr5vxfFxz5QoXK6rUULizWa9G3EJjCtQcjPT2PWYxfBz4emD_xVWtSIz2iqSFZ0X-Sq71CEHljw8NIAgtL149hJeZBPlRs%3D)

Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts.

I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. **I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice**. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4b5011e677794f2c8dfa29e0f97dcc21&_e=sizvtncEZpqNIwVwY5ESlTPNBI4phpQgqaZcy_zDbX2dRMfRetsXkumlnPrvfpav3rD6iKj9NSo7sQAsk_-ZmJIr-Mz2JAs2DWU4dkez8XnQ0TmfxbOQPLxSytuRu2u0sZG3q3TUGYJ8F6DqHDxdm-wZBDpLEWsTtd6-dxDiu95sSfa8cOhn4o1tlReFenQ-ao9h_8FUGVbK4QEyqiu7N2S_BwtOV7zaYJlqqCA1_I6iNkt6VJxvo7kPGwsyQnqzxAAYWwOMMNHV12y321bbcsjkbzZ6Uwl3g8sI_sJKjSIZwjNKqlX9q8RVRGWWuRQFcRG8VhPXRGtsJ2gwruD9y23wCLcbWlFdYBTVeZMdV7wITGd57tM9rzxE4SNbAldE60cU5L95xvi2S-uUR-6fMuCmxOXMbobaGtwQ6iWr2-bMmYYyHo5PuQijnKmxNYlkhDSNNk1qK2Qk6HlrYpALKe3XMs9eex6tfRlL07w8Rx0%3D)
**I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. **

Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but _**what is worth having in life that is easy?**_ I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts.

Rod Dorilas

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

However, if this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any more of our emails...

This crisis was completely avoidable, but Biden's weak approach to border security has caused thousands of migrants to think they can illegally come into America whenever they want!

clean_body: Last week, over 10,000 Haitian migrants are outside Del Rio, Texas. | | | | | | == | Friend, Last week over 10,000 Haitian migrants were outside Del Rio, Texas. To put that in perspective, that is one-third of Del Rio's total population. The small community was not equipped to handle the massive influx of migrants. This crisis was completely avoidable, but Biden's weak approach to border security has caused thousands of migrants to think they can illegally come into America whenever they want! | | | == | == | The Radical Left is now pushing for the Biden administration to attack our Border Patrol officers for simply doing their job. Anarchy and lawlessness are the foundations of the Leftist Swamp. Biden doesn't care about protecting our officers, communities, or our border. He only looks out for himself and his Radical Leftist supporters. Kat will always push for strong borders in America. She knows without borders, we don't have a country. In order to end Biden's border crisis, Conservatives need to take back the House in 2022. clean_body: Republicans are planning a power grab in Ohio. | Marcy Kaptur | | | | Team -- It’s crucial that Ohioans understand the importance of sending Rep. Marcy Kaptur back to Congress. Republicans only need to flip five seats to win back the House. Republicans are planning a power grab in Ohio, and we’re running out of time to stop them. They’re focused on flipping Marcy Kaptur’s seat in Congress and reversing all of the progress we’ve made -- leaving the future of working families in Ohio vulnerable. | It’s a dangerous turning point. If we want to hold our House Majority, it is crucial that we show Republicans that the working people of Ohio are not falling prey to their deceit. Republicans had four years to deliver results for Ohioans. Instead, they prioritized the well-being of mega-corporations and the top 1%. We’ve given Ohio Republicans enough time to represent the will of the people effectively and fairly, but they continue to fail us on every front. We need compassionate, results-oriented leadership, and Rep. Marcy Kaptur has the proven track record to deliver. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for your support, \-- Team Kaptur Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36619199/308655047/124312502?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODc5Y2FiMC04MTIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wEI96chuE7o2K4RuYEVmrF-VtyVJ-VU8KQNXriUQqb4=)

Hey Peter! It's Bianca, Michele's wife.

Between you and me, it's been a little bit hard to catch a few moments alone with my love lately. She is on the campaign trail, campaigning _hard_ to represent Florida's 13th. Of course I am proud of her but sometimes I miss her, too!

It was especially nice that we got to take a couple hours off and celebrate our **third wedding anniversary** together last night. Now, it's still a pandemic, so we cooked, but more important than the food was the chance to **reconnect** and **catch up together.**

And let me tell you -- there was a lot to catch up on! Michele was bubbling over to tell me all the incredible milestones she's hit on the campaign, like her recent endorsements from the Collective PAC and Way To Lead. Recently, she even got to take a trip to the Congressional Black Caucus retreat where she got to strategize with incredible leaders like Rep. Lucy McBath.

She was full of stories she's heard from people just like _you_ that she's met while she was campaigning. The family that struggled to pay rent after the eviction moratorium ended. The young professional that's working to pay off their student loans. The fishing boat captain who is trying to earn a living through the effects of climate change and the Red Tide.

**It reminded me all over again why I fell in love with her: She cares about people.** She is always striving to make life just a little bit better for everyone she meets. She takes on our struggles and she sets out to make them easier.

**[I am so proud of my wife, and I know that you are, too. It reminded me all over again why I fell in love with her: She cares about people. She is always striving to make life just a little bit better for everyone she meets. She takes on our struggles and she sets out to make them easier. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = This is a critical deadline for her and the campaign, and it's important that she raises as much as she can before midnight on September 30th. She is working so hard to make things better in Florida's 13th. She always has our backs, and now it's time to have hers. = = Thanks for supporting my wife's campaign. It is so inspiring to see so many people come together to imagine a better future for Florida and this nation. Thank you, Bianca = *

subject: Something has happened

body:
|
#
You may not know this, but the overwhelming majority of contributions to our campaign come from online donors. I’ll be the first to admit, emails like this can get annoying, but they’re a critical part of the work we’re doing to replace Ron Johnson with someone who can actually be trusted to do what's right by Wisconsin workers and families. **Something strange has happened though...** My campaign staff says our numbers are significantly lower than last month. Fewer people are opening these messages and even fewer are pitching in lately. Sure, some days are better than others, but we’ve had one too many bad ones -- and they’re coming at a not-so-great time. You see, Ron Johnson has started attacking me directly, and it’s earlier than any of us had expected. Pundits are already calling him the most vulnerable Republican incumbent, and the race was just upgraded to a toss-up -- the guy knows he’s in trouble. It’s clear we’re making Ron Johnson nervous. One publication even said he was “scared” of me -- and honestly, he should be! I have a track record of defeating Republicans in statewide elections. I can beat him, too. But we have an important FEC fundraising deadline this week and we’re behind on our goal, which means I need to ask you to step up today. [**I would really appreciate it if you could rush a donation of any amount toward our FEC goal ahead of the September 30 deadline. Every dollar gives us the early resources we need to build a strong campaign and fight Republican efforts to reclaim the Senate majority. He also joked about hitting Nancy Pelosi with the gavel, is blocking any investments for working families "over his dead body," and has been spineless in holding Trump accountable. He even publicly THREATENED companies that hand over GOP phone records to the January 6th investigators.

The Central Valley can do better.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36619503/308655872/-686739743?refcode=em-92821-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjAwMWQ5Mi04MjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o0YXl9NOvvCvwfdNxBBLPtJo4u2oIMoh2eGXstnuY0M=)

Marisa is a 20-year veteran teacher in our public schools and her entire career has been about serving students and their families. She's running for Congress to fight for health care access, education funding, immigration reform, environmental protection and much more.

We have to make sure voters know Marisa is the viable Democrat running against McCarthy. That means we need a TON of people chipping in grassroots contributions so we can build a robust voter contact program to reach more voters.

name: Jason Crow
subject: Securing Sen. Bennet’s seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36619579/308656128/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjE3MTljZC04MjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GRyLUoA64j_ICvXPAUkeJzCFpZ_MjI6hB_Vk2aL2YXU=)
Folks, My friend Michael Bennet is an unwavering advocate for all Coloradans. For years, Michael has worked to expand access to health care, protect our environment, and ensure future generations have the resources they need to succeed. Together, we’ve led countless efforts that prioritize Colorado — all to represent you, the people who elected us. However, this progress rests on our fragile majority in the Senate. **Mitch McConnell and national Republicans will do anything to flip Colorado red and take back the Senate majority** —**and they only need one more seat to do it.** _[**Michael refuses to accept corporate PAC money because he works for the people of Colorado, not corporate special interests, so we need a strong grassroots team to overcome Republican attacks. | Peter -
It's almost the end of September and I am about to report my fundraising total for this quarter. I really need your help.
America is facing crisis after crisis courtesy of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and the socialists currently running our government.
More than ONE MILLION illegal immigrants have flooded across our border. Our energy independence and American oil and gas workers are on the chopping block because of Green New Deal policies. And Americans are about to witness the largest tax and spending spree in our nation's history to the tune of $4 TRILLION.
