| The first and most pressing problem is the unprecedented crisis at our southern border.
Jen Psaki said that illegal immigrants don't plan to stay in the United States. That's a lie. We know that AT LEAST 50,000 illegal immigrants were released into our country WITHOUT A COURT DATE.
Joe Biden said that "nothing has changed" in illegal crossings since he took office. Another lie. There were more than 200,000 ENCOUNTERS with illegal immigrants in ONE MONTH. The most in more than two decades.
And Kamala Harris said that Joe "inherited" this problem from President Trump. That's the biggest lie of them all. President Trump was stopping illegal immigration with his Remain in Mexico Policy, ending of catch and release, and basic enforcement of our border laws.

| | | [SIGN THE PETITION. TELL JOE BIDEN TO CLOSE THE BORDER.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Qh8u7MPfklphSBZRhBySrj_z3XVGQBUz6Hw6T4yXMLOXsNaWHCseJnGc45AHK2BWayzs5xm_lb8_u3knofARHKF3CiRtgSUcZ6thCbr5laVuJ5ni4PcObl4IMjqlslFwpvCgQM5AwBF1U2mdRFNkTblLB3jTDdyZkTQkB5QWCrVwKAb6aCe-reYF2Yi1WrJc05CJkEZUG53bfQa_ECL7SG0djszvY9OaVI9U3X-09DGDerNivy7COkF9I764Nl6YkV103RQTJvXDFFwlgZmvKysM_XTMi-uD-INFs2fpUtR65MbZf4pVyazPpNv3gXbzuCw9PTE9GyQ9GYIWT1xquOkzQY_2zPpClbYC2HOpntlG8FrmiMo7JH-iOcAAZODn&c=TfvHivSk0T7I9GVzJvF_CA11zAMMQBPr1ww29AuI2VxIdiMPEOuqRQ==&ch=eyO75yUHbo8ksch7cyY8enjwwihQhwov8sMtWGxAsuQ8xLzyPskhWw==)

| |
---
| I am exposing the truth about Biden's open border policies. And I'm proposing solutions in Congress, like reimplementing EVERY SINGLE TRUMP POLICY that helped secure the border.
[But I can't do this without your help. I need the resources to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and the socialists in Washington. And with a strong report at the end of the month, the socialists won't be able to hide from the truth any more. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Qh8u7MPfklphSBZRhBySrj_z3XVGQBUz6Hw6T4yXMLOXsNaWHCseJvf__QRhHgWcq9Cf4AMOFncb9NmhzaiQqegEEB0nFBkBkzQcJwOJWkfArbprKPGwM7p3JhF7xu8sRBNR-2ZRS3J8JGAwbxkfuh6HeNpTZV51u6ZrFBqybU3-SRvxJx0Jzq4Ruy660r6uzGrdtsscIC3CZu0dh0UVq6Z81D88XqLQuEluSTN26Delyan0irBiaRVv9G7Zh4QjB8lg7x2AMzF-7lH6zJ6NxqhL74c1c3ppk6OlFwAj0JTGBfwfFf4-zrgHy-STlOrqfLkXFO8jN4Gxvl2kes2jX73Y6jj_AcSTn7D0y8BWqhk=&c=TfvHivSk0T7I9GVzJvF_CA11zAMMQBPr1ww29AuI2VxIdiMPEOuqRQ==&ch=eyO75yUHbo8ksch7cyY8enjwwihQhwov8sMtWGxAsuQ8xLzyPskhWw==)

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: I’m humbly asking for your support before the FEC deadline in two days.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Before we announced, I wasn’t sure what to expect honestly.
#

It’s hard to believe it’s already been five months since we launched this campaign for North Carolina’s Senate seat!
Before we announced, I wasn’t sure what to expect honestly. I worried about how much this race would cost because I knew Republicans were ready to pump millions of dollars into our state, and I knew we’d need a whole lot of folks like you joining with us to fight back.
But I put my faith in you, and right after our announcement, a teacher from Charlotte named Sonya chipped in $5. Then Catherine, a health care worker from Boone, made a $20 recurring contribution, and Jeffrey, a teacher in Brunswick County, donated $50! Just like that, we were officially off the ground, and we’ve been building momentum ever since.
But now, we are facing our biggest challenge in just two day — our official FEC deadline. We haven’t reached our goal yet, so I am humbly asking for your support again.
[**Can you make a $3 donation to our campaign to help us reach our critical fundraising goal before the FEC deadline? clean_body: Before we announced, I wasn’t sure what to expect honestly. It’s hard to believe it’s already been five months since we launched this campaign for North Carolina’s Senate seat! Before we announced, I wasn’t sure what to expect honestly. I worried about how much this race would cost because I knew Republicans were ready to pump millions of dollars into our state, and I knew we’d need a whole lot of folks like you joining with us to fight back. But I put my faith in you, and right after our announcement, a teacher from Charlotte named Sonya chipped in $5. Then Catherine, a health care worker from Boone, made a $20 recurring contribution, and Jeffrey, a teacher in Brunswick County, donated $50! Just like that, we were officially off the ground, and we’ve been building momentum ever since. But now, we are facing our biggest challenge in just two day — our official FEC deadline. We haven’t reached our goal yet, so I am humbly asking for your support again. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = We’ve already seen Republican super PACs getting involved in this race. body:
I need your help to ensure we can keep fighting for progress every day.
#
Team,
2021 has been a year of important strides for our country, and that’s in large part because Democrats have control of the Senate. From ensuring our kids can safely get the education they need to delivering major economic relief, our Senate majority has made pivotal moves to secure our quality of life.
But I need your help to ensure we can keep fighting for progress every day. We are $17,329 away from reaching our end of quarter goal on** _Sept. 30._**** [Will you give $5 or more right now? Any contribution amount will help us defend our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36620281/308658070/-957664144?refcode=jr_em_nd_210928_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWJiMDdjMS04NDIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=31VOWWRUiIRtbp3Yarh4Xo5EmtBiWy8CFoMxsS_IHyg=)**
I promise to continue to fight for you and hardworking families across our nation. I want to continue to fight for action against climate change, expanding access to health care, and defending women’s reproductive rights.
Will you help me stay in this fight for our values? **[Will you rush in a $5 donation so we can defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36620282/308658071/-957664144?refcode=jr_em_nd_210928_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWJiMDdjMS04NDIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=31VOWWRUiIRtbp3Yarh4Xo5EmtBiWy8CFoMxsS_IHyg=)**
We can’t do this without your support.
Thank you,
Jacky Rosen

subject: Putting Joe Biden on notice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
TIME-SENSITIVE: Please review & respond ASAP
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/95b6babd835ae9dc/a5a352167c10e613c3d6b838967d376c/35193) Friend, Troy is fed up, and frankly he’s FURIOUS. Joe Biden has weakened and humiliated our nation with his disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan, ignoring key military advice and fumbling the ball. And he has the audacity to call his withdrawal an “extraordinary success.” This guy is living in another reality, and Congressman Nehls is leading the charge to **DEMAND ANSWERS** for the American people and **HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE!** The all-important FEC End-of-Quarter fundraising deadline is coming up fast. It’s vital that we reach our goal to fuel Troy’s fight in Washington. We need EVERY supporter on board. [_**Please pitch in $5, $10, $25, or $50 today to stand with Troy! >>>**_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/95b6babd835ae9dc/9d890a700e18c033c3d6b838967d376c/35193) [**DONATE HERE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/95b6babd835ae9dc/30eb05771699c3d2c3d6b838967d376c/35193) The list of Biden’s fumbles and failures is long and growing. Just look to our southern border, where we’ve had another month of more than 200,000 illegal crossings. It’s a national security nightmare. And we have Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi pushing for TRILLIONS in new spending, as inflation continues to run rampant, new job numbers are falling short, and unemployment claims are on the rise. **The Democrats know that they need to flip TX-22 if they want to hold onto their majority in Congress. It’s up to us to defend it. If you have Troy’s back in this fight, please respond now**. [_**Tap or click to make a donation today, to help Troy fight for our great nation’s future**_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/95b6babd835ae9dc/429620fed544d7e1c3d6b838967d376c/35193). \- Team Nehls [**DONATE $5**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/95b6babd835ae9dc/6db086eee06e05bac3d6b838967d376c/35193) [**DONATE $10**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/95b6babd835ae9dc/63bbedf2d00536e4c3d6b838967d376c/35193) [**DONATE $25**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/95b6babd835ae9dc/b7555183fa9d2e77c3d6b838967d376c/35193) [**DONATE $50**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/95b6babd835ae9dc/f545b7869ff20947c3d6b838967d376c/35193) [**DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/95b6babd835ae9dc/487da4c2c6399a5ac3d6b838967d376c/35193) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/95b6babd835ae9dc/b5ee093ffdde9669c3d6b838967d376c/35193) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/95b6babd835ae9dc/f231790c114cccdac3d6b838967d376c/35193)

body:
Two days to go. |

https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/sept-end-of-quarter?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20210928_tinaramirez_sept-eoq-launch
SEPTEMBER FEC END-OF-QUARTER DEADLINE
Are you with me, Friend, this is it.

subject: This is why Terry’s debate tonight is so important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia

| | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36622020/308663862/-2023814932?refcode=20210928.4_HRC_9GB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWQ1NTllNC04NTIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JPyAYTaB1g_C7VrProSRsBiDj1Ar21-yYt7TYH1b4cs=)

| | Derek, I know a thing or two about standing on stage with a far-right extremist who thinks he can buy his way into elected office.

That’s why I knew I needed to reach out. Terry has his second debate with Glenn Youngkin tonight and it’s going to be a pivotal moment for Terry’s campaign.

Here’s why:

**Terry has spent this campaign focusing on the issues that matter to Virginians** — he’s been connecting with voters, building his policy plans for Virginia and galvanizing a grassroots movement.

**Meanwhile, Trump’s hand-picked candidate Glenn Youngkin has been hiding his views from voters and lying about where he really stands on the issues.**

This debate is Terry’s chance to hold Glenn accountable for trying to bring Trumpism to Virginia. Terry is as tough as nails and I promise you he won’t let Glenn get away with it.

_**[Terry needs to know you have his back. Will you make a contribution to Terry’s campaign today to show him you have his back in what is sure to be a tough debate? clean_body: | | | = | | Derek, I know a thing or two about standing on stage with a far-right extremist who thinks he can buy his way into elected office. That’s why I knew I needed to reach out. Terry has his second debate with Glenn Youngkin tonight and it’s going to be a pivotal moment for Terry’s campaign. Here’s why: Terry has spent this campaign focusing on the issues that matter to Virginians — he’s been connecting with voters, building his policy plans for Virginia and galvanizing a grassroots movement. Meanwhile, Trump’s hand-picked candidate Glenn Youngkin has been hiding his views from voters and lying about where he really stands on the issues. This debate is Terry’s chance to hold Glenn accountable for trying to bring Trumpism to Virginia. Terry is as tough as nails and I promise you he won’t let Glenn get away with it. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Derek, Virginians are voting right now, and they deserve to know the truth about where each candidate stands on the issues. name: Jenna Henry, Keystone Progress
subject: Here’s how to vote by mail in PA.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=092821&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=092821&amount=10]

Dear Friend,

We must defend our democracy from lawmakers who are desperate to undermine it. The best way to do that? By voting.

This National Voter Registration Day, we'd like to help you get ready to cast your ballot on or before November 2, 2021.

If you plan to vote by mail, please remember that you’re expected to sign up to vote by mail each and every election. So even if you voted by mail last election, you have to fill out a form again to get your ballot.

The last day to register is October 18, 2021:

Apply to vote by mail: https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/OnlineAbsenteeApplication/#/OnlineAbsenteeBegin

Vote in person: https://www.vote.pa.gov/Pages/default.aspx

Please support Keystone Progress in our efforts to Get Out The Vote and educate voters in areas of Pennsylvania that are often overlooked by progressive organizers by donating $10 today.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=092821&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=092821&amount=10]

Thank you and see you at the polls!

Jenna Henry
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

**Friend, our state is under attack by GOP extremists.** They're trying to subvert democracy through every desperate tactic they can think of: relitigating settled election results, attacking voting rights, controlling women's bodies through an extremist abortion ban – you name it, the failed Arizona GOP has tried it.
**It's undeniable: GOP extremists are a threat to Arizona's future – and I refuse to stand back.** That's why I am running for governor – because, as The Washington Post __ confirms, the only surefire way to defeat GOP extremism is to elect a Democratic governor in our state.
I can't fight these extremists and conspiracists alone, though – I need your help.**** We have a critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline coming up, and right now, we're way short of our $50,000 goal. **We need to hit this goal to build a movement strong enough to flip Arizona blue, but it won't happen without support from people like you: [Please, friend, we have to raise $50,000 before our quarterly deadline – will you give $5 to my campaign right now to defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona fully blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36623293/308668105/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk207-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTMxMTA2MC04OTIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pnLyUE9ImTyCoNMHg64_OajbEnLtJHbNXLsqE-iJDLc=)**

Derek -

This is going to be a close race. Very close. Close enough that it's important to think about what the Senate would look like if Mark Kelly loses and Mitch McConnell is Majority Leader again.

We are sorry to put that terrible thought in your head, but it's true.

That's why we’re asking for $25 before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline comes to a close.

Now, you're probably thinking how can $25 overcome the huge amount of money pouring into Arizona to beat Mark Kelly?

Well, by the time you get to this part of the email someone else has already chipped in $25. Now they're hoping you'll do the same. It all adds up and that is how we win.

clean_body: This is going to be a close race. Very close. Close enough that it's important to think about what the Senate would look like if Mark Kelly loses and Mitch McConnell is Majority Leader again. | | | Derek - This is going to be a close race. Very close. Close enough that it's important to think about what the Senate would look like if Mark Kelly loses and Mitch McConnell is Majority Leader again. We are sorry to put that terrible thought in your head, but it's true. That's why we’re asking for $25 before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline comes to a close. Now, you're probably thinking how can $25 overcome the huge amount of money pouring into Arizona to beat Mark Kelly? Well, by the time you get to this part of the email someone else has already chipped in $25. Now they're hoping you'll do the same. It all adds up and that is how we win. What do you say? Those are the stakes. And we all have a role to play in making sure we keep Mark Kelly in the Senate. Thanks, Team Kelly | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36624229/308670644/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmE1ZGVhYy04YjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ufqq8HC9a8wzt8tm0WkurcaWmZrcE0cWg3Od4Fe4lBg=)

Friend,

According to our Constitution -- which I took an oath to protect as a Marine, a prosecutor, and a member of Congress -- a right is a right no matter what state you live in.

**That's why House Democrats passed the Women's Health Protection Act (WHPA), which will codify Roe v. Wade into law and guarantee the right to choose.**

The WHPA passed against the backdrop of GOP state legislatures, like those in Texas and Florida, taking measures to implement draconian anti-choice laws that ban abortions before most people even know they are pregnant.

Friend, we have no time to waste. I hope you'll join me by adding your name to our petition urging the Senate to pass the WHPA and send it to President Biden's desk _immediately_ before other state legislatures follow Texas' lead and move to pass unconstitutional, restrictive anti-choice laws.

**[Please, take a quick moment to add your name to our petition while our momentum is still strong, and _demand_ that the Senate immediately vote to pass the WHPA and protect the right to choose.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36624230/308670645/753621321?ms=em21_210928_whpa&refcode=em21_210928_whpa&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmE1ZGVhYy04YjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ufqq8HC9a8wzt8tm0WkurcaWmZrcE0cWg3Od4Fe4lBg=&emci=9220ca8e-7e20-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=9fa5deac-8b20-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=18516396)** [SIGN ON TO PROTECT ROE V. WADE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36624231/308670646/753621321?ms=em21_210928_whpa&refcode=em21_210928_whpa&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmE1ZGVhYy04YjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ufqq8HC9a8wzt8tm0WkurcaWmZrcE0cWg3Od4Fe4lBg=&emci=9220ca8e-7e20-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=9fa5deac-8b20-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=18516396) Thank you for taking the time to add your name, friend. \-- Conor Lamb

| | Derek, Virginia is facing our biggest test yet. Our end of quarter deadline is approaching, and Republicans will be watching our numbers closely. body:
I spent six years hunting down the terrorists who attacked the American instillation at Benghazi, cleaning up Hillary Clinton's mess. Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_s=5efd07b55b5544bd80eb1f94d4ee77b1&_t=TD-DIaPUBAjgAt6JWfwWxeUAN7ynFI7mYLLFc-JiBiiWURUSrdR7Gt9hjC5lIC3nnks31Kgh7EnbOFXkinKr3C6OGtd1AxcsSOJ20jXNc06ufq1HHSRVaY5DH_bzevGgVCEQC4OXnmpISnOSvPDZXf1zy3cvBetR0IkvIVcsUOw%3D) | [](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=5efd07b55b5544bd80eb1f94d4ee77b1&_e=DYPrEhOyLR2vQ_T4BbSt3WJnOPKqjCFhEZBFsQeb4vGdXKvbCC-qwkzbb7a8tKIinxZyBxTuS3yxAGCI3Tvp1G5ML9YAkwbW6_-w0IjpZ_FCuNVIw_BDGdDcQQBE3kdspd3bH6CNKyOKXX38oAd8yrK0CR-G5sPhapLyAkHtEsrUBpcBVG1jsB2m5WSTUhVn7nELP4I1YjPTZLel9RtkuhbjzhRk5YZG_b7d8Pe5a2oBhEG6ABr20ujrUgbHikgTxyEekhI2Ex2gk_9u5GKNIYrNwmQ4skjTq3RCfU_qWQWf4gxsoOg9peYD_v9NrYfvuS_Biq00ix8ImmS0bQI9KMYIBVQL5JENfywVwdrKzibc4nGaTi7JivDM7PP0uStkDz8F1y6qGZNlG75-glk5edib4uTxAL5y8LDF3Gz_WE8iSU-EO95EYpfm733EUHuTcrJQxtnTM9YJPS8k6AhYL_VllDnecZpQjWdtiX1VAyrJW0NBgLYuMESEgcDO5lKF)

Fellow Conservative,

My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox **I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today.**

I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.**I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own**.

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=5efd07b55b5544bd80eb1f94d4ee77b1&_e=DYPrEhOyLR2vQ_T4BbSt3WJnOPKqjCFhEZBFsQeb4vGdXKvbCC-qwkzbb7a8tKIinxZyBxTuS3yxAGCI3Tvp1G5ML9YAkwbW6_-w0IjpZ_FCuNVIw_BDGdDcQQBE3kdspd3bH6CNKyOKXX38oAd8yrK0CR-G5sPhapLyAkHtEsrUBpcBVG1jsB2m5WSTUhVn7nELP4I1YjPTZLel9RtkuhbjzhRk5YZG_b7d8Pe5a2oBhEG6ABr20ujrUgbHikgTxyEekhI2Ex2gk_9u5GKNITJxISolvJImULXNicYbGA9gfZWq5Bz-Mn_t4J-RdLiinIfHfP35U0PfwCp7Qz4R-8W4znv8NuvZDxsYQzDwhUvOcNWKCHo-xCvgUZCmJ7JwEmOTIOXDp51YfKRVOUHSyEzCApz7fFl8O6xqhprnlrO5Kq-1-qzQ4g18I3YHPSW1JoYtiyXaCIKww787WJiWoQ2NcTYeNJsfaFVlUITcbK_jww-YejjlshDvHRGvT7QA)

Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency **[I gave up my career in the intelligence service- along with my security clearance - to run for Congress](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=5efd07b55b5544bd80eb1f94d4ee77b1&_e=DYPrEhOyLR2vQ_T4BbSt3WJnOPKqjCFhEZBFsQeb4vGdXKvbCC-qwkzbb7a8tKIinxZyBxTuS3yxAGCI3Tvp1G5ML9YAkwbW6_-w0IjpZ_FCuNVIw_BDGdDcQQBE3kdspd3bH6CNKyOKXX38oAd8yrK0CR-G5sPhapLyAkHtEsrUBpcBVG1jsB2m5WSTUhVn7nELP4I1YjPTZLel9RtkuhbjzhRk5YZG_b7d8Pe5a2oBhEG6ABr20ujrUgbHikgTxyEekhI2Ex2gk_9u5GKNIV9uCHHigrUOkCO1AT2c9RDFx7mwBLQPzWhs_swFyKUxwChugv5sYitB_nwl-aHmOfFQZWSrspXl-1FyAsyICxBu6aSy3mQf_JEtWPu44pE9rB_FETf4L5BJJv1Kb-rQ9lHwB9NGtd-AaJ8IhnHFwGfkX35p2lWbxtoOOKaUdiYw-j9QCSy8tjFKGS1spbvdOONUlaKJOT96Y8wiMcfbRqwMrvisWiy00HgIXUwATYm-)**. I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price.

If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.**As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable** , and in a moment, [**I’m going to humbly ask for your financial assistance regarding my campaign.**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=5efd07b55b5544bd80eb1f94d4ee77b1&_e=DYPrEhOyLR2vQ_T4BbSt3WJnOPKqjCFhEZBFsQeb4vGdXKvbCC-qwkzbb7a8tKIinxZyBxTuS3yxAGCI3Tvp1G5ML9YAkwbW6_-w0IjpZ_FCuNVIw_BDGdDcQQBE3kdspd3bH6CNKyOKXX38oAd8yrK0CR-G5sPhapLyAkHtEsrUBpcBVG1jsB2m5WSTUhVn7nELP4I1YjPTZLel9RtkuhbjzhRk5YZG_b7d8Pe5a2oBhEG6ABr20ujrUgbHikgTxyEekhI2Ex2gk_9u5GKNIXDgQE6pBu4_mvcFgvFQTjnA9nOkVUVXgtCzg8aKD8ztsVLXBEj_SUK3vauACcB6nJ1GKJYrZfGHmcm32VLy_iYXkJkSKQTC_M0NhMC2hELgiDabvRLSAL7FWJ2KtNtR_cZU0yRt5BwAJ0_5XagKZziSZkmk2Cyu0QVvAby2pVQ4ubkT6MX8q4QYUbspW8W0V3eoOYJSaNrh-s7sX3xjiGOySLZ9InGSEbg7Wduk7oYo)

You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, _**who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades**_ - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel.

**This political assassination made my blood boil**. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. _**We have to fight for it**_.

| [**HELP ME FIGHT FOR _YOU_
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=5efd07b55b5544bd80eb1f94d4ee77b1&_e=DYPrEhOyLR2vQ_T4BbSt3WJnOPKqjCFhEZBFsQeb4vGdXKvbCC-qwkzbb7a8tKIinxZyBxTuS3yxAGCI3Tvp1G5ML9YAkwbW6_-w0IjpZ_FCuNVIw_BDGdDcQQBE3kdspd3bH6CNKyOKXX38oAd8yrK0CR-G5sPhapLyAkHtEsrUBpcBVG1jsB2m5WSTUhVn7nELP4I1YjPTZLel9RtkuhbjzhRk5YZG_b7d8Pe5a2oBhEG6ABr20ujrUgbHikgTxyEekhI2Ex2gk_9u5GKNITXXMy5qPi4R29GrqWNrP2engaL_4gWLnikjIEElswTlVOHdjSJaujLq45DRwGneXbdkL1eXY2kaBxLllDCxE35LaaxDS0Do8vECyA7DHHrxWcsc9Q_-RU2ZEZK3zz1Q3R5-lwxRLYAhgQjAD0VLv5nUW_akoJ9TxrYcsx4FPEpu-_ow_sebDqrQHEA5UJAmBlu5Uxm7L3D8NYhzjVPFU9PXtqCCjoM3cARG3g1OSJHt)

Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason **[I’m running for Congress, and today I’m asking if you’ll chip-in $5 or $10 to help me get my campaign off the ground.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=5efd07b55b5544bd80eb1f94d4ee77b1&_e=DYPrEhOyLR2vQ_T4BbSt3WJnOPKqjCFhEZBFsQeb4vGdXKvbCC-qwkzbb7a8tKIinxZyBxTuS3yxAGCI3Tvp1G5ML9YAkwbW6_-w0IjpZ_FCuNVIw_BDGdDcQQBE3kdspd3bH6CNKyOKXX38oAd8yrK0CR-G5sPhapLyAkHtEsrUBpcBVG1jsB2m5WSTUhVn7nELP4I1YjPTZLel9RtkuhbjzhRk5YZG_b7d8Pe5a2oBhEG6ABr20ujrUgbHikgTxyEekhI2Ex2gk_9u5GKNIefswUE-cM4eHSUqEczOCFkcaqXCYoMokPsP5JW6VhE6v8rFE3H1G9BMBdhArC1J6ucSnPKWK3VNwLBguc0hWJ6OZKnD9L5AF2BXsjF2X6jnwyM4lP2ZE9UL4ccDqnwaFjWkUQjXFGUv1fPKL2soPPKWQoB2ohY2gyXcsKiuNew67RYIiBULrHXsW2Q8_fC5-45nBo7sTvrZLKLofo1IlSyNCgVyM_2ZFLqRl2xIwsXU) **

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=5efd07b55b5544bd80eb1f94d4ee77b1&_e=DYPrEhOyLR2vQ_T4BbSt3WJnOPKqjCFhEZBFsQeb4vGdXKvbCC-qwkzbb7a8tKIinxZyBxTuS3yxAGCI3Tvp1G5ML9YAkwbW6_-w0IjpZ_FCuNVIw_BDGdDcQQBE3kdspd3bH6CNKyOKXX38oAd8yrK0CR-G5sPhapLyAkHtEsrUBpcBVG1jsB2m5WSTUhVn7nELP4I1YjPTZLel9RtkuhbjzhRk5YZG_b7d8Pe5a2oBhEG6ABr20ujrUgbHikgTxyEekhI2Ex2gk_9u5GKNIfmSmtEmLTUVqLuophFAlLzAsiPfbqvaO-v5CoVNx4aj7SZ4_BE19OW0DKTSXuZwESmLVBuxFC4Tf6_qV_tMgBz9A_ZkIHEtBjqM2HZ6zeL5RnjepcYBmHFdbKx_LfeTjTWEKQYNoF65kcuGLK4N-O9N3jUKN6_faNgNPDQgNHwPuWg8baJZBu7ek7fERcBsqwrGEQhwno1C39FHnXcSMEkdT41_aV3MWYfeoXErCBhj)
At the time of the Benghazi attacks, **Hillary Clinton** knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She **knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable**. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, **purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack** , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were pre-meditated by an al-Qaeda ally.

**[Hillary Clinton’s deceptions and lies will forever stand to serve as prime examples of everything that is wrong in Washington. I’m running to hold these bureaucrats accountable and I hope you’ll help put some wind in my sails by donating $5, $10 or even $50 today](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=5efd07b55b5544bd80eb1f94d4ee77b1&_e=DYPrEhOyLR2vQ_T4BbSt3WJnOPKqjCFhEZBFsQeb4vGdXKvbCC-qwkzbb7a8tKIinxZyBxTuS3yxAGCI3Tvp1G5ML9YAkwbW6_-w0IjpZ_FCuNVIw_BDGdDcQQBE3kdspd3bH6CNKyOKXX38oAd8yrK0CR-G5sPhapLyAkHtEsrUBpcBVG1jsB2m5WSTUhVn7nELP4I1YjPTZLel9RtkuhbjzhRk5YZG_b7d8Pe5a2oBhEG6ABr20ujrUgbHikgTxyEekhI2Ex2gk_9u5GKNIe-ATQYuTAX0teD8dxSIBapcuObWt9Hsv_M6X9csT_ydU4WexeE6RG0xutIUeAEfqkXl_a385YcbT4-WGENbR1zB74FB-b3Ir46VSTGSHFh5rzs9-95_mcSgZroBspfMcXNWO9XXEt9fvPLARMjtKWIAWWGaxUhuNg6mxd3tB3RAFrQfSMhxKEa3ja-QUtx-Ra7ro63ome77P6Tv94WNe95A_Gx6QXOsa8twundRCTEX)**.

In service John Castorani Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07 P.S. I have no money to invest in this campaign. What I do have is a lot of pride , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can, | Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia

clean_body: I’m committed to supporting Democrats up and down the NC ballot next year. | I know that you share my vision for North Carolina, Peter. I know you believe that women’s rights are human rights, that access to the ballot box cannot be denied, that our climate crisis won’t solve itself, and that quality health care has never been more critical. Our administration is hard at work on these issues and more — the issues that, despite what radical Republicans would prefer, we can’t afford to ignore. But there is so much more we could accomplish if we elect a legislature that is willing to join with us and deliver on behalf of North Carolinians. I’m committed to supporting Democrats up and down the NC ballot next year, but your grassroots support is essential if we’re going to succeed. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = Peter, North Carolinians deserve leaders at every level of our government who are concerned with more than trumpeting partisan talking points — leaders who are in office to serve, to deliver, and to advance the priorities of the people. We just haven’t seen an interest to do any of that from far too many of North Carolina’s GOP politicians. = Thanks, Roy = | = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. clean_body: Our FIRST deadline of the entire campaign. | Friend, I’m truly honored by the outpouring of support we’ve received from grassroots conservatives like you ever since we launched our campaign for governor. Which is why it pains me to have to tell you that, as things stand, we’re $29,645 behind on our goal with our FIRST fundraising deadline of the campaign nearly here. I’m counting on your sustained support at this pivotal moment to ensure we meet our first deadline to TAKE THE LEAD in this TOSS-UP race. We’ve seen time and again just how far national Democrats are willing to go to hold onto to such a crucial battleground state like Wisconsin. In fact, Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer were just in Wisconsin this summer helping state Democrats fill Tony Evers’ warchest. With our race already a 50-50 toss-up, we can’t waste a single moment in marshaling the resources to fight back -- especially with our FIRST deadline just hours away. We all know the failure that has marked Tony Evers’ term as governor... Jobs lost, schools closed, our police disrespected, our cities left burning, and our elections left vulnerable. But like every other radical liberal governor across the country, Tony Evers only cares about one person -- himself. The stakes are simply too high, Friend. We can’t fall short at this critical deadline. We can’t allow Evers to think he has the momentum right out of the gate. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

clean_body: We have catching up to do = Hi Peter, We’re going to be honest -- we are still behind on our goal of raising $35,000 from online donors before the FEC deadline in a couple of days. = It’s key that we reach this goal because, right now, our opponent has over $900,000 in the bank. Hitting our goal and reporting strong numbers on our FEC report will show that we are on pace to close the lead our opponent currently has. = | = In a district this competitive, reporting that we are on track to close the fundraising gap early will show we have what it takes to compete. Once our fundraising numbers are revealed to the public, our opponents will be sure to scour every inch of our report to see what we are made of. We need to show that we aren’t backing down and are ready to run a winning campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you for your support, Team Mathis HQ Liz Mathis is a lifelong Iowan, State Senator, and former local news reporter running to represent Iowa's 1st Congressional District in Congress. = | = | Liz Mathis is running to represent Iowa's 1st Congressional District. name: Drew Thompson
subject: Want to meet Governor Kristi Noem?
body:
RSVP Closes in 24 Hours [](https://) Peter, We are only 1 day away from our biggest event of the fall! In just over 24 hours, South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem will join Jane Timken for our "Rally for Ohio"! Nothing is more important in this race than the people of the great state of Ohio. While others spend their days at out of state fundraisers and their evenings on cable talk shows, we will be focusing on you. Governor Noem understands how important it is to have an **authentic,** America First warrior representing us in the U.S. Senate, which is why she is traveling so far to advocate for Jane Timken. We are closing registration at 12:00PM tomorrow. Do not forget to RSVP below. **Rally for Ohio featuring Governor Kristi Noem** Date: Wednesday, 9/29 Time: 3:00PM Location: 921 Chatham Ln. Columbus OH 43221 [RSVP](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=e639139e93eb4999a6be0e12443af98b&_e=NZVfoM-4EFndWmv72EmFWzNR9H_D1YJz2O6lxCLwPzHUxB5ywXaHGPV8xzEeu_Mch89_wHHQyhpLsYR0aawA5owgHPf9Xbf5Hkq7TsQI3L-XQ9ETFO0AJnFrLzmEL6h3-E732MAgF5p-et4jS8fUpCZf_4OYE48HZn_sdhdymZcCKJ46FsiyBiceKipqY3aNKq7ixZ2c-jPUMIH_KGrL_rvn4AXAHVAqh64dlCMMGcDANQS_Lrkp0sIvH7dfmJC1uAwVlDgvWW6lNet-ijq8mFxf0gfG2ZxaRzzKI3m7_jenCyAhw3YfnsoTPOM1mVac_gDh2lrLGgqnKN1bV_W78dmRK11QsDkPE6tvwDHDmXU%3D) See you there! -Jane Timken for Ohio

subject: I’m listening. Here’s what Wisconsinites are saying.

body:
I hosted a rally in Calumet County recently with Congressman Jim Jordan. We met with hundreds of conservative Wisconsinites... [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=25691807993e47ec841c578e683e39a8&_e=bheI7SZPVDyVmQueCDRalHQAOvAydlEb-dyUYqZH0iX_TubNUb5TZ8Iz3leROqEtdL9HrPBZG-TKgWSjGkHcJcWxES5Uxe9U0EZkfyfQNOz4dr9zRdEZShc3WSUkcrKXMPpCbyAtOqQAevJOCAJ9L5jmEgLSp5_0rqmJPMscipXGkmkYPL1ujQaxxDYIBGPIBEqCQlamkenox9dpysphaghSqqh7J5h_O_D6AepUeGGe6Yv0Bfhfx1Q4l77fGVNtSGU12ttZo9zcJ1wdbaJViMSH0HFLKM9AXYYZF3Sf9f3vn5ou047q7PRBgscsPcVSNYQ-VYo65T1Jp58ElxQApW2reeQ_O3wL8X1P2NY_sMQ9vXd63jmoG1nMBrfb9qOl1awM8ArTyhD6nnhySZkpSVmh4pkCX02yTZVx9jQNm6ftgDXhhzy4L_dza5EDtxaw3Fxe-kCyY1hG1OIeKQgh3Vo2p1I7nDbclqXFbxPSRzo%3D) Friend, Last week, I hosted a rally in Calumet County with Congressman Jim Jordan. name: Ryan Busse
subject: $3 to hold the gun lobby accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I am a gun owner and former executive in the firearms industry.
#

I am a gun owner and former executive in the firearms industry.
Over the years I spent selling guns, I grew to understand how decency can be replaced by the pressures for quarterly profits. Eventually nothing can stand in the way of the next gun sale. And I saw firsthand how easily well-meaning gun-owners can be radicalized by bad-faith actors like the NRA.
That’s why I’ve joined Giffords to fight for responsible policies and challenge a polarizing industry that trades common sense for dangerous extremism.
We must address the sources of domestic terrorism and protect responsible gun ownership through policy reform. But in order to do so, we must hold the firearms industry, the NRA, and the NSSF accountable.
[**So I am personally asking: will you chip in $3 before the September 30th fundraising deadline to support our mission to make our communities safer? Make a contribution here:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210928-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1032_3935704_hKYO74&akid=1032%2E3935704%2EhKYO74)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210928-1-15&t=20&refcode2=1032_3935704_hKYO74&akid=1032%2E3935704%2EhKYO74)**

clean_body: I am a gun owner and former executive in the firearms industry. I am a gun owner and former executive in the firearms industry. Over the years I spent selling guns, I grew to understand how decency can be replaced by the pressures for quarterly profits. Eventually nothing can stand in the way of the next gun sale. And I saw firsthand how easily well-meaning gun-owners can be radicalized by bad-faith actors like the NRA. That’s why I’ve joined Giffords to fight for responsible policies and challenge a polarizing industry that trades common sense for dangerous extremism. We must address the sources of domestic terrorism and protect responsible gun ownership through policy reform. But in order to do so, we must hold the firearms industry, the NRA, and the NSSF accountable. body:
Peter,
Last week, my team emailed you about our upcoming fundraising deadline. We hoped their request would help us reach our goal, but now, just two days out, we are still coming up short.
So today I'm coming to you with a personal request: [**_Will you please chip in $5 or more before Thursday 's critical deadline?_** ](https://act.myngp.com/el/5iA9fSJpqx87digMP2A0_sG_oKsFLUs5tSJb-01xjVE=/UFd3wZX5j7VJkL7HNHTL9HK8B2hQ1voCagcPX2Yo47g=?am=50.00&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
Democrats are fighting hard to protect our razor-thin majority in the House. Due to redistricting, gerrymandering, and voter suppression tactics, we are in real danger of losing Democratic seats next year. There is simply too much at stake - women's rights, immigration reform, addressing the climate crisis -- to sit this one out. Every single seat matters and your contribution will help keep our majority strong.
We have a lot on the line and could use your help now more than ever. Thank you for joining us and [**_chipping in here today_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5iA9fSJpqx87digMP2A0_sG_oKsFLUs5tSJb-01xjVE=/UFd3wZX5j7VJkL7HNHTL9HK8B2hQ1voCagcPX2Yo47g=?am=50.00&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

name: Jeff King
subject: Taliban to Christians: "We’re coming for you”
body:
Dear Peter, ** ** **Christians in Afghanistan are getting calls from the Taliban saying "We're coming for you."** ** ** **They are knocking on doors looking for those who don 't come to mosque to find the Christians. ** ** ** Afghanistan was already a very dangerous place for Christians but the Taliban takeover has made the situation critical for the incredibly brave believers that live there. You see, almost all Christians in Afghanistan are converts from Islam, making them apostates under according to Islam and Mohammed. That means they are under a death sentence. So most of them live out their Christianity "underground" but some of them have been open about their faith. These are the most vulnerable. And while their fate seems hopeless, we are committed to save every brave Christian we can from being killed at the hands of the Taliban. This is the work we do. To rescue, to bandage, and to build the persecuted Church. **[Which is why I am asking you for a $30 gift that will help us serve these Christians in Afghanistan and other places that are under severe threat.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58428959:JQqXVE25N:m:1:3253819041:F7A145431C4824C6B667B18C766A5079:r)** Let me step back and introduce myself. My name is Jeff King, and I'm president of International Christian Concern. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58428960:JQqXVE25N:m:1:3253819041:F7A145431C4824C6B667B18C766A5079:r) Every year, 200 million Christians face persecution - but the press is silent about them. Therefore, many pastors and lay people don't even know that there is a war being waged on the church worldwide. ICC is like no other group helping persecuted Christians today. We go where no one else can or will go, where missionaries know they will be murdered. We work underground with indigenous Christians who have already put their lives on the altar knowing they may be killed for what they do. When a pastor is murdered, we rescue his family, getting them to a safe place with food and shelter and the ability to provide for themselves for the long term. When a church is attacked, we help to get it back up and functioning. We work in the most dangerous places in the world including Afghanistan, Nigeria's Middle Belt, and even North Korea. _Months before the American withdrawal from Afghanistan, we were rescuing Christians behind the scenes. We knew what was coming and we removed some of the most vulnerable Christians._ _ _ _Since the fall of Kabul, our work goes on._ _ _ _For those who escape we will be there. For those who stay, we will help them hide and also to spread the faith for those know they have the message of life for the dead and dying around them._ _ _ **But the total cost for rescue and ongoing care for these survivors in Afghanistan alone will be well over $1 million, and we 're going to need all the help we can get.** ** ** **[So please, if you are able, donate $30 today to help us provide hope for persecuted Christians around the world.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58428959:JQqXVE25N:m:1:3253819041:F7A145431C4824C6B667B18C766A5079:r)** Persecution is a complex problem that can't be solved with just a handout, so we go deeper. Most organizations "parachute in" during a crisis. They throw money around and then leave when the headlines dry up. That's not ICC. We stick with persecution victims and work with them for the long term. We don't simply offer a bandage to "the wound" of persecution. We seek to break the cycle of persecution entirely. **[ Will you donate just $30 today to provide us with the resources we desperately need to bandage the survivors of persecution or to build the church in the toughest places in the world?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58428959:JQqXVE25N:m:1:3253819041:F7A145431C4824C6B667B18C766A5079:r)** ** ** In Afghanistan, $1000 allows us to care for a a Christian family rescued from being murdered by the Taliban, but we help victims of persecution all over the world.
* In Nigeria, Islamists steal the land of farmers at gunpoint. For only $30 we can get that farmer back to farming and feeding his family again.
* In India, $100 allows us to equip a church planter with a new bicycle that will double or triple the number of churches he can plant.
* In North Korea, $200 allows us to send multiple gospel messages in via radio.

I know you can't walk into a village in India to supply a church planter with a new bicycle or 100 Bibles. You can't rescue a pastor in Afghanistan about to be murdered by the Taliban or stream the gospel into North Korea. But working together, you and I can do all this and more! **[Your donation of $30 or more today could literally save the life of a Christian in Afghanistan or another persecuted area.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58428961:JQqXVE25N:m:1:3253819041:F7A145431C4824C6B667B18C766A5079:r)** And you can't even imagine how grateful these survivors are to be touched by the family of God across the ocean after losing everything. They see the Father in action, working through you, and rescuing them against all odds when they are at their lowest. Watching our donors care for their brothers and sisters, I am continually reminded of Matthew 25:40: "Truly I tell you, whatever you did for one of the least of these brothers and sisters of mine, you did for me." Thank you in advance for your support and God Bless, Jeff King President, International Christian Concern P.S. [**Christians in Afghanistan are facing extreme danger. Those in hiding in the country or out need emergency life support. Please partner with me today as we Build and Bandage the church in the most dangerous places in the world.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58428962:JQqXVE25N:m:1:3253819041:F7A145431C4824C6B667B18C766A5079:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58428960:JQqXVE25N:m:1:3253819041:F7A145431C4824C6B667B18C766A5079:r) | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58428963:JQqXVE25N:m:1:3253819041:F7A145431C4824C6B667B18C766A5079:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58428964:JQqXVE25N:m:1:3253819041:F7A145431C4824C6B667B18C766A5079:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58428965:JQqXVE25N:m:1:3253819041:F7A145431C4824C6B667B18C766A5079:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58428966:JQqXVE25N:m:1:3253819041:F7A145431C4824C6B667B18C766A5079:r)

Since Republicans launched over 400 voter suppression bills across the country to undermine our right to vote, Presidents Biden AND Obama have BOTH called on us to fight back. They're asking every last Democrat to help us STOP these Republican schemes and PROTECT our critical Democratic House Majority. So we're calling for 13,750 more gifts before our End of Quarter Deadline in just 48 hours to answer their calls, DEFEAT House Republicans, and make Joe and Barack proud. Will you step up with $3 to defend our House Majority? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/GRD0BZ3py~)**

_We need to move quickly._

**FIRST:**

After Republicans rushed over 400 voter suppression bills across the country to suppress the vote, President Biden delivered an **URGENT** call to action:

[](https://links.e.dccc.)

**THEN: **

President Obama **BROKE** his silence and joined him in the fight:

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/~j-)

**We 're calling for 13,750 more gifts before our End of Quarter Deadline in just 48 hours to answer Joe and Barack's calls and protect our House Majority.**

When two of our most beloved Democrats ask for our help --_we wouldn 't dare let them down._

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: We’re hoping to put organizers all across the Commonwealth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
You know the drill: We’re registering voters, removing barriers between voters and the ballot, and getting out the vote.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210928-2797-header&t=1&akid=2797%2E434096%2EaVuhXl)
Hey Peter — happy National Voter Registration day! As a campaign of organizers, we can definitely say: This holiday means a lot to us.
Here at Fetterman HQ, **we’re working on staffing up our organizing team so that we can reliably reach voters in every single one of Pennsylvania’s 67 counties.** You know the drill: We’re registering voters, removing barriers between voters and the ballot, and getting out the vote. **You might even see a member of our team at your door, Peter!**
[**Voter registration takes a lot of heart, Peter, and a lot of materials. That’s why we’re asking you to celebrate National Voter Registration Day with us by making your first-ever $5 donation to help us scale up our team.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30844?refcode=em20210928-2797&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2797%2E434096%2EaVuhXl)
Running a statewide campaign is incredibly expensive. **There are *tons* of important campaign priorities that all require a lot of resources — priorities like the following:**
* 🇺🇸 Launching our statewide organizing program
* 🏃 Hiring on-the-ground organizing staffers to engage with volunteers
* 📋 ✏️ Buying materials to staff offices and organizers
* 💻 Running digital ads on platforms like Facebook and Instagram
* 📷 Planning virtual and in-person events where John can meet voters
* And a _loooooot_ more... we'll spare you the entire list

As you heard from our Deputy Campaign Manager Eric yesterday, there are thousands of voters to register across our Commonwealth, and we’ve only got months to reach as many of them as possible.**[Peter, will you donate $5 to John's campaign today before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline on Thursday? We're really hoping to see an uptick in donations, especially from Cresco, so we hope you'll chip in if you can swing it.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30844?refcode=em20210928-2797&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2797%2E434096%2EaVuhXl)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30844?refcode=em20210928-2797&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2797%2E434096%2EaVuhXl)**
Thank you again, 🙏
— Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210928-2797-footer&t=23&refcode2=2797_434096_aVuhXl&akid=2797%2E434096%2EaVuhXl)**

clean_body: You know the drill: We’re registering voters, removing barriers between voters and the ballot, and getting out the vote. Hey Peter — happy National Voter Registration day! As a campaign of organizers, we can definitely say: This holiday means a lot to us. Here at Fetterman HQ, we’re working on staffing up our organizing team so that we can reliably reach voters in every single one of Pennsylvania’s 67 counties. You know the drill: We’re registering voters, removing barriers between voters and the ballot, and getting out the vote. You might even see a member of our team at your door, Peter! Running a statewide campaign is incredibly expensive. There are tons of important campaign priorities that all require a lot of resources — priorities like the following: 🇺🇸 Launching our statewide organizing program 🏃 Hiring on-the-ground organizing staffers to engage with volunteers 📋 ✏️ Buying materials to staff offices and organizers 💻 Running digital ads on platforms like Facebook and Instagram 📷 Planning virtual and in-person events where John can meet voters And a loooooot more... we'll spare you the entire list As you heard from our Deputy Campaign Manager Eric yesterday, there are thousands of voters to register across our Commonwealth, and we’ve only got months to reach as many of them as possible. Thank you again, 🙏 — Team Fetterman | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Biden’s unconstitutional vaccine mandate
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/bbbc1364d21534b1/93e1d9bde365eb1ec3d6b838967d376c/34143) Peter, As one of the strongest advocates for small businesses in Congress, I’m proud to support the Job Creators Network’s lawsuit against the Biden Administration’s federal vaccine mandate. **President Biden’s unconstitutional mandate is already causing hardship on millions of hardworking Americans facing the terrible decision to receive a vaccine they do not want or lose their livelihoods.** The federal government has no right to put this mandate on the shoulders of small businesses and their employees, which I intend to prove in court in partnership with the Job Creators Network. Biden’s mandate is an undue burden on businesses, especially small businesses, at a time when job creation is essential. **_Businesses are having a hard enough time hiring as it is, and we should be empowering job creators to hire new staff and grow their businesses._** I hope you will stand by my side as I continue to fight for our small business owners and employees.

Sincerely,

Kevin Hern [**Donate Now >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/bbbc1364d21534b1/0ef06a6adb881c6ec3d6b838967d376c/34143) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/bbbc1364d21534b1/0714a3e4ca05daa5c3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/bbbc1364d21534b1/9611dd5083223228c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

body:
Disgraced General Mark Milley needs to be held accountable. Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/7f2a104e645c23e3/bcd1b359f1ec9e3fc3d6b838967d376c/35903) Peter,
President Biden’s minions have been in the news a lot lately. Recently, it’s been General Mark Milley in hot water, _who compromised the security of our nation at its highest levels_. According to reports, Gen. Milley, Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, went over President Trump’s head when it comes to international relations with China. He went rogue and engaged in unauthorized conversations with China about our nuclear strike capabilities. [**HOLD MILLEY ACCOUNTABLE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/7f2a104e645c23e3/5f9a8fc692ddfe8bc3d6b838967d376c/35903) If this isn’t a coup, I don’t know what is. **And if these allegations are true, then General Milley needs to be FIRED immediately, and court martialed for TREASON against the United States of America**. Unfortunately, President Biden is more focused on throwing President Trump under the bus for his own failures.
* He blamed President Trump for his own botched withdrawal from Afghanistan, despite the intelligence community warning him not to.

* He blamed President Trump for the vaccine rollout, despite Operation Warp Speed being a MAJOR success in delivering a vaccine to Americans quicker than any other in history.

* And he’s blamed President Trump for our nation’s slow economic recovery, despite catering to socialists who would rather see Americans receive a government check every week as opposed to going back to work.

[**TAKE CONTROL OF OUR COUNTRY: DONATE NOW!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/7f2a104e645c23e3/97121caf85192c28c3d6b838967d376c/35903) _**I need your help, and there isn’t a moment to waste**_. If we don’t keep this North Carolina U.S. Senate seat red, the radical left will continue to tear our country to pieces. [_**Please, chip in right now to prevent a “Blue Wave” from sweeping across our country**_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/7f2a104e645c23e3/f2441fe435b230f0c3d6b838967d376c/35903). We cannot afford another 2 years of a Democrat-controlled Senate.
For America,
Mark Walker | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/7f2a104e645c23e3/289f613ae347b575c3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/7f2a104e645c23e3/cfd58285d558bacfc3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/7f2a104e645c23e3/0f836fbd786c161ec3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/7f2a104e645c23e3/4b1c3c9925681eaec3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/7f2a104e645c23e3/9e42b6d514b4cb89c3d6b838967d376c/35903)

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Two big problems
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Now usually, we wouldn’t be so worried about this but we are facing two big problems.
#

Friends — This is NOT the news we were hoping to share.
There are just **3 days** to go until our big September FEC fundraising deadline and we still have some work to do to reach our 50,000 contribution goal.
When Gabby emailed, we thought we’d get there. When Tammy Duckworth emailed, we thought we’d get there. When Cory Booker emailed, we thought we’d get there.
But we’re still short.
Now usually, we wouldn’t be so worried about this but we are facing two big problems. First, dark money groups have already spent millions against us. And second, now that CNN has named us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022, spending will only increase.
So we really can’t afford to fall short. Not before this official FEC deadline.
[**So here’s the plan: Can you send a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign today? We’ll put your contribution right to work in our efforts to hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?refcode=em210928-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1418_6688874_0j-0Kd&akid=1418%2E6688874%2E0j-0Kd)

name: West Virginia Democratic Party
subject: National Voter Registration Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
Fellow Democrat,
So much is at stake in the upcoming elections — from defeating the pandemic once and for all to rebuilding the economy back better to protecting the right to vote to making sure West Virginians are working and thriving.

That’s why Democrats are working nonstop to register voters today — **National Voter Registration Day** — and every day.

National Voter Registration Day is a great opportunity to connect with friends and family, make sure they’re registered to vote, and do everything we can to make sure Democrats win in the upcoming elections in 2022, and beyond.
Visit [IWillVote.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36630818/308687097/327637188?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2YyYzFlNi05NjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y3LpbK_YSPLK4EKdg2nyqWQNXPPPXGipZ8TGJosZDso=&emci=abcf17c3-9020-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=87f2c1e6-9620-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=5094937) — Democrats’ voter participation website — to easily register to vote, check to see if you’re registered, and learn important information about the voting process here in West Virginia.
Text your friends and family the link to be sure they are registered to vote.
Together we can elect Democrats in West Virginia up and down the ballot to fight for the needs of all West Virginians.
Sincerely,
Team WVDP

Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www.wvdems.org). This communication is not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Public employees may disregard. Contributions are not tax-deductible.
West Virginia Democratic Party
PO Box 11926
Charleston , WV 25339
United States

name: Alex Padilla for California
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Republicans are going to do and spend whatever they can to try to keep Alex out of the Senate, and we need to be laying the groundwork now to fight back.
#

**24,819,858.**
That’s the number of eligible voters in California, according to an August 30, 2021 report from the California Secretary of State’s office.
**$10.**
That’s the donation we’re asking from you — before our FEC deadline in just a few days — to help ensure we have the resources to reach _every single one of them._
Because the truth is, now that we’ve beaten back the Recall here in California, the same anti-mask, anti-vax, anti-immigrant, far-right forces that tried to replace Governor Newsom are going to be coming after Alex.
Republicans are going to do and spend whatever they can to try to keep Alex out of the Senate, and we need to be laying the groundwork now to fight back.
**So with just a few days to go until our official deadline, we are asking:**
[**Can you please make your first $10 donation to Alex Padilla’s campaign before our FEC deadline hits Thursday at midnight? We would not ask if it were not so important to put up a big number and demonstrate that we’re ready to send Alex Padilla back to the U.S. Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-sep21?refcode=em210928-1-15&t=1&refcode2=356_159979_R8F3Df&akid=356%2E159979%2ER8F3Df)
**[DONATE $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-sep21?refcode=em210928-1-15&t=2&refcode2=356_159979_R8F3Df&akid=356%2E159979%2ER8F3Df)**
Our fight to reform the immigration system, tackle climate change by passing a Green New Deal, and ensure access to quality and affordable health care by passing Medicare for All means there are a lot of powerful interests who want to stop us.
But that’s okay because this team is ready to put in the work during the tough fights ahead.
Thank you for your support!
\- Team Padilla
**[DONATE $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-sep21?refcode=em210928-1-15&t=3&refcode2=356_159979_R8F3Df&akid=356%2E159979%2ER8F3Df)**

While we don't know exactly what the final map will look like yet, one thing is clear: we're going to have new voters to reach with Kim's message. Peter,

The redistricting process is in full swing here in Washington State, as the first draft Congressional District maps were released today. While we don't know exactly what the final map will look like yet, one thing is clear: **we're going to have new voters to reach with Kim's message.**

We always knew we had a tough fight ahead of us to protect this seat. Kim was the first Democrat ever elected to serve the district and national Republicans named her a top target. With new maps on the horizon and new voters to reach, we have an even tougher road ahead of us.

No matter how our district changes, we need to start preparing right now to be ready to reach as many new voters as possible once the maps are finalized.

| | Let’s talk about Colorado Congresswoman Lauren Boebert, Peter —

**[I’m running for Congress to serve hardworking Colorado families and hold corrupt politicians like Lauren Boebert accountable. Donate $8 to my campaign today >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36632950/308691079/-95194168?refcode=em_YC_FR_lbRS_092821_op_l1&amount=8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTIyOWZjOC05ODIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GMjDMqQjpIcBBEBtBQ4Cjh1OVVbHlQEsdnF-I40MLzM=)**

**FIRST:** In 2020, Lauren Boebert ran for Congress in Colorado on a pro-Trump, pro-Big Oil & Big Gas, and QAnon-inspired platform. And she won.

**THEN:** She spread baseless conspiracy theories about COVID-19 and the vaccine, and repeatedly devended Trump’s Big Lie about the results of the 2020 election.

**NOW:** She’s been involved in two corruption scandals. First, for venmoing herself campaign money for personal use. Then, for failing to disclose her husband’s MILLION DOLLAR income in the Big Oil and Big Gas industry — while she supported bills that made him richer.

This isn’t just sketchy, Peter — it’s illegal.

**Colorado families deserve better than a self-serving conspiracy theorist.**

I’m not running for Congress for money and power. To be honest, I would be happy to remain a pediatrician in Adams County. _But I know I can be doing more for my community._

I’m running for Congress to hold dangerous conspiracy theorists like Boebert accountable, and I can’t do it without your help. clean_body: I’m ready to hold corrupt politicians like Boebert accountable. | | Let’s talk about Colorado Congresswoman Lauren Boebert, Peter — = FIRST: In 2020, Lauren Boebert ran for Congress in Colorado on a pro-Trump, pro-Big Oil & Big Gas, and QAnon-inspired platform. And she won. THEN: She spread baseless conspiracy theories about COVID-19 and the vaccine, and repeatedly devended Trump’s Big Lie about the results of the 2020 election. NOW: She’s been involved in two corruption scandals. First, for venmoing herself campaign money for personal use. Then, for failing to disclose her husband’s MILLION DOLLAR income in the Big Oil and Big Gas industry — while she supported bills that made him richer. This isn’t just sketchy, Peter — it’s illegal. Colorado families deserve better than a self-serving conspiracy theorist. I’m not running for Congress for money and power. To be honest, I would be happy to remain a pediatrician in Adams County. But I know I can be doing more for my community. I’m running for Congress to hold dangerous conspiracy theorists like Boebert accountable, and I can’t do it without your help. Every single donation gets me one step closer to winning. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | | = ---|---|--- = | | = = | | = Thank you, Dr. Yadira Caraveo | Dr. Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. She’s running to represent Colorado’s new Congressional district in Congress and to be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress. In the state legislature, Dr. Caraveo has a strong record for delivering real results for Colorado families — and she has proven she isn’t afraid to go toe-to-toe with special interests. She’s ready to take on tough fights in Congress. But she can’t do it alone. = | = = Learn more at: Follow along: | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS PO Box 953, Eastlake, CO 80614 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| | | Dear Peter,

My radical Communist Democrat "colleagues," including Reps. Tlaib and Omar, quietly passed a resolution on the eve of the 20th anniversary of 9/11.

Was it to honor the first responders and heroes of that tragic day?

Was it to remember those who died a grizzly death at the hands of radical Islamic terrorists?

Was it to help Americans who still suffer from those deadly attacks?

_**No**_.

Rather, it was to condemn YOU for bigotry and "hate" towards Arab-Americans in the wake of 9/11:

[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=913f0dece7&e=645b3b1338)

I've seen a lot of despicable behavior from the Communist Democrats during my time in Washington.

_This is close to the top of the list, and I'm in urgent need of your support to help me fight back_.

[**Rush in your donations to my reelection campaign so I can continue putting America First in Washington**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=ec70a109b0&e=645b3b1338).

These Communist ghouls hate average, working class Americans like you.

_There's no other way to say it_.

That's why they spit in your faces every chance they get -- including with this bogus resolution passed just before the 20th anniversary of the most tragic day in modern American history.

They think America is a fundamentally flawed, racist country.

I think America is the greatest, most equitable nation ever conceived by man.

They are entitled to their opinions, Fellow Patriot, but I can tell you this: there are more and more radical Communist Democrats like them being elected to office each election cycle.

We need brave warriors to push back against these anti-American sentiments in Washington.

I've been doing that for years, and even President Trump called me a "warrior" for the America First cause.

[**So help me fight the radical Communist left with a generous contribution to my election campaign today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=74c5dae466&e=645b3b1338).

Time is of the essence.

If we don't wage all-out war against these Commies now, they'll gain even more ground, and their bleak vision for America will be realized.

[**Rush your generous contribution in today, and let's stop them in their tracks**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=ec0264c709&e=645b3b1338).

clean_body: You won't believe this. | | | | | | | | | | Dear Peter, My radical Communist Democrat "colleagues," including Reps. Tlaib and Omar, quietly passed a resolution on the eve of the 20th anniversary of 9/11. Was it to honor the first responders and heroes of that tragic day? Was it to remember those who died a grizzly death at the hands of radical Islamic terrorists? Was it to help Americans who still suffer from those deadly attacks? No. Rather, it was to condemn YOU for bigotry and "hate" towards Arab-Americans in the wake of 9/11: I've seen a lot of despicable behavior from the Communist Democrats during my time in Washington. This is close to the top of the list, and I'm in urgent need of your support to help me fight back. . These Communist ghouls hate average, working class Americans like you. There's no other way to say it. That's why they spit in your faces every chance they get -- including with this bogus resolution passed just before the 20th anniversary of the most tragic day in modern American history. They think America is a fundamentally flawed, racist country. I think America is the greatest, most equitable nation ever conceived by man. They are entitled to their opinions, Fellow Patriot, but I can tell you this: there are more and more radical Communist Democrats like them being elected to office each election cycle. We need brave warriors to push back against these anti-American sentiments in Washington. I've been doing that for years, and even President Trump called me a "warrior" for the America First cause. . Time is of the essence. If we don't wage all-out war against these Commies now, they'll gain even more ground, and their bleak vision for America will be realized. . Thank you in advance for helping me combat the Communist Democrats' hatred for America. | For America, Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District P.S. The radical far-left Democrats passed a resolution condemning Americans for anti-Arab "hate" on the eve of 9/11. name: Deandrea Newsome
subject: The final two days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
On behalf of Erica and our entire campaign team, thank you so much!
#
It's Deandrea, Campaign Chair for Erica Smith for U.S. Senate. With just **TWO days to go until our public FEC fundraising deadline** on Thursday, our finance team wanted me to reach out to you directly.
We’re racing to reach our $100,000 online fundraising goal before September ends to **send a LOUD message to our opponents, political pundits, and the status quo that Erica has what it takes to compete in this crowded, competitive race.**
**According to our data, you’ve never chipped in to Erica’s campaign to fight for us in the U.S. Senate** — but there’s never been a better opportunity to chip in than right now, with just 2 days left before our crucial deadline.
[**Can you make your first $5 donation to help us close our $3,436 gap by Thursday’s FEC deadline? Your donation will help build this historic, progressive movement to flip North Carolina blue and expand Democrats’ narrow majority in the U.S. Senate.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/18074?refcode=em20210928-502&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=502%2E3698%2EnEed2Z)
**_Supporter Record #297: Erica Smith for U.S. Senate_** **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **2021 Donor:** No — not yet! **2021 Total:** $0.00 **Suggested Donation: $5** **[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/18074?refcode=em20210928-502&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=502%2E3698%2EnEed2Z)**
---
I’ll be real with you: When we say we need your grassroots support, we really mean it.
Erica doesn’t take a penny from corporate PACs or the fossil fuel industry. She doesn’t have a Rolodex full of wealthy, well-connected donors. **And according to the Center for Responsive Politics, Black women candidates raise on average about HALF of what white candidates raise.**
That’s why your $5 donation today is SO powerful. Not only will it help us close our $3,436 fundraising gap. **It will give Erica a fighting chance** at uniting all North Carolinians as the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate.
[**If you’re in a place to do so, donate $5 today to help us reach our fundraising goal by the FEC deadline at 11:59 PM ET on Thursday. Every dollar makes a big difference.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/18074?refcode=em20210928-502&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=502%2E3698%2EnEed2Z)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/18074?refcode=em20210928-502&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=502%2E3698%2EnEed2Z)**
On behalf of Erica and our entire campaign team, thank you so much! We’ll keep you updated as we fight hard to reach this important goal.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/18074?refcode=em20210928-other-502&t=23&akid=502%2E3698%2EnEed2Z)
Deandrea Newsome
Campaign Chair
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210928-502-footer&t=24&refcode2=502_3698_nEed2Z&akid=502%2E3698%2EnEed2Z)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=25&akid=502%2E3698%2EnEed2Z)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=502%2E3698%2EnEed2Z)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: A dangerous ideology
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young
_Sponsored message_
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaf8qe7ln10dt8ta1oqm8egvarqeodf1o9178tq8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c3hm8p31c9h2bs)
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg08s7sajbds6knmq5jbcm6groidqb0kedlm4t3g_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c3hm8p31c9h2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1g61a5bjoivnorq505oucphheocqlvl6gbmhmu0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c3hm8p31c9h2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Derek Marshall
subject: Our most important deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,

This has been an incredibly busy week for our campaign. I’ve spent time going all around the district to meet with local Democratic clubs. And every minute not spent with constituents has been laser focused on fundraising before our major deadline Thursday. **[As you probably know, this is our most important deadline to date, and it’s crucial that we demonstrate our strength as a campaign. Can you rush a donation right now to support?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36634405/308695671/-2143168036?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGZkYjVmNy05YzIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WrGYLIlJOU0iAmT-9auCibD0FiB9xH_0Whs7bGVFWgc=)**

Why is this deadline so important? Because in three days we have to report our fundraising numbers from the last three months to the Federal Election Commission. Once those numbers are published, **everyone from press to pundits to endorsing organizations will look at our fundraising numbers as a way to assess our viability as a campaign. **
**We set an ambitious goal for the end of the quarter, and we’re less than $10,000 away from hitting it.** With your support, we can show how much momentum we have and finish strong. It’s absolutely crucial that we can prove that we’re in this race to win, finish the work that previous Democrats started, and finally flip this district blue.

**But we can’t do it alone.[This week, we’ve received hundreds of donations from folks all around the country who are chipping in because they want to make history with us. Will you join them and donate today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36634407/308695674/-2143168036?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGZkYjVmNy05YzIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WrGYLIlJOU0iAmT-9auCibD0FiB9xH_0Whs7bGVFWgc=)**

If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to donate, this is it. **Once again, this is our most important fundraising deadline to date, and every single dollar counts.** [**I hope you’ll choose to invest in this campaign and help take us all the way to victory.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36634409/308695677/-2143168036?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGZkYjVmNy05YzIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WrGYLIlJOU0iAmT-9auCibD0FiB9xH_0Whs7bGVFWgc=)
In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
