name: ICYMI News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z54eq30s6j04i3vh5v5e6gj2cstbir73dqh2c978_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c3hm8o32chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhjq2nrve5bvu9jjp1a0u5emrj1j3e8nj1g8gg38_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c3hm8o32chh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zclricf8assaa6l54v7ghi0ukfjolfeth4esnmb0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c3hm8o32chh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

3. Donald Trump, Mike Pence, Mitch McConnell, and the rest of the GOP are laser-focused on this race

Peter, I know you’re getting a lot of fundraising emails in your inbox ‐‐ **but Election Day is just _5 weeks_ away and this can’t wait.**

In three days, my campaign will reach our last end‐of‐quarter fundraising deadline. So let me quickly tell you why this is so critical:

body:
Tony asked us to pull back the curtain --

|
---

| | We're going to level with you.

We just learned the NRCC, Republicans’ House fundraising arm, has a $5.3 million advantage...

[**_... just in time for Tony’s first End-of-Quarter Deadline._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36635799/308700110/1129282168?refcode=20210928_em_fr_b1_itv_30op&amount=12&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODI4MDdjMy05ZjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-UZBzVi4fS2A_cs9-ZCatoRHwhnCQJ1dszcudjHI-yk=)

They’re preparing to pull the trigger on millions of dollars to defend Tony’s opponent.

So we’ll be frank: If Tony misses his goal, it will be incredibly hard to compete with Republicans’ wealthy fundraisers.

[**_(And his chances of flipping this seat blue will be in serious jeopardy.)_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36635800/308700116/1129282168?refcode=20210928_em_fr_b1_itv_30op&amount=12&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODI4MDdjMy05ZjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-UZBzVi4fS2A_cs9-ZCatoRHwhnCQJ1dszcudjHI-yk=)

[**_Compared to his opponent, Tony’s starting from scratch. This is a make-or-break moment. He needs to raise $15,000 in the next 48 hours to catch up. So we’re asking: Can Tony count on your $12 now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36635801/308700117/1129282168?refcode=20210928_em_fr_b1_itv_30op&amount=12&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODI4MDdjMy05ZjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-UZBzVi4fS2A_cs9-ZCatoRHwhnCQJ1dszcudjHI-yk=)

Last year Tony’s opponent, Don Bacon, barely held on to his seat.

The NRCC (the same group going after Tony) pushed Bacon over the finish line by spending $2.5 million on misleading ads to sway voters.

Now, they’re trying to buy this race again.

[**But Tony’s not backing down.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36635802/308700118/1129282168?refcode=20210928_em_fr_b1_itv_30op&amount=12&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODI4MDdjMy05ZjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-UZBzVi4fS2A_cs9-ZCatoRHwhnCQJ1dszcudjHI-yk=)

Joe Biden won this district by more than 6 points. So we know that, with the right resources, Tony can flip this seat blue.

[**_But that hinges on hitting his $15,000 goal before his very first public deadline. name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 educatio
| | | This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zlm2h8td6jvc33as3ehp723tt68c2cfnpt1gqca8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c3hm4o74clh2bs) Fellow American, [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zfurig77prjh9qjqs996i6u7lodflc81c1vr26lo_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c3hm4o74clh2bs) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zb7f7qmln36hvfn57iq87u2fjsdcimnumrf24ofg_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c3hm4o74clh2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. I’ve seen church communities band together to support families that are struggling. During this pandemic, I’ve seen health care workers put their lives on the line to save others. name: Tom Nelson
subject: Americans are disgusted with our political system, and it’s easy to see why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36636744/308703191/594431030?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210928_2_6&refcode2=c4189ddd-a120-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDE4OWRkZC1hMTIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7J2Rw8hpnYHF5ORM9E5yR0hr3QdbirNOAbecpwwEXl8=)
Senator Kyrsten Sinema’s behavior is the perfect example of why Americans are disgusted with our political system.

Despite the vast majority of her voters supporting President Biden’s Build Back Better budget to lower prescription medication prices, reduce child poverty, increase access to healthcare, expand education opportunities, guarantee paid leave, and increase taxes on the rich, she’s using her power to try to kill the President’s plan.

Senator Sinema isn’t driven by what her voters think. To her and so many corporate Democrats, it’s all about the money.

Today she is making that blatant by attending a fundraiser put on by Big Pharma, corporate lobbying PACs, and other special interests who are spending big to stop Build Back Better and prevent new taxes on the rich.

Team, unlike my opponents, I’m not taking corporate PAC money because I plan on working for the voters as Senator — not powerful special interests.

body:
Team -- it's official, Karen is all in to be the next mayor of Los Angeles. After she made the announcement yesterday, we saw a flood of support online. So we wanted to ask you, are you in?

**[Karen started as a community organizer, and she wants to make sure this campaign is grassroots from top to bottom. So we're asking, will you add your name to the list of people endorsing Karen Bass for Mayor of LA?](https://act.myngp.com/el/MsOPCo5mDadqXDKC7YjxAEHfjZ4B7vBL8RNQmxeTeik=/SQ7sTBde7KpDxxZmdFmmTlgrLuS-Zgae_wmfrsLxau4=?ms=em21_210927_lnch2_engg_gq_act___kbfm_ettx&source=em21_210927_lnch2_engg_gq_act___kbfm_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210927_lnch2_engg_gq_act___kbfm_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: We forced him to show up to work!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
body:
We have only two days left until the end of the quarter and I’m sooo close to hitting my fundraising goal!
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/2kEFA3j6lOAOsSxwCc3wdg/qHfM4wTrq892qZgtB90SVz8g)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/2kEFA3j6lOAOsSxwCc3wdg/qHfM4wTrq892qZgtB90SVz8g) We have only two days left until the end of the quarter and I’m sooo close to hitting my fundraising goal! I have $16,760 left to raise and I know that [**if you can chip in today, we can hit it!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/2kEFA3j6lOAOsSxwCc3wdg/qHfM4wTrq892qZgtB90SVz8g)

And here’s some motivation to prove that we’re already making a difference:

My Do-Nothing opponent, Daniel Webster, is chronically absent from Congress, missing up to 28% of his votes on the House floor.

**But since announcing that I’m running against him, Do-Nothing Dan has missed only ONE vote!**

Isn’t it pathetic that a Do-Nothing member of Congress will only show up to work when they’re afraid of losing their job?

Think about how awful that is for a moment.

**Imagine if YOU were in Congress and tasked with voting on and debating laws that would impact your family, your children, even your great grandchildren.

Would you be there? Would you take the job seriously?

HELL YES, YOU WOULD!
And so will I!**
[**I need to raise another $16,760 in the next 60 hours.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/2kEFA3j6lOAOsSxwCc3wdg/qHfM4wTrq892qZgtB90SVz8g) It won’t be easy and I need all hands on deck – and that means you, Patriot.

[**Pitch in whatever you can today**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/2kEFA3j6lOAOsSxwCc3wdg/qHfM4wTrq892qZgtB90SVz8g) and help me send a message to Do-Nothing Dan and the political establishment that **we WON’T be ignored!**

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

| | [SEND LAURA LOOMER TO WASHINGTON](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/2kEFA3j6lOAOsSxwCc3wdg/qHfM4wTrq892qZgtB90SVz8g)

I have $16,760 left to raise and I know that And here’s some motivation to prove that we’re already making a difference: My Do-Nothing opponent, Daniel Webster, is chronically absent from Congress, missing up to 28% of his votes on the House floor. But since announcing that I’m running against him, Do-Nothing Dan has missed only ONE vote! Isn’t it pathetic that a Do-Nothing member of Congress will only show up to work when they’re afraid of losing their job? Think about how awful that is for a moment. Imagine if YOU were in Congress and tasked with voting on and debating laws that would impact your family, your children, even your great grandchildren. Would you be there? Would you take the job seriously? HELL YES, YOU WOULD! And so will I! It won’t be easy and I need all hands on deck – and that means you, Patriot. and help me send a message to Do-Nothing Dan and the political establishment that we WON’T be ignored! Thanks again for all that you do. Respectfully, Laura Loomer | | Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited. Laura Loomer for Congress Inc 720 Lucerne Ave, #1465 LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

Peter,

You and I have fought together for freedom for years now. T**he increasingly radical Democrats will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America,** which is why they are directing all their resources towards breaking the 50-50 Senate tie and increasing their power in Washington.

_Their top target?_ Missouri’s soon-to-be vacated U.S. Senate seat currently held by a Republican. America, and Missouri, literally cannot afford for the Democrats to come in and take this seat. **We must band together and support a rock-solid conservative who is prepared for the job - Missouri’s own, Congressman Billy Long.**

[**I’ve already joined Billy on the campaign trail, and plan to continue, but need grassroots conservatives like you to join us.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2673ba3b39bc452392ee1df24101da56&_e=91rRQFIJJRIwv_9Hj9bAknEqrhAVRrDzM58nm6XpwyinVIb91lHxGbw2fzn8du3x86W7buVMRrXD0Z7I-BvF3tTZzMncxAGYLwGLDjvE34LMa4fv2qu2-WRXpBfZlKiTCMozZyv2Y4zh9-m7YdnMlFPfk6huQ88_QitoNgralzgsmGir-1lvd5pCAZ8K2c3PljiNUK18GW0X-N9jxvcn-udor25IPjCGmLzat8T8k6AZO6OACdNxVlGOVQ2q4zsgpx72Vuap8D_pnFhfaS4hG35iGjnCo6W628Dlfl3AzyWDsCdy-aLz8m0zdzKqjfUdz5haBHLseijtjrUW_ay5Xedtd_BhqdZ_sAi8mk39QMNgM_F0lYeCxcTI2IDXXiiS07pirMApNOgLRubHz6O1wATkq384I3gSlF_s7EwhKz8LOc8ba0aQ5MXX98KGSfBmpaGu36Xhb3CzHt8ekEwBamB2wP03kfOniot3ww4CiII%3D)

From day one in Washington, **Billy fought to implement the America First Agenda by standing up to Communist China and encouraging American companies to expand right here in the United States.** He has cut taxes and regulations, and helped small businesses thrive. Billy is a friend to the unborn, our military veterans and law enforcement. **His loyalty to the American people has never wavered.**

_I’m writing to tell you this:_ **If we put Billy Long in the U.S. Senate, we won’t have to worry about him giving into the swamp.** His vote will be for you. What you see is what you get. He’s been in Washington for 10 years, **but he’s never been of Washington.**

He’s not just talking the talk, like the power-hungry Democrats do. Billy passed legislation to release Missourian workers from unnecessary government regulations, improving their economic situation and quality of life.

_Sounds like the opposite of what the radical-Democrats are doing in Washington, right?_ **Because unlike Joe Biden, Kamala Harris or Chuck Schumer, Billy understands that Americans should ALWAYS come first.** That’s the type of Republican we need fighting for us, Peter.

This race is going to be competitive and it will certainly be one of the most expensive battles we see this cycle. [**The only way we’re going to be able to keep Missouri in Republican hands is if conservatives like you join our team right now.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2673ba3b39bc452392ee1df24101da56&_e=91rRQFIJJRIwv_9Hj9bAknEqrhAVRrDzM58nm6XpwyinVIb91lHxGbw2fzn8du3x86W7buVMRrXD0Z7I-BvF3tTZzMncxAGYLwGLDjvE34LMa4fv2qu2-WRXpBfZlKiTCMozZyv2Y4zh9-m7YdnMlFPfk6huQ88_QitoNgralzgsmGir-1lvd5pCAZ8K2c3PljiNUK18GW0X-N9jxvcn-udor25IPjCGmLzat8T8k6AZO6OACdNxVlGOVQ2q4zsgpx72Vuap8D_pnFhfaS4hG6ffXZNo8uOeUbzVDh5NKSmPyyfP4q-tMSd7dNUUDVz12XN-0xyNBC2AAKSrOMfafLeOZ-SUCLdA0jShGLB6oiJ4UUutekvA7JklHkxJduldG7E2RjdL_9HjbbVDzxcCYemwSYziykzBboGm_zhkwUZ_i1yXUKVHD00QpaeBbVJ34DYK6OjiSaRezif4EtA6lAMsF2CZxroBivv9OejRol4%3D)

[** SUPPORT BILLY LONG NOW ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2673ba3b39bc452392ee1df24101da56&_e=91rRQFIJJRIwv_9Hj9bAknEqrhAVRrDzM58nm6XpwyinVIb91lHxGbw2fzn8du3x86W7buVMRrXD0Z7I-BvF3tTZzMncxAGYLwGLDjvE34LMa4fv2qu2-WRXpBfZlKiTCMozZyv2Y4zh9-m7YdnMlFPfk6huQ88_QitoNgralzgsmGir-1lvd5pCAZ8K2c3PljiNUK18GW0X-N9jxvcn-udor25IPjCGmLzat8T8k6AZO6OACdNxVlGOVQ2q4zsgpx72Vuap8D_pnFhfaS4hG3VAu7aAv-fM9H5kEkruZ-kHFvYKs5Pb9BAivjcYq_MuNKfQ1mdJIhSCATBtfSWGQuwsTCAMPfMZiIJKjDs8ksewO7AwdGBlAtazziUQRccXv_DQlivl4JG67z75kncNuz5BCelGZ9ZiwBsVc84PvscupSB4Fbo-KkfYtVLglybr_o9s6maKEo1xRSRNF4sa1b6-X_pKuzP5zFsI2RGe8Qs%3D)
Even President Trump is confident that we can and will take back the Senate, but that plan becomes increasingly difficult if the Democrats swoop in and buy and lie their way into one of our red-state seats. **Let me tell you, Democrats already have their eyes and pocketbooks set on Missouri.**

They aren’t wasting any time using big corporations and dark-money donors to pad their campaign accounts. [**Peter, that’s why I am counting on you to step up immediately, asking that you give generously to ensure my friend Billy Long has the resources he needs to keep Missouri RED for the Republican Party.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2673ba3b39bc452392ee1df24101da56&_e=91rRQFIJJRIwv_9Hj9bAknEqrhAVRrDzM58nm6XpwyinVIb91lHxGbw2fzn8du3x86W7buVMRrXD0Z7I-BvF3tTZzMncxAGYLwGLDjvE34LMa4fv2qu2-WRXpBfZlKiTCMozZyv2Y4zh9-m7YdnMlFPfk6huQ88_QitoNgralzgsmGir-1lvd5pCAZ8K2c3PljiNUK18GW0X-N9jxvcn-udor25IPjCGmLzat8T8k6AZO6OACdNxVlGOVQ2q4zsgpx72Vuap8D_pnFhfaS4hG5FrtIclePlfAJf54zV3vpUI9DCCAcXNxvzvwLooFoUAUnZKYWtvEKpjNLDw0sjkC-0XEBpK7K-sJ-BoKU4wvXQgd8TR3z_BTfPFs_jcVK7FLOHaHDL2W03k0AkLT_Dz8ZqsyEF3AMxxNpxhohfnHBf-auQ4IyJOgq7sT1NQPce4WwCbOr_JFaBFnIiEam5SdrEu1ID2FbdlMs_wkMGuOyU%3D)

Thank you,

Kellyanne Conway
Former Counselor to President Donald J. Trump

[** SUPPORT BILLY LONG NOW ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2673ba3b39bc452392ee1df24101da56&_e=91rRQFIJJRIwv_9Hj9bAknEqrhAVRrDzM58nm6XpwyinVIb91lHxGbw2fzn8du3x86W7buVMRrXD0Z7I-BvF3tTZzMncxAGYLwGLDjvE34LMa4fv2qu2-WRXpBfZlKiTCMozZyv2Y4zh9-m7YdnMlFPfk6huQ88_QitoNgralzgsmGir-1lvd5pCAZ8K2c3PljiNUK18GW0X-N9jxvcn-udor25IPjCGmLzat8T8k6AZO6OACdNxVlGOVQ2q4zsgpx72Vuap8D_pnFhfaS4hG3NNWPoFO0e5h43SnlliIxz0OTSYMHj8K-OYOmetRYeN_kGQpOk0b6I2wJx_ZxCZqJznRHSneWj51hptt7TjNrN6R_jok4_7IPJWNQtCUb-9DUIvxQEyPPK0IrZkJxQ6BADY-pf0dOFsrlc5E-FDjBiehiPAe3sk3GM1431DOCVW4y2NxGUG87p7kyEFHG1kERk9iyUCAdtL1niCiCXOAhI%3D)

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1016%2E3611125%2EF-m1tr ][IMG]

Hey folks,

I’ll be straight with you: I’m sick and tired of people writing off Ohio.
I’ve had it with TV talking heads and Twitter pundits saying we can’t win
this Senate seat.

Look I get it, Ohio is a tough state to win. My opponents have the backing
of mega-donors and dark-money super PACs. Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump
have made this race a top target.

But the critics are dead wrong. Last quarter, we broke Ohio fundraising
records. Now, the polls show us within single digits of our opponents.
Ohioans are fired up like never before and ready to win this historic
race.

And you know what I always say -- NEVER bet against Ohio!

I know we have what it takes to win this race, but only if grassroots
supporters like you are with us every step of the way. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4842?t=1007&akid=1016%2E3611125%2EF-m1tr ]Can you chip in
$10 or more to help us prove the skeptics wrong and flip this open Senate
seat blue?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4842?t=1008&akid=1016%2E3611125%2EF-m1tr ]Count me in >>

We are less than 72 hours away from our FEC fundraising deadline -- our
most important benchmark to date.

If we want to show my far-right opponents we have what it takes to flip
this seat, we’ve got to meet our goal.

Let’s show them what Ohio can do -- [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4606?t=1009&akid=1016%2E3611125%2EF-m1tr ]will you rush a donation to get us
to our $100,000 goal before the clock runs out?

subject: Make your first contribution to defeat Republican Madison Cawthorn

On September 30, we hit another end-of-quarter deadline, and we’ll have to report our numbers to the FEC. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36636996/308703901/-1129432161?refcode=EM_FR_210928FR_N_TE_90DO_7_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjJiMjE5MS1hMjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jRypWrYlVjrNQO043ERSOFcrMfhKTy6bTi4KC8LZOLU=)
---
Friend, we’re coming up on an end-of-quarter deadline, and I want to explain a little bit about myself before I ask you to give. **[But if you’re already familiar with my story, I’m asking you to chip in $10 or whatever you can today ahead of our end-of-quarter deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36636997/308703902/-1129432161?refcode=EM_FR_210928FR_N_TE_90DO_7_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjJiMjE5MS1hMjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jRypWrYlVjrNQO043ERSOFcrMfhKTy6bTi4KC8LZOLU=)**

I grew up in a typical working-class family. When I wasn’t in school, I waited tables or washed dishes at the family’s neighborhood restaurant. What little time was left, I spent on the courts and fields playing basketball, football, and baseball.

My upbringing and the people I grew up around, in school, and at my family’s neighborhood restaurant, shaped my life and provided direction throughout and after college and law school. I worked at a non-profit that helped young people with mental and physical disabilities and then embarked on a public service career.

I challenged Harrisburg’s status quo and set an example as a reformer. I demanded more government accountability and transparency – and became Pennsylvania’s first public official to publicly post all of my expenses online. I returned unused office expenses to taxpayers and called on Harrisburg leaders to do the same.

When I ran for Congress in 2020, our team came close to defeating Scott Perry and putting the people of central Pennsylvania ahead of partisan politics and the special interests -- **_and now I’m considering a rematch next year._**

Rep. Perry is a danger to Pennsylvanians and Americans across the country, and it’s time for him to go. So I’m asking you to help me in my fight against Rep. Perry so I can go to Congress and fight every day for you.

**[With a huge deadline coming up on Thursday, September 30, will you send me a contribution of $10 right now and make sure we hit our goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36636998/308703903/-1129432161?refcode=EM_FR_210928FR_N_TE_90DO_7_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjJiMjE5MS1hMjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jRypWrYlVjrNQO043ERSOFcrMfhKTy6bTi4KC8LZOLU=)** clean_body: On September 30, we hit another end-of-quarter deadline, and we’ll have to report our numbers to the FEC. | | = Friend, we’re coming up on an end-of-quarter deadline, and I want to explain a little bit about myself before I ask you to give. = I grew up in a typical working-class family. When I wasn’t in school, I waited tables or washed dishes at the family’s neighborhood restaurant. What little time was left, I spent on the courts and fields playing basketball, football, and baseball. My upbringing and the people I grew up around, in school, and at my family’s neighborhood restaurant, shaped my life and provided direction throughout and after college and law school. I worked at a non-profit that helped young people with mental and physical disabilities and then embarked on a public service career. I challenged Harrisburg’s status quo and set an example as a reformer. I demanded more government accountability and transparency – and became Pennsylvania’s first public official to publicly post all of my expenses online. I returned unused office expenses to taxpayers and called on Harrisburg leaders to do the same. When I ran for Congress in 2020, our team came close to defeating Scott Perry and putting the people of central Pennsylvania ahead of partisan politics and the special interests -- and now I’m considering a rematch next year. Rep. Perry is a danger to Pennsylvanians and Americans across the country, and it’s time for him to go. So I’m asking you to help me in my fight against Rep. Perry so I can go to Congress and fight every day for you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Eugene ** | | Eugene DePasquale has dedicated his public service to tirelessly fighting for working people, our senior citizens, and our most vulnerable. Will you pitch in any amount to help us elect a real leader to represent PA-10? = ** PAID FOR BY DEPASQUALE FOR PA-10 Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: DePasquale for PA 10 P.O. just 2 days away!

name: GOP Presidential
subject: You can help restore hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 educatio
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zivk9jclfdeq60iqho9mus8uvs2it5vit5b52n40_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf9c30e4r67cr4caoj4ddm61q3cddmmlpned33m5hn4cr2mgqb0o70mpo68s75e3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eap6cdj0mmp6fcjjcooj1cj26pp238h1e8he4933cph61or1cdj66oh5u)
| This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1h828eqoukgipago3qdf1at2njkmsbfb2apoc6o_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c3hm2or6cdh2bs) Fellow American, [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl2qti99uebpsdcc2a1nah9l3dq0uiris9qgoul0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c3hm2or6cdh2bs) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqs1n1isdfgvrmfj1s7tijng7ehrtqse93mtd0c8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c3hm2or6cdh2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkblhg9qi76jdoi606cqafj2k99jsh7p7t9aclhg_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c3hm2or6cdh2bs) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv4mp44c5cbg1jma7g4eqno5t0lmej6rqdra2kl0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c3hm2or6cdh2bs) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Democrats have gotten a lot done for our country this year — from helping vaccinate millions against COVID-19, to delivering economic relief for small businesses and families and cutting down child poverty.
This week we’re working to build on that progress by trying to pass the Build Back Better agenda. It includes important measures like investments in education and an expansion of Medicare. Most urgently, it would address the climate crisis like the emergency it is — creating lots of good-paying jobs, supporting widespread electrification of homes and businesses, and preserving our public lands for future generations.
But we need to build on our, frankly, razor-thin majorities in Congress if we’re going to keep up this work to improve lives and livelihoods. Our campaign is working to help re-elect senators in battleground states like Raphael Warnock and Mark Kelly, and re-take House seats in close districts like in Gabe Vasquez’s race in New Mexico.
**Getting some of this work done depends on meeting targets like Thursday’s end-of-quarter deadline. Can you add a donation of any amount to make sure we meet our goal?**

My team just told me that we're still $11,028 short of our goal, so I have an ask just for you: Will you chip in any amount to help close our fundraising gap? Your grassroots donations are crucial to powering our work and defending our razor-thin majorities in Congress. If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Democrats have gotten a lot done for our country this year — from helping vaccinate millions against COVID-19, to delivering economic relief for small businesses and families and cutting down child poverty. This week we’re working to build on that progress by trying to pass the Build Back Better agenda. It includes important measures like investments in education and an expansion of Medicare. Most urgently, it would address the climate crisis like the emergency it is — creating lots of good-paying jobs, supporting widespread electrification of homes and businesses, and preserving our public lands for future generations. But we need to build on our, frankly, razor-thin majorities in Congress if we’re going to keep up this work to improve lives and livelihoods. Our campaign is working to help re-elect senators in battleground states like Raphael Warnock and Mark Kelly, and re-take House seats in close districts like in Gabe Vasquez’s race in New Mexico. Getting some of this work done depends on meeting targets like Thursday’s end-of-quarter deadline. Can you add a donation of any amount to make sure we meet our goal? name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Makki?=
subject: We know a phony when we see one
body:
First, Anna Paulina Luna "avidly" supported the disastrous Obama/Biden ticket, giving us 8 years of radically liberal policies from the White House... |
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=4dca21257b&e=c2296cffff)
---
| | Dear Friend, First, Anna Paulina Luna "avidly" supported the disastrous Obama/Biden ticket, giving us 8 years of radically liberal policies from the White House. Then, Luna gave an interview (and a photoshoot) to an adult magazine called SKYN and said **“I’m able to take on different personalities depending on what image I am going for. I think getting into character of what you are selling is super important.”** So now, after changing her name, moving to Florida, and registering as a Republican for the first time, Luna is trying to sell Florida Republicans on her latest character. **_But we aren't buying it: we know a phony when we see one._

Our district has had enough phoniness with our current congressman, Charlie Crist. We can't afford another dishonest politician like him. And let's be clear: that's exactly who Luna would be: just Crist in a skirt.** **I'm running to give Republicans in our district a better choice. ** I have a proven, long standing conservative record. While Luna was busy promoting herself on social media, I was in the trenches serving as an Election Integrity attorney for President Trump during the Wisconsin recount, promoting our Republican values on Newsmax, and visiting the Southern Border to see for myself the crisis Biden has created. **You have my word that I will _NEVER_ betray our values just to climb the political ladder.** But to give our district the representation we deserve, it's going to take all of us true conservatives working together. That's why I'm asking you to **[click here](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=9c383b1ba0&e=c2296cffff)** and help our campaign reach our fundraising goal before Thursday's midnight deadline. [**Every single contribution matters. So whether it's $500, $50, or $5 - please join this effort and let's restore our values to Florida's 13th District!**](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=2ae15d4291&e=c2296cffff)
---
| [SUPPORT AMANDA MAKKI FOR CONGRESS](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=8254b8baab&e=c2296cffff "SUPPORT AMANDA MAKKI FOR CONGRESS")
---
| God Bless,
_Amanda Makki_
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Erica=20Lee=2C=20Future=20Generations?=
subject: It's today. Are you coming?
body:
You’re invited: An important conversation about Medicare for All with Senator Erica Smith! | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=96ec011003&e=66979298f9)
---
| | |
# It's today! Have you RSVP'd?
---
| [Today is the Medicare for All virtual grassroots fundraising event in support of Erica Smith for U.S. Senate 7 PM ET](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=c681b8c42a&e=66979298f9) — with special guests Kara Eastman, Jen Perlman, and our very own, Executive Director, Roza Calderon. We just got word that Lauren Steiner, a #MedicareForAll advocate will be joining us for this important conversation. **Will you be joining us?**
---
| [RSVP FOR EVENT NOW!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=b5f9f17c2a&e=66979298f9 "RSVP FOR EVENT NOW!")
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=3795052c75&e=66979298f9)
---
| **Policy is personal — and for Erica Smith, that includes Medicare for All.** She had a medically fragile son and experienced first-hand the horror of navigating a for-profit health care system.

Erica’s medical insurance and children’s Medicaid didn’t cover the medical equipment that her son’s life depended on. She had to get a part-time job teaching at an alternative school, and her family had to sell the car her eldest son used to commute to and from work. This was Erica’s reality and she had health insurance.

**Erica’s story isn’t unique — it’s far too common because our broken health care system prioritizes profits over people. That is fundamentally wrong and wholly immoral.**

We all saw that all too well this past year as millions were left vulnerable, without healthcare, during a pandemic.

It’s time to reimagine our health care system and guarantee health care as a human right for all. It’s time for Medicare for All. Erica Smith is running for the U.S. Senate to make that happen, and I hope you can join us tomorrow night to show your support.
---
| [Will you join Erica and Roza tomorrow, Tuesday, September 28, at 7 PM ET on Zoom for our special Medicare for All grassroots fundraiser? RSVP now.](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=08d0ead8b6&e=66979298f9)
---
| [RSVP FOR EVENT NOW!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=93c5b967f0&e=66979298f9 "RSVP FOR EVENT NOW!")
---
| [VOLUNTEER](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=da07843c99&e=66979298f9 "VOLUNTEER")
---
| In gratitude,

Erica Lee
_Chief of Staff, Future Generations _
---

With that being said, if you could help support her re-election campaign by chipping in what you can before midnight, it would go a long way to making sure we have a voice in the House that has the people of Iowa’s best interests in heart EVERY. SINGLE. DAY.

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c465%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=f6lWwtGgRokq5%2b8TCM7vkA&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66777%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oZqiHkIPP9T3Pi7nxHIKzw&sysid=1) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66778%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XD0RiE4eYgGTziPgbV6QfA&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66777%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oZqiHkIPP9T3Pi7nxHIKzw&sysid=1) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66779%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2fllYWg3Kh6BGOt0G%2bW7Mw&sysid=1) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students --the least affected by the disease -- must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66770%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tOG7vYi%2fcWFJ0PorrmnXPA&sysid=1) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66771%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mKoUpQur3%2bNGwjj8zDr5TA&sysid=1) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c465%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=f6lWwtGgRokq5%2b8TCM7vkA&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c465%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=f6lWwtGgRokq5%2b8TCM7vkA&sysid=1)

name: Rod Dorilas
subject: I'm not supposed to be a Republican
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
body:
My Haitian-Immigrant parents picked crops in South Florida to put me through school. Now, I'm living my American Dream by running for Congress. |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_s=40bdacbd193e477780ec17e1256f6ed6&_t=sVuLEoWgfEq2X-mGo6VZq620MLpeMPqI6FfH3oF38hsvk3Hs3CPsqTowzqfLvwavnMXxQaIM4gNlXjPhRxVv1_2gSnjEGxGmaET78FVqDTF5i_-2TqiqaB7LQx0F0Yhdv-NQ-uIomEAofDyCF4uZ6OyvIUBqFf5io7Hnc3fs2eE%3D).

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=40bdacbd193e477780ec17e1256f6ed6&_e=FPEaHMMMGsDYeignwwPSxkAdttNJLCun1HHb0a7raiJD7MBitNnPJ49IGEDIoLwXNpdXpHbjEDOZ_ujIULmG6nw29UHCWE57zf5-dbnM9yySFu_WcWA81lIYgBSxUMivY0u0kg0JcFeYxzvT0DJw4kIaVnGVdZ-d-dGF0GaK-RimJyDWkJZk2et7TnV9c2nUbjuQF3VJw37YYvl7OPWmqk5hE3E_NeM_qx2UA6BhJetBBoj6GrVq_1s4-V5Cu5Puz1H42xt1-vLCHsK4J_uGVmg_WBUlzAHVrO9wfvNPPRzKg245yrZ8CDG7eF7STzV2tqdAUQys6UqGD8lLliO2ZCNzeAwuGs6To2FDk0sLizT6B6dcWX-C4kt5yEYFUhL4vH11aheB2pnm0iMnUMei8wwgL1wdDW7-Lo3V6osUW5iN0dn-I0stqOFwb5fB-jBGbPa4233MTIYUYxHQ6wyP8mfqQVjviFM-L678reS-1Ms%3D)

---
Fellow American,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

**I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. **

Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but _**what is worth having in life that is easy?**_ I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. | _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. | Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress

name: Durbin HQ
subject: We can’t afford to miss the mark
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
This is an all-hands-on-deck moment. With the end-of-quarter deadline just two days away, we can’t afford to miss this mark. Not with the Senate majority on the line.
#
Peter,
Yesterday, Senate Republicans made their intentions clear, voting to walk out on the debt that President Trump racked up -- and potentially create a government shutdown.
**This is an all-hands-on-deck moment. With the end-of-quarter deadline just two days away, we can’t afford to miss this mark. Not with the Senate majority on the line****.**

name: Republican Party of Wisconsin
subject: TODAY is National Voter Registration Day!
body:

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: I'm Running for Congress in TX-38!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

I am extremely proud to announce my intention to run for Congress in Texas'
new 38th Congressional District. Together with my family, my team, and with
the support of patriots across the country and right here at home, we will
complete the mission I first embarked on in 2019. The gravity of this election
has never been greater, and in the 250 days Joe Biden has been in office, our
country has felt the atrocious policies instituted by a Democrat controlled
government that include record high inflation, a failing economy, a disastrous
withdrawal from Afghanistan which claimed the lives of thirteen service
members, vaccine mandates by executive order, and a preventable surge in
illegal immigration across our southern border.

Our elected representatives in Congress must be willing to fight to preserve
the values that make our country exceptional and defend the Constitution, and
if elected, I promise to do just that. The path to stopping Joe Biden and
Nancy Pelosi is to win back the house, and I'm confident that the voters of
Texas' 38th Congressional District will agree. I have served our country once
before and with the support of the voters I look forward to serving again.

Sincerely,
Wesley

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply
endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe
<http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=ea8e96107ded4225a17486dbfe434847&_t=55XTTQy9nq8v6JZNa6fVoOo976ldIPJtnNZfz7rF07gqWauD7U-onyj4vw7FnlzcjvBgzePKyrvmTIvtFh2V_gAfey7ytNxlsnuzRM-lkNq--uMtvwbKMgBR_emBg2zFsNNHdyhsT3DkEp6JS2RatzI9kW-Ce5Nwwu6HHSaxdY0%3D>
.

clean_body: We need 5,000 grassroots donors to support our campaign before Thursday at midnight to win a toss-up district like CA-25. | = | | California’s 25th is THE battleground district in 2022, team. If Democrats want to defend our majority in 2022, then we MUST flip toss-up districts like CA-25. It’s our BEST and ONLY chance at holding the House. = | | | = CA-25 is ONE of only TWO Republican-held districts in the entire country to be rated as a toss-up district. That means Democrats’ best chance of flipping a House seat from red to blue in 2022 will happen right here in California’s 25th District! But once we report our end-of-quarter fundraising numbers to the FEC after Thursday at midnight, these ratings could change. In fact, these ratings WILL change if we don’t raise enough money to keep up with Mike Garcia’s dark money and MAGA-funded campaign. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = One team. name: Josh Harder
subject: update on our meeting today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/l3iz5zcnB3ys3nhsJ3cgGZG138vch5VCQ075lLwzFOY=/xg3tUcNibFxe7nak2hcitsx5njlJLD77KMTy-EneC9M=?refcode=E11532-20210928-Meeting2-header-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) | Hi Peter, I just got out of a meeting, and I wanted to give you a quick update: My finance director Kierra works really hard to keep us on track to where we need to be every month and every quarter to win this campaign. And I know it's not the easiest job in the world, she's a real rockstar. Sometimes, Kierra has to break tough news to me about how much we have left to raise and what it's going to take for us to get there. And that's what today's meeting was about. We have a really important end-of-quarter deadline on Thursday, probably one of the most important ones of my entire career, and so we set a big goal. Over the last week, we've made progress and have gotten to under $20,000 left to raise. However, the deadline is only 3 days away and since I refuse corporate PAC money, I solely rely on the generosity of grassroots supporters like you. I need your support because two GOP attack groups just launched $184k worth of ads in my district and the first poll of our race showed us down 7 points against a Republican opponent. This fundraising deadline is our chance to show we're not backing down from a tough fight. With the deadline coming up quickly, I'm reaching out and humbly asking you to make a contribution today so that we can put together the strongest fundraising report we've ever done in an off-year election and show that we've got the support to keep CA-10 blue! I'm leaving my personalized ActBlue link here if you would be so kind to chip in now: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhca-10-email-sept2021-fr-eoq?refcode=Peter**](https://act.myngp.com/el/l3iz5zcnB3ys3nhsJ3cgGZG138vch5VCQ075lLwzFOY=/xg3tUcNibFxe7nak2hcitsx5njlJLD77KMTy-EneC9M=?refcode=E11532-20210928-Meeting2-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) I really appreciate your support (and I know Kierra appreciates you too!) \-- Josh

name: Donna Imam via, VoteForDonna.com
subject: Voter turnout is everything in Texas.
body:
This is our only shot at flipping major statewide races in Texas so we can neutralize Gov. Abbott's right-wing agenda. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36641029/308725733/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmYxMGFjMS1hYzIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fp69UK4-CQ9wTJqiM0P7H8y6aD7U1RPBfb5Tf7xM2aE=)
Friend,

I wanted to make sure you saw the news that the Texas legislature just released their first draft of new congressional maps. **The proposal includes a new, Democratic-leaning district in Austin which is the district that we have been anticipating, and the one I'm running in.**

Here's why this is such a big deal:

In 2020, I won the Democratic nomination in TX-31. We campaigned on economic solutions for all Texans -- healthcare coverage, high-wage jobs, and debt-free education. We went to over 50,000 doors to get our message out, and we came closer than anyone imagined to flipping TX-31 from red to blue.

Voter turnout in Williamson County where I ran, saw the _highest increase_ in turnout of the top 25 most populous counties in Texas.

**If we're going to flip Texas in 2022, we'll need to repeat that historic turnout effort in this new Democratic district in Austin. It's our _only shot_ at flipping major statewide races in Texas so we can neutralize Gov. Abbott's right-wing agenda.**

We're laying the groundwork immediately to make sure this district stays Democratic and that voters here can play a key role in helping flip Texas blue. To do that, I need your help:

**[Will you chip in $3 toward my end-of-quarter deadline? We set out to raise $50,000 before Thursday at 11:59 pm to make sure we have the resources to mobilize in this district and ward off any GOP encroachment, because we know it's coming. clean_body: This is our only shot at flipping major statewide races in Texas so we can neutralize Gov. Abbott's right-wing agenda. | = Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw the news that the Texas legislature just released their first draft of new congressional maps. The proposal includes a new, Democratic-leaning district in Austin which is the district that we have been anticipating, and the one I'm running in. Here's why this is such a big deal: In 2020, I won the Democratic nomination in TX-31. We campaigned on economic solutions for all Texans -- healthcare coverage, high-wage jobs, and debt-free education. We went to over 50,000 doors to get our message out, and we came closer than anyone imagined to flipping TX-31 from red to blue. Voter turnout in Williamson County where I ran, saw the highest increase in turnout of the top 25 most populous counties in Texas. If we're going to flip Texas in 2022, we'll need to repeat that historic turnout effort in this new Democratic district in Austin. It's our only shot at flipping major statewide races in Texas so we can neutralize Gov. Abbott's right-wing agenda. We're laying the groundwork immediately to make sure this district stays Democratic and that voters here can play a key role in helping flip Texas blue. body:
At the height of the COVID-19 pandemic, Kim Reynolds credited Trump with "helping Iowans." |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36641136/308725879/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2E4MDNmNC1hYzIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=heeKUjQgA7GqU76lD1TPPl-8l-L6zIHDuvWMXRzUX4U=)
[**Friend -- In a moment we're going to ask you for a $5 contribution before our end-of-month deadline. But first, let's take a side-by-side look at our opponent.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36641137/308725880/975127612?refcode=em-92821-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2E4MDNmNC1hYzIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=heeKUjQgA7GqU76lD1TPPl-8l-L6zIHDuvWMXRzUX4U=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36641138/308725881/975127612?refcode=em-92821-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2E4MDNmNC1hYzIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=heeKUjQgA7GqU76lD1TPPl-8l-L6zIHDuvWMXRzUX4U=)
On one hand you have **Governor Kim Reynolds.**

While she praised Donald Trump for "helping Iowans" -- local communities didn't have the tools to fight the COVID-19 pandemic -- kids are getting sick at higher rates than ever, workers in large meat-processing plants worked in unsafe conditions, and small businesses were shuttered.

It doesn't have to be this way.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36641139/308725882/975127612?refcode=em-92821-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2E4MDNmNC1hYzIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=heeKUjQgA7GqU76lD1TPPl-8l-L6zIHDuvWMXRzUX4U=)
On the other hand, you have **Ras Smith.**

Ras knows that getting us out of this pandemic and our economic recovery go hand in hand.

He knows what's best for our kids is what's best for our state. Local communities should have the tools to make sure kids stay healthy and safe in school.

Iowa used to have the best public schools in the nation, but Reynolds and the GOP starved them of resources. We can get our public schools back to being #1, but we need the right leader to get us there.

**Ras has spent his entire career fighting for kids and working families. He'll make sure all Iowans have the opportunity to not just survive, but thrive. But he can't do this alone.**

[**If you're ready to replace Kim Reynolds with Ras Smith, chip in $5 to our end-of-month deadline so we can make sure more Iowans know about Ras. We're coming up $1,577 short of our goal, and $5 would go a long way in closing the gap.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36641140/308725883/975127612?refcode=em-92821-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2E4MDNmNC1hYzIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=heeKUjQgA7GqU76lD1TPPl-8l-L6zIHDuvWMXRzUX4U=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36641141/308725884/975127612?refcode=em-92821-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2E4MDNmNC1hYzIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=heeKUjQgA7GqU76lD1TPPl-8l-L6zIHDuvWMXRzUX4U=)

clean_body: At the height of the COVID-19 pandemic, Kim Reynolds credited Trump with "helping Iowans." | = = = On one hand you have Governor Kim Reynolds. While she praised Donald Trump for "helping Iowans" -- local communities didn't have the tools to fight the COVID-19 pandemic -- kids are getting sick at higher rates than ever, workers in large meat-processing plants worked in unsafe conditions, and small businesses were shuttered. It doesn't have to be this way. = On the other hand, you have Ras Smith. Ras knows that getting us out of this pandemic and our economic recovery go hand in hand. He knows what's best for our kids is what's best for our state. Local communities should have the tools to make sure kids stay healthy and safe in school. Iowa used to have the best public schools in the nation, but Reynolds and the GOP starved them of resources. We can get our public schools back to being #1, but we need the right leader to get us there. Ras has spent his entire career fighting for kids and working families. He'll make sure all Iowans have the opportunity to not just survive, but thrive. name: Stacey Abrams
subject: my personal message for grassroots Democrats:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.)

It's Stacey Abrams.

**I won 't sugarcoat it: Donald Trump and his Republicans are pushing our democracy to its breaking point.**

_\-- They have**ATTACKED** our freedom to vote.
\-- They have **UNDERMINED** trust in our elections.
\-- And they even **INCITED** a deadly insurrection._

I am committed like never before to fight for our rights and **PROTECT** access to the ballot -- but we can't stop these anti-democratic Republicans without the support of grassroots supporters like **YOU**.

**[That's why I'm reaching out with an urgent request on behalf of our House Democrats before their End of Quarter Deadline: Will you rush $3 to protect our House Majority? Our voting rights and our democracy depend on what we all do in this moment:](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/4E6Vs3q~W_)**
| [](https://links.e.dccc.)[END OF QUARTER DEADLINE: 9/30, 11:59pm
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/rr9Yf78Zq_tW~)

[_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/8E0Gs0~)

---

**I 've seen what can happen when we all rise together to fight for voting rights.**

In Georgia, our work to register and turn out historic numbers of voters carried Joe Biden over the finish line and secured our Democratic Senate Majority.

As we begin the work to continue our historic progress and defend our critical House Majority across the country, we must apply that same spirit to the fights that lie ahead.

**And I need you with me.**

[**Please, can I count on you to pitch in $3 to defend our House Majority and defeat anti-democratic House Republicans? House Democrats ' End of Quarter Deadline is just 48 hours away, so anything you can spare will go a long way >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/6dzecpLy-)
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/bazEfXm~)
---
| [**Chip in $35 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $50 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_)
---
| [**Chip in $100 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $250 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/V4_)
---
| [**Or donate another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/-YK-)
---

Thank you,

Stacey Abrams
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45692439&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4NTAyNjA3OAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45692439&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4NTAyNjA3OAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Please, this is urgent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=vDUyn7DmV4%2Bk%2FtJdHpRgvzDv71Hj9Hrf&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
I'm a little more than 48 hours away from our biggest fundraising deadline of the year so far: our end-of-quarter - and public - FEC reporting deadline. Unfortunately, after just hanging up with my finance director, I've learned we're still $8,500 short of our goal.
I know you'll forgive my urgency. As an engaged supporter, you understand how important this campaign is with Senate control on the line. So let me be clear: We cannot fall short of goals ahead of public reporting deadlines like this. If we do - if the political pundits and GOP see we've fallen behind, they will take that as a clear-cut sign of vulnerability and pile on the resources to defeat me.
So Friend, I'm humbly asking you to make a contribution so I can meet my goal before this reporting period. But before I do, I hope you'll allow me to explain why Democratic control of the Senate is so important.
I've recently had a front-row seat to revelation after revelation of former President Donald Trump's anti-democratic obstruction. His former acting attorney general confirmed Trump tried to exert presidential power and pressure to overturn the 2020 election. The select committee investigating the Jan. 6 insurrection is also investigating whether the Trump family and Republican members of Congress aided violent insurrectionists the day of the attack on our Capitol.
These details are chilling - but here's what we need to remember: Because Democrats hold control in Congress, we are able to investigate and hold even the most powerful accountable for their wrongdoing. If Republicans were still in control, we know they would simply defend the former president and sweep his attacks on our democracy under the rug. **If we allow the GOP to retake the Senate, they will only embolden the streaks of authoritarianism that have infested their party.**
Passing bold legislation, securing justice and accountability, protecting our democracy, and improving the lives of everyday people - it all hinges on protecting and expanding a very fragile Democratic control of the Senate. Here in Connecticut, the political ground is already shifting: Republicans flipped a state Senate seat, and national Republicans are targeting our U.S. Senate seat to get Mitch McConnell back in power.
**[Allow me to be blunt once again: To protect our control of the Senate, I cannot miss this goal. So please, will you make a donation of $5 or more right now to ensure we have the resources to fight GOP attacks and protect this Senate seat? Every dollar you give gets us closer to our goal ahead of this crucial end-of-quarter reporting deadline.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1076-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you,
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1076-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=JkcWwfd8l%2FAtFMInxUmfFTDv71Hj9Hrf&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: David Horowitz
subject: Black LIES Matter
body:
Peter, Black Lives Matter has orchestrated the greatest civil destruction in America in our history. They lie systematically about the deaths of armed black criminals resisting arrest. They lied about George Floyd to incite deadly riots across the country. Even Keith Ellison, an Antifa supporter and - as Minnesota's Attorney General - the chief prosecutor attempting to turn the death of George Floyd into a murder - conceded that _they could not find any racial element in Floyd 's death._ That's a fact most people don't know. _The summer of unprecedented insurrectionary violence by Black Lives Matter was based on a monstrous lie._ Black Lives Matter doesn't want to fight "systemic racism" or end police brutality... **They 're Fidel Castro-adoring communists, and they want an end to America once and for all.** _And if patriots like you and me don 't arm yourselves with the facts, they'll get exactly what they've been after._ [**That 's why I wrote _I Can 't Breathe_ \-- and why I want you to be one of the first to receive a copy.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58429409:6tIOKE2N6:m:1:3253819041:4884BD9212E0622BA76BE50C7061B471:r) The truth is, when a black person dies at the hands of police, Black Lives Matter is happy. It gives them a martyr for their cause and a phony pretext for calling the police genocidal racists. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58429409:6tIOKE2N6:m:1:3253819041:4884BD9212E0622BA76BE50C7061B471:r) In fact, as I demonstrate in my latest book _I Can 't Breathe: How A Racial Hoax Is Killing America_ virtually every Black Lives Matter claim is based on a series of brazen lies facilitated by our corrupt national media. Take Breonna Taylor. Black Lives Matter portrayed Breonna as an innocent 26-year-old "murdered" in her home, in her bed, in her sleep by racist cops. In fact Breonna was an active long-term accomplice to a major drug dealer. The cops were at her house (and four others) because Breonna used her house and bank account to operate the drug network delivering dangerous, life-destroying narcotics to the black community. She did not die in her sleep. She died in her hallway in the dark because her boyfriend, without warning, fired his gun at police and wounded one of them. Breonna died because her boyfriend did not warn her to step back out of the hallway when he was about to shoot. In other words everything about the Breonna Taylor case as told by Black Lives Matter is a lie. I've selected 26 of the most prominent cases that Black Lives Matter used to make its case against America's police, and against America itself -- and virtually every case that Black Lives Matter has made against police to fan the flames of Marxist revolt, destroy American cities, and de-fund American police departments is _based on lies_. These lies are not innocent. They're dangerous, and they're jeopardizing the future of our country. _I Can 't Breathe_ is the antidote, debunking Black Lives Matter's bogus claims and arming you with the facts to refute them. [**And if you donate $45 or more to the David Horowitz Freedom Center right now, you 'll be one of the first to receive your copy. If you donate $75 or more, I'll send you a signed copy, and if you donate $100 or more I'll send you a personalized copy.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58429409:6tIOKE2N6:m:1:3253819041:4884BD9212E0622BA76BE50C7061B471:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58429409:6tIOKE2N6:m:1:3253819041:4884BD9212E0622BA76BE50C7061B471:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58429409:6tIOKE2N6:m:1:3253819041:4884BD9212E0622BA76BE50C7061B471:r) You see, this couldn't just be an article or an entry in a database online. Big Tech is working in lockstep with the Democratic Party and Black Lives Matter. They're doing everything they can to silence the truth -- so we have to share the truth where they can't censor it. But first, I think I should introduce myself. My name is David Horowitz and when I was a young man, I led the movement destroying America today. 40 years ago I was a communist... ...and not just any communist. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited a radical, thought leading magazine in the far Left movement. I marched, I chanted, I organized. Thankfully, the veil was lifted, and I saw the radical Left for who they really were. We weren't making America a better, fairer place -- we were ruining everything that made it great. So I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center because I knew what was happening, I knew what was at stake, and I knew that if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, we'd lose our country forever. _What we 're seeing today didn't happen overnight. It's no coincidence. It's no stroke of luck. It's a plot that's been decades in the making._ For decades now, the Freedom Center has been in the trenches, saying what no one else would dare to and warning of what was to come. We've been targeted by MasterCard, DiscoverCard, the Southern Poverty Law Center and so many more because we're effective. My new book is an extension of that, and I want you to be the first to have it. [**So don 't waste a moment -- donate $45 or more to my Freedom Center right away, and as a thank you for your generosity, I'll send you a complimentary copy of _I Can 't Breathe._**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58429409:6tIOKE2N6:m:1:3253819041:4884BD9212E0622BA76BE50C7061B471:r) _If you donate $75 or more, I 'll send you a signed copy, and if you donate $100 or more I'll send you a personalized copy._ Even if you're fully equipped to dispel the Left's lies about police brutality, I know someone in your life needs to read this. **Because America won 't survive if we keep letting them lie.** Just look at what's happened to our cities in the last year. The Black Lives Matter protests and riots last summer ended more black lives in 2 weeks than police took in all of 2019. ...and last summer is just a preview of what's to come if we don't stand up for the truth. The truth is, the United States is the least racist country in the history of the world. The truth is, the only people that benefit from Black Lives Matter are their Marxist leaders -- and of course their race hustling, America hating friends in media and government. The truth is, Black Lives Matter's only purpose is to turn black tragedy into white Leftist power. If you believe our country is worth fighting for, and worth saving from these Left Wing radicals, I hope you'll stand with us. Sincerely, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58429409:6tIOKE2N6:m:1:3253819041:4884BD9212E0622BA76BE50C7061B471:r) David Horowitz P.S. Black Lives Matter's MO is simple: break down law and order, fuel race hatred, destroy America. They use black corpses as props for their Marxist agenda. clean_body: Peter, Black Lives Matter has orchestrated the greatest civil destruction in America in our history. They lie systematically about the deaths of armed black criminals resisting arrest. They lied about George Floyd to incite deadly riots across the country. Even Keith Ellison, an Antifa supporter and - as Minnesota's Attorney General - the chief prosecutor attempting to turn the death of George Floyd into a murder - conceded that they could not find any racial element in Floyd 's death. That's a fact most people don't know. The summer of unprecedented insurrectionary violence by Black Lives Matter was based on a monstrous lie. Black Lives Matter doesn't want to fight "systemic racism" or end police brutality... They 're Fidel Castro-adoring communists, and they want an end to America once and for all. And if patriots like you and me don 't arm yourselves with the facts, they'll get exactly what they've been after. The truth is, when a black person dies at the hands of police, Black Lives Matter is happy. It gives them a martyr for their cause and a phony pretext for calling the police genocidal racists. In fact, as I demonstrate in my latest book I Can 't Breathe: How A Racial Hoax Is Killing America virtually every Black Lives Matter claim is based on a series of brazen lies facilitated by our corrupt national media. Take Breonna Taylor. Black Lives Matter portrayed Breonna as an innocent 26-year-old "murdered" in her home, in her bed, in her sleep by racist cops. In fact Breonna was an active long-term accomplice to a major drug dealer. The cops were at her house (and four others) because Breonna used her house and bank account to operate the drug network delivering dangerous, life-destroying narcotics to the black community. She did not die in her sleep. She died in her hallway in the dark because her boyfriend, without warning, fired his gun at police and wounded one of them. Breonna died because her boyfriend did not warn her to step back out of the hallway when he was about to shoot. In other words everything about the Breonna Taylor case as told by Black Lives Matter is a lie. I've selected 26 of the most prominent cases that Black Lives Matter used to make its case against America's police, and against America itself -- and virtually every case that Black Lives Matter has made against police to fan the flames of Marxist revolt, destroy American cities, and de-fund American police departments is based on lies. These lies are not innocent. They're dangerous, and they're jeopardizing the future of our country. I Can 't Breathe is the antidote, debunking Black Lives Matter's bogus claims and arming you with the facts to refute them. You see, this couldn't just be an article or an entry in a database online. Big Tech is working in lockstep with the Democratic Party and Black Lives Matter. They're doing everything they can to silence the truth -- so we have to share the truth where they can't censor it. But first, I think I should introduce myself. My name is David Horowitz and when I was a young man, I led the movement destroying America today. 40 years ago I was a communist... ...and not just any communist. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited a radical, thought leading magazine in the far Left movement. I marched, I chanted, I organized. Thankfully, the veil was lifted, and I saw the radical Left for who they really were. We weren't making America a better, fairer place -- we were ruining everything that made it great. So I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center because I knew what was happening, I knew what was at stake, and I knew that if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, we'd lose our country forever. What we 're seeing today didn't happen overnight. It's no coincidence. It's no stroke of luck. It's a plot that's been decades in the making. For decades now, the Freedom Center has been in the trenches, saying what no one else would dare to and warning of what was to come. We've been targeted by MasterCard, DiscoverCard, the Southern Poverty Law Center and so many more because we're effective. My new book is an extension of that, and I want you to be the first to have it. If you donate $75 or more, I 'll send you a signed copy, and if you donate $100 or more I'll send you a personalized copy. Even if you're fully equipped to dispel the Left's lies about police brutality, I know someone in your life needs to read this. Because America won 't survive if we keep letting them lie. Just look at what's happened to our cities in the last year. The Black Lives Matter protests and riots last summer ended more black lives in 2 weeks than police took in all of 2019. ...and last summer is just a preview of what's to come if we don't stand up for the truth. The truth is, the United States is the least racist country in the history of the world. The truth is, the only people that benefit from Black Lives Matter are their Marxist leaders -- and of course their race hustling, America hating friends in media and government. The truth is, Black Lives Matter's only purpose is to turn black tragedy into white Leftist power. If you believe our country is worth fighting for, and worth saving from these Left Wing radicals, I hope you'll stand with us. Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. Black Lives Matter's MO is simple: break down law and order, fuel race hatred, destroy America. They use black corpses as props for their Marxist agenda. I wrote I Can 't Breathe because I want patriots like you to have the information you need to expose and defeat their deceit to the American people, The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. clean_body: Will you follow President Trump on social media? | | | Peter, We’ve been asking and asking, but we still haven’t heard from everyone. That’s why we’re emailing you directly. We need to know by 11:59 PM TONIGHT where you stand. It’s important. | Do you support President Trump in starting his own social media site? | | | | Thank you. Republican Polling Alerts

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Special interests are trying to block our progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
They're spending millions of dollars right now in D.C. to spread lies about the Democrats' agenda for working people. We need more people in Congress with the courage to take on corporate power.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36641818/308728411/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_210928OB_EOQ_CD_6_G_N_Logo&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODNiZTRkMy1hZjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7wADlHifJfVHh9hi1YmVP7pMXc6vbpWX2fIP7tHVoIk=)
