Derek, right-wing special interests are mobilizing and spending millions to stop the Democrats from delivering on jobs, healthcare, infrastructure, and the social safety net for western Pennsylvanians and the American people. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36641820/308728412/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_210928OB_EOQ_CD_6_G_N_P1&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODNiZTRkMy1hZjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7wADlHifJfVHh9hi1YmVP7pMXc6vbpWX2fIP7tHVoIk=) One of the reasons I'm running for Congress is to reign in corporate power and the influence of right-wing special interests. **Weeks like this show precisely why that's necessary.**

[**If you believe it's time for more members of Congress with the courage to fight for working people and take on special interests, please chip in anything you can to support my grassroots campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36641822/308728413/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_210928OB_EOQ_CD_6_G_N_L1&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODNiZTRkMy1hZjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7wADlHifJfVHh9hi1YmVP7pMXc6vbpWX2fIP7tHVoIk=) ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36641823/308728414/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_210928OB_EOQ_CD_6_G_N_B1&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODNiZTRkMy1hZjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7wADlHifJfVHh9hi1YmVP7pMXc6vbpWX2fIP7tHVoIk=)**** In 2020, Democrats and President Biden got elected because they ran on ambitious plans to reinvest in the American people (including right here in western Pennsylvania) — plans to make government work for the common good, with ambition much like FDR's New Deal nearly a century ago.

But we're having to fight inch by inch to deliver for the American people in the face of waves of corporate-backed misinformation and attack ads.

**If we can meet our goal by September 30 on the strength of grassroots supporters like you, we'll send a powerful message to all the special interests who would try to stop us.[We're currently $3,857 short of our goal — can you chip in today to help us close the gap by Thursday?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36641825/308728416/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_210928OB_EOQ_CD_6_G_N_L2&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODNiZTRkMy1hZjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7wADlHifJfVHh9hi1YmVP7pMXc6vbpWX2fIP7tHVoIk=)** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36641826/308728418/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_210928OB_EOQ_CD_6_G_N_B2&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODNiZTRkMy1hZjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7wADlHifJfVHh9hi1YmVP7pMXc6vbpWX2fIP7tHVoIk=)**** Thank you,

Chris | | | **Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy.** ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36641827/308728420/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_210928OB_EOQ_CD_6_G_N_BioBox&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODNiZTRkMy1hZjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7wADlHifJfVHh9hi1YmVP7pMXc6vbpWX2fIP7tHVoIk=)****

name: Diego Rodriguez
subject: Where I'm coming from
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Diego for AG
body:
Diego shares where he comes from, where he's going, and how you can help. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36641840/308728434/-1716317403?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjNiZTRkMy1hZjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-6SRoO_DhK3_uU5ybHyWM_DafpQSbzfocEbfKQ43GHw=&emci=3a5a305b-ae20-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=ff3be4d3-af20-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=10950315)
---
Friend, [**_In a minute, I’m going to ask you to join our campaign as a FOUNDING DONOR._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36641841/308728438/2127152568?refcode=X_092821_EOQ_C&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjNiZTRkMy1hZjIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-6SRoO_DhK3_uU5ybHyWM_DafpQSbzfocEbfKQ43GHw=) But first, let me tell you where I’m coming from.

Like a lot of you, I didn’t come from money. **I’m the grandson of farmworkers and the son of a single mom.** I grew up in a trailer with six brothers and sisters. But I worked my butt off, earned a scholarship to Notre Dame, and graduated Law School here in Arizona.

Since then, **I’ve spent my entire career fighting for people** facing economic hardship, racism, and unfair obstacles to getting a fair opportunity to build a life and to thrive in this great state.

**I’m proud of how far I’ve come, but also of where I come from.**

My success is due to the hard work and sacrifice of my mother. I look back at what she was able to achieve -- raising seven kids on her own, working to make ends meet -- and I’m still in awe.

I’m the grandson of farmworkers and the son of a single mom. I grew up in a trailer with six brothers and sisters. But I worked my butt off, earned a scholarship to Notre Dame, and graduated Law School here in Arizona. Since then, I’ve spent my entire career fighting for people facing economic hardship, racism, and unfair obstacles to getting a fair opportunity to build a life and to thrive in this great state. I’m proud of how far I’ve come, but also of where I come from. My success is due to the hard work and sacrifice of my mother. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Latest news predicts Trump 2024 win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Think Joe Biden is going to sail into another term? Think again, Peter. Donald Trump is “99 to 100 percent likely” to run for reelection in 2024, according to CNN Analysis. It would shock exactly nobody if Trump cleared the floor of other Republican candidates, just like he did in 2016. That could easily lead to another catastrophic, authoritarian Trump presidency. Remember, Trump simply refused to govern on three major disasters that Biden has since inherited:
* **First, the COVID-19 public health crisis.** Trump's abject mistrust of the scientific community and unbelievably dangerous anti-vaccine rhetoric has cost hundreds of thousands of lives during the pandemic.

* **Second, a deep recession brought on by the pandemic.** Trump not only failed to fix the pandemic economy, he made it worse by placing blind faith in his business-world cronies and their archaic, backward, and disproven conservative economics.

* **Third, the withdrawal from Afghanistan.** Trump cut an absurd, tactless deal with the Taliban, and with his typical isolationist bombast he totally disregarded all precedent of cooperation with our regional allies\-- including, unbelievably, the Afghan government\-- who could have helped prevent the current humanitarian crisis.

Democrats are in trouble. The last thing hardworking Americans deserve is for Trump to blame his mistakes on his successor in a cynical attempt to retake the White House. But that's exactly what's about to happen. See, egomaniac Trump has been busy promoting his “Big Lie” conspiracy over the last year because he knows these three disasters could be pinned to him and wreck his chances in 2024. With sycophants running for Congress on the idea that Democrats somehow rigged the election for Joe Biden, Trump is testing the waters. All he needs is a strong showing in 2022, and he'll officially launch his campaign knowing that his plants will, as election experts suggest, use their new power “to perpetuate Big Lie 2.0 on January 6, 2025.” Look, the Republicans only need to flip five seats to dissolve our razor-thin House majority. Midterm elections typically follow a deeply disturbing trend: the party in power tends to lose seats. Remember, Republicans flipped a whopping 63 seats under Obama in 2010. The president's part has only gained seats in Congress during the midterms FOUR TIMES in American history. There's no alternative. We can't just protect our majorities this time around, we must EXPAND them. The game is essentially tied right now, so we can't just play defense, we've got to go on OFFENSE. When Democrats Turn Out will go on offense in 2022. That means:
* **Strong, early support for Raphael Warnock.** (CNN just ranked Warnock's seat #2 MOST LIKELY TO FLIP.)

* **Electing Val Demmings to the Senate.** Demmings will end Marco Rubio's disastrous Senate career\-- Floridians and Americans will be unspeakably grateful.

* **Supporting all smart, progressive Congressional campaigns.** We did it in 2018 and flipped 41 seats under Trump to win our historic House majority.

It would be careless not to think ahead on this. A strong showing in the 2022 midterms is absolutely fundamental to warding off Donald Trump and securing another Biden term in 2024. But too many Democrats wiped their hands clean of politics after Joe Biden was inaugurated. They don't remember how crushed we felt when we watched Donald Trump soar above Hillary Clinton in 2016. They think that ousting Trump one time last year was good enough. Truth is, they're just not paying attention. Some of the biggest names in media like Joe Rogan are already predicting that “Trump is probably gonna win.” And a new Rasmussen poll says “48% of Americans want Trump to run in 2024, most say he'll win.” Trump hasn't gone ANYWHERE. If we rely on these kinds of Democrats then we'll be in trouble. Well, Peter, we're not reaching out to you because we think you're likely to take it easy. Every electoral victory\-- from regaining the House in 2018 to electing Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in 2020\-- opens up another harder, messier, longer political battle to fight. The most important elections of our lifetimes are always ahead of us. At When Democrats Turn Out we've dedicated ourselves to expanding our House and Senate majorities, no matter how much effort that takes. We've charted out an aggressive nationwide digital and ground plan to fire up Democrats and launch a blue wave in next year's midterms. But now that so many Democrats have given in, Republicans are gaining critical ground in the early stages of the single most important election of the 2020s. Will you set yourself apart from the crowd and prove why Democrats have a reputation for solidarity? **[We simply can't go it alone. Please, take a few minutes to chip in whatever you can. Your vital donation will go directly to our efforts to support embattled Democrat campaigns across the country. They need all the help they can get to stand up to Donald Trump's unprincipled, radical Republican party. Could you spare $5 right now to help shore up our critical early-stage fund?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36642096/308729106/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210928_GEN_FDR_J&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiM2JlNGQzLWFmMjAtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTEwYTQwNSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-39jUir19ThdHgHEfbxf4noR9jJnYJl3Rt190lnlirs=)** Thank you for everything you do to help our movement. We would be lost without you. \- When Democrats Turn Out | **[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36642097/308729107/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210928_GEN_FDR_J&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiM2JlNGQzLWFmMjAtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTEwYTQwNSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-39jUir19ThdHgHEfbxf4noR9jJnYJl3Rt190lnlirs=)**

body:
This must not continue. This must not continue. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f1a24d2f4a9c4591afd360d56e7f9d0b&_e=CkRHOPvofeDjieZjRPZ64LPCnWxxK5s3ndhspG1U7Iij7wGw41KZNpuIMPCMgKfxhBJLfStcONfEhJuMNxSFeHvPv-QciVVfRaXWne2EkMK5AQJP1GQU5m5RA3IjT_WUdgK6JMDW_ZlboR_0VmI_NYoHNbND3vQhR4bMD0SVdkTMoevVpYGXOCpwbaGoVtvQrY0aNksGtWIkFhm1dnB2b0XwLp2yRgVRid-E6GAnb9vzMw4eqRABMPWGWDD62f3i1PxeIovxnWyXN4XeLgH2ed4d8UeHxBvTQA904hHn3rT3JUpKZq91bzQcUV1LT53osdHCZGNAHLyUVkuTSGNEzdZsLyrbU4goE77fTJfbMd6RnNyFewTNYbUgSas-q-7R_SQc98mosoLpPBLUfg_0mA%3D%3D)
---
They are not just amassing under a bridge waiting for their turn to come across the Rio Grande into Texas - illegals are now actually setting up domiciles here on Texas soil - in deer stands, barns, and anywhere else they can take shelter on the property of others.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f1a24d2f4a9c4591afd360d56e7f9d0b&_e=CkRHOPvofeDjieZjRPZ64LPCnWxxK5s3ndhspG1U7Iij7wGw41KZNpuIMPCMgKfxhBJLfStcONfEhJuMNxSFeHvPv-QciVVfRaXWne2EkMK5AQJP1GQU5m5RA3IjT_WUdgK6JMDW_ZlboR_0VmI_NYoHNbND3vQhR4bMD0SVdkRK9Pt6Cq9JIWx0OmaQO0LVfJqZCbCrqWSWDmDctFQS_-eWgfYmXKWbpMuwIhDqM-Ims_eaQnfMHs7ixwTmllEyEXaDW3ZoEC0jdbXeM9dCOdBrLMq6h0DKfEf5NDe99RE46BKIfsrMU7Ot3ZOK2DUirOQiRVJCnGwMRgZ1T31PBDTYom9avtBW-mceD_rBLILbOjf3I1-dIVUxqkfTqSbfrMgZDqY2iCgRhV1G_Ou2Nw%3D%3D)
[**STOP THE INVASION ➞**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f1a24d2f4a9c4591afd360d56e7f9d0b&_e=CkRHOPvofeDjieZjRPZ64LPCnWxxK5s3ndhspG1U7Iij7wGw41KZNpuIMPCMgKfxhBJLfStcONfEhJuMNxSFeHvPv-QciVVfRaXWne2EkMK5AQJP1GQU5m5RA3IjT_WUdgK6JMDW_ZlboR_0VmI_NYoHNbND3vQhR4bMD0SVdkQUOT3sOcsvg9eOtoIta3wKzJDVoEO-plxqexue0cKekBNHF7R6iSR_7tfa1gDOmppgjj5f380iANJzJFJyhJjimnbInDzOXdkIP_sj5__ADTP8QN8nOYqoVY5wA9cRLLxkWtuokJSSE7TYPb0Wzc0JL7vsgPRozjBmc6PaoMs13AJ4QyXGh_bXANcN6JHQsQeR9K2veG4TZ6DRJLq3jsmntK2l-jFEzcsdahMYFPkPhQ%3D%3D)
This is an invasion, Peter - and Texans should not be subjected to this invasion and the criminal incursions of foreign strangers on their private property.

That is on top of all the other dangers: the child and sex trafficking, the deadly gang violence and drugs, and even terrorists with unknown plans and destinations.

Peter, this must NOT continue. Texas - and America - are counting on a true leader to step up and defend our people and our sovereignty, while Gov. Abbott sends letters to Joe Biden asking for the declaration of an emergency.

[** STOP the Invasion at the Rio Grande! ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f1a24d2f4a9c4591afd360d56e7f9d0b&_e=CkRHOPvofeDjieZjRPZ64LPCnWxxK5s3ndhspG1U7Iij7wGw41KZNpuIMPCMgKfxhBJLfStcONfEhJuMNxSFeHvPv-QciVVfRaXWne2EkMK5AQJP1GQU5m5RA3IjT_WUdgK6JMDW_ZlboR_0VmI_NYoHNbND3vQhR4bMD0SVdkQ-m65uNeW5gLhkYlbEru5hawg6yUYSPKIGo1u6bOHShmNLaxpdAqMl2FygR2MTGdQohH2d7Ve28BQqCQAYIKdJVzAazWKT57f5hVFix5VzsMBQ8xBog6w7hP1heOfOpt1yXSSw-W9cmRd_YyM3Qo78o8yL0xrtWzc7XJDmmfXg86EuzVnQsmsDs7VcIV9LnpJRSQUR3BEmFazUCVOk1aCjBfr3xORgX7_2HbAvm5y1Fg%3D%3D)
Texans know there is an emergency: it is the lack of leadership in Texas to resolve this scourge - leadership I am ready to provide as the next Governor of Texas - and with your help, I can be.

Peter, if I am elected Governor, I will not tolerate the best interests or rights of Texans being sacrificed at the altar of a leftist open borders agenda. Texans must come first.

Peter, this is a huge failure of leadership in Austin. Why hasn't Gov. Greg Abbott taken on the Biden regime and acted to halt the invasion?

[**Will you join me in this fight, Peter?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f1a24d2f4a9c4591afd360d56e7f9d0b&_e=CkRHOPvofeDjieZjRPZ64LPCnWxxK5s3ndhspG1U7Iij7wGw41KZNpuIMPCMgKfxhBJLfStcONfEhJuMNxSFeHvPv-QciVVfRaXWne2EkMK5AQJP1GQU5m5RA3IjT_WUdgK6JMDW_ZlboR_0VmI_NYoHNbND3vQhR4bMD0SVdkSLEV7_dstJXGReXS2s-MS1lZU8Y6m6O8_2pnLfXFUdt9Tu753uyvwjSFFNlALYgDdYXrHX38V8hGoTwrKJLmEwobhGqZ-kf--0BY1LbET32C63S8itZ2sI4378iggkDeUSvCTeOlIjGj4E4mvdNBMcvNPigCd_FkndN5idaSjuKPzvbwJEP817vKZy7Ghcc6HC6yDKlunc5IKdaipwUkqv1A9RR8REMTtwIrKVhTtDIQ%3D%3D)

[**Your generous grassroots contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 - or even more - to my campaign will help me reach Texas voters with my winning, conservative message and bring the tough, principled leadership we need in Austin to meet this challenge.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f1a24d2f4a9c4591afd360d56e7f9d0b&_e=CkRHOPvofeDjieZjRPZ64LPCnWxxK5s3ndhspG1U7Iij7wGw41KZNpuIMPCMgKfxhBJLfStcONfEhJuMNxSFeHvPv-QciVVfRaXWne2EkMK5AQJP1GQU5m5RA3IjT_WUdgK6JMDW_ZlboR_0VmI_NYoHNbND3vQhR4bMD0SVdkSACbzjCls2br4eXoxjSQuEyqgxpjFtK5gSfy9dOgY9VTjC747aAkMh6xA2pRhqp3GQNBjZlisRk2ev03thiE0-eK1JnSkHH03gyH-xJ0CWbeKbSgI_30XAPL_70ukQqoLsko7qIU-_YOhUKoJLFiyu2UXB50pdpwUpcTD1Zjq5OhGe9a3vAH_tquVmmvNo3zSX6KnId4dkbV9SkI-HMHMTdCkKEMPn_a8KQh71960xrg%3D%3D)

Thank you, Peter - I hope to hear from you today!

Steadfast and Loyal,

clean_body: This must not continue. This must not continue. | They are not just amassing under a bridge waiting for their turn to come across the Rio Grande into Texas - illegals are now actually setting up domiciles here on Texas soil - in deer stands, barns, and anywhere else they can take shelter on the property of others. This is an invasion, Peter - and Texans should not be subjected to this invasion and the criminal incursions of foreign strangers on their private property. That is on top of all the other dangers: the child and sex trafficking, the deadly gang violence and drugs, and even terrorists with unknown plans and destinations. Peter, this must NOT continue. Texas - and America - are counting on a true leader to step up and defend our people and our sovereignty, while Gov. Abbott sends letters to Joe Biden asking for the declaration of an emergency. Texans know there is an emergency: it is the lack of leadership in Texas to resolve this scourge - leadership I am ready to provide as the next Governor of Texas - and with your help, I can be. Peter, if I am elected Governor, I will not tolerate the best interests or rights of Texans being sacrificed at the altar of a leftist open borders agenda. Texans must come first. Peter, this is a huge failure of leadership in Austin. Why hasn't Gov. Greg Abbott taken on the Biden regime and acted to halt the invasion? Thank you, Peter - I hope to hear from you today! subject: $2,659 short of our quarterly goal

body:
We're so close to hitting our quarterly goal of raising $250,000 online. We just need a few donors to help us come up with the last bit I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. |
---
Peter,

If you’ve been keeping track of our progress this month, then you’ll know that we’ve been making steady progress towards our goal of raising $250,000 via online contributions in the 3rd quarter. Why? Because if I’m able to hit that mark, t**hen I’ll be among the first Republican candidates for office this cycle to gain entry into the coveted “Young Guns” program though the RNC.**

The program would open so many doors for our campaign, including but not limited to:
1. Additional endorsements from national political figures
2. Access to major donor fundraising networks throughout the country
3. Dedicated campaign support from the National Republican Congressional Committee

**We’re now 48 hours out from the Thursday evening fundraising deadline and we’re coming SO STINKING close to hitting our goal. As I’m writing this email, we’re just $2,659 dollars short of hitting the quarter-million mark!**

We’ve been pounding the pavement all quarter and it’s paying off. The first time I wrote to you about our goal for this month on September 7th, we were more than $91,000 short.

Then, when we wrote to you this past weekend, we were $19,000 short of hitting our goal. **We’re about to hit our all-important goal and cannot let up now**. Won’t you please make a gift of whatever you can at this time? We simply cannot come up short with such little left to raise.

[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=aa02b4e8ead946b9bfea5728f1601ff4&_e=K5YVw64nk8jvT6dWEztXS-bXKB2CcRCFHPyheTtGFgfSK1Bb-nRBV5JSM6uXOrQJjWLdhNO6JwPbnD-D00gb4_EUPYBE5spqKgrTDvU0O8PU9dMzZU6UcYDy73pxQ5rM_QP1yj5JsR0MbVgvEp8PNPJ0k8N116BnpikQUhtw71JZL60CxccfqrWjpWGkRaB_U6ndrrVxcFRzVZuZDkxku-20IDc0uKtGMUbC_nr-YhPgfrLNdKpKPRPbQpf3szWgkEktKIp20lF1rqxWEBsFWKhm2yTGmuH3jzlEZA2WLm6nnn3YZblIhL-RJ4CIRxgivLOfYLyVZr6rsC3uOfzI9cxhzUzH7wsxoFln3GwPNMWFE8cyxqazMsTKhrBQRLm1BY07JRhM1EAEy9SA27SMc7ZoDtivPd1VShMX8R1g7m2q8JHWjLFTllhqKzd-OgDt)
I’m including my original email from September 8th if you haven’t yet read the first email in this series of donations requests.

Best,
Alek

Peter,

Have you heard of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s “**Young Gun’s Program?** ” I hadn’t either until my first campaign for Congress last year.

I’d like to give you an explanation as to what the purpose of the program is and **[why I need your financial assistance to gain acceptance.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=aa02b4e8ead946b9bfea5728f1601ff4&_e=K5YVw64nk8jvT6dWEztXS-bXKB2CcRCFHPyheTtGFgfSK1Bb-nRBV5JSM6uXOrQJjWLdhNO6JwPbnD-D00gb4_EUPYBE5spqKgrTDvU0O8PU9dMzZU6UcYDy73pxQ5rM_QP1yj5JsR0MbVgvEp8PNPJ0k8N116BnpikQUhtw71JZL60CxccfqrWjpWGkRaB_U6ndrrVxcFRzVZuZDkxku-20IDc0uKtGMUbC_nr-YhPyOhH86JoMoQchYhc3uBfE1inZjJ2l8OYG8BXUb4yV3aG_HvskFyn4GaeG7w-Ry26T9pFeyOQnrtpG1LQyCtMZ_X8aKfjS_5_7xB_b78Q0js6A0gCymzKSN01mZjTOdyhZzmYniuyVZ1wsBLKaTuFljT8Hup26SG7tBza8d1S5M2OlqFouFGyN6CogXVNZq8EyUFG6twlq3yflh-oBym6b) **

The Young Guns program serves to help Republican candidates running in some of the most competitive districts around the country with a playbook on how to vanquish Democrat opposition, along with providing strategic support on everything from polling, fundraising, advertising and grassroots outreach. **Membership is exclusive and serves to recognize candidates who have proven that they can raise enough money online to sustain their campaigns without help from Washington, D.C.** – and prove they can WIN.

**[If you’re a frequent flyer, you might equate it to elite-level status. Only the entrance fee for this program isn’t flying hundreds of thousands of miles per year, it’s raising $250,000 in one fundraising quarter.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=aa02b4e8ead946b9bfea5728f1601ff4&_e=K5YVw64nk8jvT6dWEztXS-bXKB2CcRCFHPyheTtGFgfSK1Bb-nRBV5JSM6uXOrQJjWLdhNO6JwPbnD-D00gb4_EUPYBE5spqKgrTDvU0O8PU9dMzZU6UcYDy73pxQ5rM_QP1yj5JsR0MbVgvEp8PNPJ0k8N116BnpikQUhtw71JZL60CxccfqrWjpWGkRaB_U6ndrrVxcFRzVZuZDkxku-20IDc0uKtGMUbC_nr-YhPO_NP7KHrWMn79ImjIAR0cL50MBtjf8czlObhBrqUnoOpTlroFta-om1svyhUObpT14GhHoBmUOVuYxhAcvHYjxwaV4-y1xo1FRCbO6Ty1MIT7uMYE0mx0bSG5pGQBUbJKE5XoeCNd3KIOZ3LwZksEPHB40GUe1aEJHZi8HS-S8iReqao8NHcWkY2gtx3TkpGOShinHnzKxiyYU1GPTBJB)**

We just need a few donors to help us come up with the last bit I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, If you’ve been keeping track of our progress this month, then you’ll know that we’ve been making steady progress towards our goal of raising $250,000 via online contributions in the 3rd quarter. Why? Because if I’m able to hit that mark, then I’ll be among the first Republican candidates for office this cycle to gain entry into the coveted “Young Guns” program though the RNC. The program would open so many doors for our campaign, including but not limited to: 1. Additional endorsements from national political figures 2. Access to major donor fundraising networks throughout the country 3. Dedicated campaign support from the National Republican Congressional Committee We’re now 48 hours out from the Thursday evening fundraising deadline and we’re coming SO STINKING close to hitting our goal. As I’m writing this email, we’re just $2,659 dollars short of hitting the quarter-million mark! We’ve been pounding the pavement all quarter and it’s paying off. The first time I wrote to you about our goal for this month on September 7th, we were more than $91,000 short. Then, when we wrote to you this past weekend, we were $19,000 short of hitting our goal. We’re about to hit our all-important goal and cannot let up now. Won’t you please make a gift of whatever you can at this time? We simply cannot come up short with such little left to raise. I’m including my original email from September 8th if you haven’t yet read the first email in this series of donations requests. Best, Alek \-----Forwarded message----- From: Alek Skarlatos - info@alekfororegon.com Date: September 7, 2021 Subject: Quick email about my September goal To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, Have you heard of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s “Young Gun’s Program? ” I hadn’t either until my first campaign for Congress last year. I’d like to give you an explanation as to what the purpose of the program is and The Young Guns program serves to help Republican candidates running in some of the most competitive districts around the country with a playbook on how to vanquish Democrat opposition, along with providing strategic support on everything from polling, fundraising, advertising and grassroots outreach. Membership is exclusive and serves to recognize candidates who have proven that they can raise enough money online to sustain their campaigns without help from Washington, D.C. – and prove they can WIN. This year, I’m aiming to be one of the first candidates to qualify for the program because with my race expected to be one of the closest in the nation for a second year in a row, . If you’re interested in making an investment in flipping the House Republican, you needn’t look further than this email. I’m asking you to help me secure ‘Young Gun’ status this month with a to my campaign right now. May I please count on your help right now? | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | With sincere thanks, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. body:
Grassroots donations from real working people are how we fund this movement
#

Friend,
The fate of the Senate is going to come down to Pennsylvania — meaning that the fate of working people comes down to Pennsylvania. And this race is going to be close.
Close enough that it's a toss-up whether we win this race and expand our Democratic majority, or Mitch McConnell gets closer to taking his power back.
Sorry to put that dark thought into your head, but that's the reality of this race.
That’s why we’re asking for $3 ahead of our federally mandated fundraising deadline on Thursday.
Now, you’re probably thinking – how can $3 make any difference when we know Republicans will flood this race with dark money?
Well, by the time you read this, someone already chipped in $3 to this email. And they’re hoping you’ll do the same. Because it all adds up, and that’s our whole strategy: Building the biggest, boldest coalition.
[So we’re politely asking: Could you please make a $3 contribution to help Malcolm Kenyatta win this race and take our fight for working families to the U.S. Senate? body:

[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zhkRCb1IEUbKN0NGVinwHycy0zhZnNHb8-fCzX4KtoZFGA_VpLRnIRhMPfGNA71gJxNjGsrkCGxyOUTEN2Td5Lnm68gOazhpXZoD3VqG2_-B1Ucb9YGsrkmV7OQYbyn-btNZ1bGCSU-NvXNqSlcJ3CB8LdKtjLL1nTGIRDZBIzIZqKxt75RpiDR3euIgq81-STWthVN8wUfKc3Vy_MH9AAgHpZYAlN1NwsosXaH8BsPsaRXUn1U3xSz2UyrnOUglwbfvFpIVpmpEApa6LcXMKfWXzhFElNOXKTkudQ5h1wlZktzkEjkMNlc3afNJRRDhEoV0i6FBBwtTdeTjg1X_4dUsaEQZTdd1qyek8CkdURAb26JQA7OHHpUON50qxNv54/3fp/BoRStRChSkGr94VxmqPAFg/h0/E2u0DwUzmh19S3A0BKJ_IkAPEo9_mYG81fzcro2Xu7A)
| | Folks, I’ve heard what the skeptics are saying about my race. As we approach our end-of-quarter goal, they’re saying we might not have the energy to take this fight all the way — **which is a bunch of baloney.** I’ll let you in on a few hints on why it’s not a good idea to underestimate our campaign.
1. **My team and I were underestimated in 2018** when we first ran to flip this state blue. Skeptics were saying it was too close to call but, we kept our heads down and did the organizing work that mattered.
2. **Our grassroots team of supporters has only continued to grow** since that point. And here we are again with some folks already counting us out. _Have they learned nothing about what we’re capable of from 2018?!_

clean_body: A bunch of baloney | | | | | Folks, I’ve heard what the skeptics are saying about my race. As we approach our end-of-quarter goal, they’re saying we might not have the energy to take this fight all the way — which is a bunch of baloney. I’ll let you in on a few hints on why it’s not a good idea to underestimate our campaign. 1. My team and I were underestimated in 2018 when we first ran to flip this state blue. Skeptics were saying it was too close to call but, we kept our heads down and did the organizing work that mattered. 2. Our grassroots team of supporters has only continued to grow since that point. And here we are again with some folks already counting us out. Have they learned nothing about what we’re capable of from 2018?! | | | | | | | | | | | | | Don’t get me wrong, folks. This race is absolutely going to be a close one. That said, I’m not in the business of letting people count out the movement that supporters — like you! — have helped us build. And for those who do count us out, they’re making a big mistake! I won my last race by a little over four points and it could be even closer this time around. But, I know my supporters will pull through to help us reach our end-of-quarter goal, putting us on a trajectory that’s closest to victory. | | | | | | | | | | | | If we work together, we can show the pundits (again) that this team can do big things. Thanks a bunch, Steve P.S. Thanks to you, our team has accomplished so much in such a short amount of time. Let’s keep up the momentum and hit this end-of-quarter goal to show what we’re capable of. | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. name: Victor Steiner via, MaxSteinerforCongress.com
subject: I lost my home to the Carr Fire.
body:
In 2018, my wife Jessie and I lost our home to the Carr Fire, which raged in Shasta and Trinity Counties. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36644653/308734967/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWE3Mjc2MS1iNzIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jNyToiQA1uYf4ffKs2qdnWUETH076FsPFex82XfO1PE=)
Hey friend 👋 -- My name is Victor Steiner, Max's brother.

Max is busy with his end-of-quarter fundraising push right now, so I thought I'd chime in about an issue that’s important to both of us.

**In 2018, my wife Jessie and I lost our entire home to the Carr Fire.** As you can imagine, it was a trying time for both of us. We also had to evacuate the cats and dogs from Jessie's veterinary clinic nearby.

We watched coverage of the fire from the safety of my dad’s house in Sacramento. I remember seeing a reporter in front of a burned down house. I realized that house was ours, and it was confirmation that we had lost it all. We were just grateful we were able to get out in time.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36644654/308734968/-109236511?refcode=em-92821-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWE3Mjc2MS1iNzIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jNyToiQA1uYf4ffKs2qdnWUETH076FsPFex82XfO1PE=)
_Clearing the rubble after we lost our home._
One big takeaway from all this is that we can't keep kicking the can down the road when it comes to wildland fires, forest management, and our climate crisis.

We need a leader in Congress who will listen to fire and forest management experts, firefighters, and community members. We need someone in office who will not back down from what science says about our changing environment. That's a big reason why Max is in this race, because our current representative Doug LaMalfa is a climate science denier

I know that once voters hear from Max, they’ll love him. The challenge he faces is that he's going up against a five-term incumbent with access to tons of GOP cash. Max needs to raise resources to reach more voters so they know he's viable, which is why I’m reaching out today:

**[Max is coming up short of where he needs to be before his first end-of-quarter deadline hits Thursday. Will you chip in $3 before 11:59 pm tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36644655/308734969/-109236511?refcode=em-92821-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWE3Mjc2MS1iNzIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jNyToiQA1uYf4ffKs2qdnWUETH076FsPFex82XfO1PE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36644656/308734970/-109236511?refcode=em-92821-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWE3Mjc2MS1iNzIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jNyToiQA1uYf4ffKs2qdnWUETH076FsPFex82XfO1PE=)

clean_body: In 2018, my wife Jessie and I lost our home to the Carr Fire, which raged in Shasta and Trinity Counties. | = Hey friend 👋 -- My name is Victor Steiner, Max's brother. Max is busy with his end-of-quarter fundraising push right now, so I thought I'd chime in about an issue that’s important to both of us. In 2018, my wife Jessie and I lost our entire home to the Carr Fire. As you can imagine, it was a trying time for both of us. We also had to evacuate the cats and dogs from Jessie's veterinary clinic nearby. We watched coverage of the fire from the safety of my dad’s house in Sacramento. I remember seeing a reporter in front of a burned down house. I realized that house was ours, and it was confirmation that we had lost it all. We were just grateful we were able to get out in time. = Clearing the rubble after we lost our home. One big takeaway from all this is that we can't keep kicking the can down the road when it comes to wildland fires, forest management, and our climate crisis. We need a leader in Congress who will listen to fire and forest management experts, firefighters, and community members. We need someone in office who will not back down from what science says about our changing environment. That's a big reason why Max is in this race, because our current representative Doug LaMalfa is a climate science denier I know that once voters hear from Max, they’ll love him. The challenge he faces is that he's going up against a five-term incumbent with access to tons of GOP cash. Max needs to raise resources to reach more voters so they know he's viable, which is why I’m reaching out today: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I may be a little biased, but our community needs someone like Max in Congress. We are confronting some serious issues, and it’s about time we had someone there who will treat issues like climate change with the attention they deserve. Thanks for reading, Victor Steiner = = | = Max Steiner is a combat veteran, foreign service officer, and Democrat running to flip California's 1st District from red to blue. body:
All you have to do is donate $10 or more to claim your official Team Fetterman yard sign.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210928-2808-header&t=1&akid=2808%2E434096%2EMpexVJ)
We've got big news to share with yinz...
**Yard signs are now in stock!!!** And we might be a *little* biased, but we think these union-made signs would look great in your yard, window, or really wherever you want.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30248?refcode=em20210928-2808&t=2&akid=2808%2E434096%2EMpexVJ)
[**_Chip in $10 or more, and we'll send you an official Team Fetterman yard sign straight to your door. And here's a BIG way we're planning on sweetening the deal: If you're located in Pennsylvania, John and Gisele *might* just hand deliver your sign to you._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30248?refcode=em20210928-2808&t=3&akid=2808%2E434096%2EMpexVJ) 👇
**[Get Your Yard Sign →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30248?refcode=em20210928-2808&t=4&akid=2808%2E434096%2EMpexVJ)**
**John and Gisele are planning to make a handful of stops across the Commonwealth to help personally deliver these awesome new signs — so by chipping in $10 or more, you could wind up with John and Gisele Fetterman knocking at your door!**
FYI, John was really clear to our team about keeping costs as low as possible on these — so $10 is just enough to cover printing, shipping, and distribution.
But if you can donate more than that, you'll be directly supporting other huge priorities for our campaign like our statewide organizing program, targeted digital ads, and keeping John and Gisele on the road meeting with voters across our big, beautiful Commonwealth.
[**_So, Peter, you in? Chip in $10 or more at this link, and you'll get your official Team Fetterman yard sign delivered straight to you. And if you're in PA, you might even wind up with these two at your front door!_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30248?refcode=em20210928-2808&t=5&akid=2808%2E434096%2EMpexVJ)
**[Get Your Yard Sign →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30248?refcode=em20210928-2808&t=6&akid=2808%2E434096%2EMpexVJ)**
Thanks,
— All of us at Team Fetterman HQ
P.S. We're so proud to share that these signs are union-made right here in Pittsburgh, PA. And we can't wait to ship them out all across Pennsylvania's 67 counties to show the size and strength of our campaign to elect John Fetterman. [** _Chip in $10 or more to this special link, and we'll send you an official Team Fetterman yard sign very soon._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30248?refcode=em20210928-2808&t=7&akid=2808%2E434096%2EMpexVJ)

keep Susan in Congress fighting for the folks of the Greater Lehigh Valley and the entire nation.

| Peter,

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to [_**contribute to my friend Susan Wild’s campaign**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36645220/308738283/-1930076705?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210928-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzYyZDRjMS1iODIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M3Ugtc3UPsfCuAgOSwsLSriCWZFq3jbVxkwWhZtzmDc=) before her crucial FEC filing deadline at the end of the month. But first, I’d like to tell you why it’s so important that we keep Susan in Congress fighting for the folks of the Greater Lehigh Valley and the entire nation.

Susan told me that she’s been having a tough time with fundraising in the past months. I get it — summer is a time when folks want to be outside and away from their computers, and they should be! **But here’s the deal: if we lose Susan’s seat, we have no chance of holding on to our House majority in 2022.[_So I’m asking you, Peter — will you chip in to Susan’s re-election campaign before her FEC quarterly filing deadline?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36645221/308738284/-1930076705?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210928-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzYyZDRjMS1iODIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M3Ugtc3UPsfCuAgOSwsLSriCWZFq3jbVxkwWhZtzmDc=)**

We need to ensure Susan has the resources to stand up to these attacks and defend her seat so that she can keep working on the issues that matter most, like health care, infrastructure, and good jobs.

clean_body: keep Susan in Congress fighting for the folks of the Greater Lehigh Valley and the entire nation. | Peter, In a moment, I’m going to ask you to = before her crucial FEC filing deadline at the end of the month. But first, I’d like to tell you why it’s so important that we keep Susan in Congress fighting for the folks of the Greater Lehigh Valley and the entire nation. Susan told me that she’s been having a tough time with fundraising in the past months. I get it — summer is a time when folks want to be outside and away from their computers, and they should be! But here’s the deal: if we lose Susan’s seat, we have no chance of holding on to our House majority in 2022.= | = In 2020, Susan won one of the most competitive House races in the country, and this time she’s facing off against the same far-right extremist opponent. What’s more, outside Republican groups are already spending thousands of dollars on attack ads against Susan in her own district. We need to ensure Susan has the resources to stand up to these attacks and defend her seat so that she can keep working on the issues that matter most, like health care, infrastructure, and good jobs. = | | | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Together, I know we can keep Susan in Congress. Let’s do this, team! Thanks, = Senator Cory Booker | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States | | ---|--- Susan Wild represents Pennsylvania's 7th District in Congress. She believes we can grow overall economic prosperity while still caring for the vulnerable members of our community. body:
midnight deadline is coming up
| | |
---
| | Derek, I just left the debate stage and I sincerely hope I made you proud.

My message was clear: Glenn Youngkin is a Trump-endorsed, far-right culture warrior who has been hiding his views from voters for this entire campaign. If he wins, all of Virginia’s progress is in danger. And, Donald Trump will get a huge victory ahead of the 2022 midterms.

I believe with all my heart that we won tonight, but we’ve got a long way to go if we’re going to win this election. Glenn Youngkin is outraising us right now and polls show a tied race. With that kind of resource advantage, he could pull away if we don’t mount a historic response.

**Derek, with your help, we’ve already built the largest grassroots army in the history of Virginia. But we have to keep going. There’s too much on the line for Virginia and our country.**

_**[I’m asking you, right here and right now, to do your part. Can you chip in and help stop extremism and Trumpism? Now I 'm asking for your help ONE LAST TIME.** To victory, Jim Jordan Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: John Castorani
subject: I’ve sacrificed a lot to run for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
I quit my career in the intelligence service to run for Congress. There is a lot riding on the success of my campaign. Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.johncastorani.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_s=d3eba55d7af64088976638ac94801f64&_t=dVJHWIHROBkEYplc0vfwIkTkgjZGop1P-eFgVkvnLvtJBFCSSgi5WmUjKYpOS7rhWODgwW7PKf1x8AFaMhKt5wYs_Dwq33inBYkD-ifMVVbZP6c352lx44nhatAffGjFp-r_MHZBZcbJObTWdUk2ijm21Vmod4LmYEFKS4Qc_JA%3D) | [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=d3eba55d7af64088976638ac94801f64&_e=CnXWC-8iNEoYV0omlRzYovXN98RSXq97Zw1G2NY9Lw_JSJ8QyI3GlbtSkN8xrl-dQDQjRZK6ghaQVaTyFFtPIGpofiWDMwbXo6jVH8yGoPitbP3fKM-aS_l2Mydh_sTeIm8f9orMCFJFosYtSM1T0ll3QhJgx0Z7cmnN3Z0GCYffmn9-j4_xkJw_OSfoLYKFuXPsxIaNz5pt2p7g8_F9xDM5ky7hepj7GnpFmNLYCsuHxYu7fGThIyHeTw9NB4564B5JpvFlRnQUrgYAu9NtYjmpJbH2T-ARNRRHptbZPtRXPf1esiC4bd_QIbYcDHvJGlCSJJ0Jj0gzyHMriibIy4rcFOp56aekVS9klutPLPFhPIHdtth8t_-qcqMYovGvLYESYEi4TlmnqsAWGXtF9zUwgLQNKqs1y9ZYyJABKIXwWHS-J03kP3HMHQUITQvVgkMJ_jtPQdxzd5OyDWXf4Q%3D%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

You might have guessed from the subject line of this email that I’ve put my personal life on pause to run for Congress. You could say that there is a lot riding on the success of this campaign.

Even if someone had told me how difficult it would be running for office while balancing my familial commitments – I still would have made the choice to run for Congress. Radical left Democrats are hijacking the legislative process in an attempt to pass laws that they don’t have a mandate to pass. It’s up to patriots like you and me to stop them in their tracks before it’s too late.

**We’ve had a lot happen in our lives so far this year. I started a new job; we welcomed our first child into the world in June; our basement flooded – leaving me without a home office to work on campaign-related activities. It’s always something. I know that’s part of life, but it doesn’t make this race for public office any easier.**

I can handle a flooded basement, no problem. But what I won’t lie: **it’s not easy juggling a newborn and a two full time jobs.**

I know that I can win this race and flip Virginia’s 7th congressional district Republican, depriving Democrats of their House majority – **[but I need your help](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=d3eba55d7af64088976638ac94801f64&_e=CnXWC-8iNEoYV0omlRzYovXN98RSXq97Zw1G2NY9Lw_JSJ8QyI3GlbtSkN8xrl-dQDQjRZK6ghaQVaTyFFtPIGpofiWDMwbXo6jVH8yGoPitbP3fKM-aS_l2Mydh_sTeIm8f9orMCFJFosYtSM1T0ll3QhJgx0Z7cmnN3Z0GCYffmn9-j4_xkJw_OSfoLYKFuXPsxIaNz5pt2p7g8_F9xDM5ky7hepj7GnpFmNLYCsuHxYu7fGThIyHeTw9NB45665-wqbVMEjjQh4OhfBVZNeQ0WNBqL0wOXwfMIpLXFXGkq7yxrbWt7mgxIu3DxemZZwBYQ9XKAHgjTFLSK2F7-wb0dN59b5wKbWfnuYxPY1UjK_ejStCZVDs7Bp4TnHACf3LM2fPS0tALAyOfyXim1TlmfDB3YnHXIHXo83tLwQnVVf47BNkyGgEMCQXE3SOu3Z-4_X4dwz0gN-ixNCm5MQ%3D%3D)**. Not only must I prove to Republican’s in Washington D.C. that I’m the right candidate to win in this battleground district - I have to prove to myself that this is worth the stress on putting on myself and my family.

**[I have 48 hours to raise another $2,800 and I’m asking you if you can help me chip away at that goal by making a gift of $5, $10, $25 or even $100 right now.](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=d3eba55d7af64088976638ac94801f64&_e=CnXWC-8iNEoYV0omlRzYovXN98RSXq97Zw1G2NY9Lw_JSJ8QyI3GlbtSkN8xrl-dQDQjRZK6ghaQVaTyFFtPIGpofiWDMwbXo6jVH8yGoPitbP3fKM-aS_l2Mydh_sTeIm8f9orMCFJFosYtSM1T0ll3QhJgx0Z7cmnN3Z0GCYffmn9-j4_xkJw_OSfoLYKFuXPsxIaNz5pt2p7g8_F9xDM5ky7hepj7GnpFmNLYCsuHxYu7fGThIyHeTw9NB456BJSBWwwDe88MfSnlViQNoZHtsTR8QmBEsGwgU5I42rhRnjj8p1N9wAHtQRkeaNz_AGWUI81L2vHbpRHJcwIB4MmPNB1XE7ht0aJ2agqkuABoA2zQCrIR0_cIqwcWrstcJVZ2gVfFkorvaIseIoZv-tMGN_n1C4wiriksK1iDFTQ2U6NJ4iwvVg5iz9K_Viqsr6FaL_kCu1MtqpQpSIFcYg%3D%3D)**

**I’m very anxious about hitting our goal before Thursday evening – I’ve got faith it can be done, but I sure am nervous.

_I’m happy to speak to you by phone if you want to chat with me more about my candidacy before making a gift; reply to this email and we’ll get back to you before Thursday._**

clean_body: I quit my career in the intelligence service to run for Congress. There is a lot riding on the success of my campaign. Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? | Fellow Conservative, You might have guessed from the subject line of this email that I’ve put my personal life on pause to run for Congress. You could say that there is a lot riding on the success of this campaign. Even if someone had told me how difficult it would be running for office while balancing my familial commitments – I still would have made the choice to run for Congress. Radical left Democrats are hijacking the legislative process in an attempt to pass laws that they don’t have a mandate to pass. It’s up to patriots like you and me to stop them in their tracks before it’s too late. We’ve had a lot happen in our lives so far this year. I started a new job; we welcomed our first child into the world in June; our basement flooded – leaving me without a home office to work on campaign-related activities. It’s always something. I know that’s part of life, but it doesn’t make this race for public office any easier. I can handle a flooded basement, no problem. But what I won’t lie: it’s not easy juggling a newborn and a two full time jobs. I know that I can win this race and flip Virginia’s 7th congressional district Republican, depriving Democrats of their House majority – . Not only must I prove to Republican’s in Washington D.C. that I’m the right candidate to win in this battleground district - I have to prove to myself that this is worth the stress on putting on myself and my family. I’m very anxious about hitting our goal before Thursday evening – I’ve got faith it can be done, but I sure am nervous. I’m happy to speak to you by phone if you want to chat with me more about my candidacy before making a gift; reply to this email and we’ll get back to you before Thursday. | Thank you John Castorani Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07 P.S. body:
** Justice Democrats
------------------------------------------------------------

Peter,

Here’s a rundown of how corporate Democrats are blocking even the most basic health care reform to combat skyrocketing drug costs: Lowering prescription drug costs for all.

First, Senator Joe Manchin said he’d vote NO on the $3.5 trillion spending bill that includes economic relief for the 99 percent and climate action to save the planet. That’s a win for Big Pharma and the fossil fuel industry.

Then, three corporate Democrats in the U.S. House blocked a provision in the spending bill to lower prescription drug costs in a committee vote. Another win for Big Pharma.

THEN, Senator Kyrsten Sinema said she opposed Democratic plans to lower prescription drug prices. She even opposes the centrist proposal to limit the cost-savings for everyday people. Big Pharma is 3-for-3.

This is the most basic reform Democrats could pass to curb the greed and massive profits of Big Pharma companies AND help everyday people afford their insulin and other life saving medications.

Establishment Democrats have run on lowering drug prices for years. Now that they’re in power, they’re coming up with excuses.

This is why we need to elect Justice Democrats to Congress. Corporate Democrats want the status quo, and that’s just not good enough. Donate $10 right now to help us elect a wave of Justice Democrats to Congress and combat Big Pharma’s influence in Congress. (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-20210928-movement-mc?refcode=em-20210928-mc)

Contribute (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-20210928-movement-mc?refcode=em-20210928-mc)

We have a chance to transform the Democratic Party and make real progress in this country.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

name: Susie Lee
subject: Why this work matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36646333/308752817/-1528880522?refcode=SL_headerlogoAB&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzk3Njc3Zi1iZTIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fPgGgT9uWEyOfmC2E2yndcKEgbkK70Y5koZbuixBOww=)

| | Folks, My team and I have reached out to you quite a bit over the past few days [**for help with our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36646334/308752818/202043539?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_210928_FR_EOQ7_A1_OTHER_X1_M2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzk3Njc3Zi1iZTIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fPgGgT9uWEyOfmC2E2yndcKEgbkK70Y5koZbuixBOww=). We’re still short of our goal, but I wanted to carve out some time to be frank with you about why deadlines like this matter so much. Let’s face it: a strong campaign needs to be well-resourced. It takes money to keep up with my opponents, increase voter outreach and organizing efforts, and defend my campaign against attack ads. But that’s not the only reason we have to take fundraising deadlines seriously. Your support makes it possible for me to show up every day in Congress and keep fighting for the people of Southern Nevada. Here are some of the things I’m proud to have been able to address, thanks to your support:
* **Child Care**. Nevada is a child care desert and 72 percent of Nevadans don’t have access to quality, affordable childcare. That’s why I introduced **The Small Business Child Care Investment Act, which gives nonprofit child care providers the funds they need to meet the needs of Nevadan families**.

* **Reproductive Rights.** Protecting reproductive freedom is a top priority for me. I joined over 230 of my colleagues in urging the Supreme Court to uphold _Roe v. Wade_ and **I cosponsored the Women’s Health Protection Act to safeguard a woman’s right to make her own decisions about her health.**

* **Health Care.** No one should go hungry, ration, or sacrifice other needs in order to be able to afford their life-saving medications. My bill, **the Seniors Securing Access to Vital and Essential (SAVE) Prescription Drugs Act, would help more low-income seniors and individuals with disabilities be able to afford their prescription drugs.**

* **Climate Change**. Taking action on the climate crisis is our only option -- because there is no Planet B. That’s why I’m fighting for legislation that will lay the groundwork for a **sustainable, equitable future** as well as **the Great American Outdoors Act that will ensure the preservation of the public lands we all depend on.**

When you contribute to my campaign, you’re not just helping us hit a fundraising goal -- you’re strengthening this campaign and my team so that we can keep pushing for the critical solutions that will improve the lives of every Nevadan. [**That’s why I’m asking you personally -- Will you make a contribution before our end-of-quarter deadline?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36646335/308752819/202043539?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_210928_FR_EOQ7_A1_OTHER_X1_M2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzk3Njc3Zi1iZTIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fPgGgT9uWEyOfmC2E2yndcKEgbkK70Y5koZbuixBOww=) | | | [Chip in $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36646336/308752820/202043539?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_210928_FR_EOQ7_A1_OTHER_X1_M2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzk3Njc3Zi1iZTIwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fPgGgT9uWEyOfmC2E2yndcKEgbkK70Y5koZbuixBOww=)

clean_body: | | | | Let’s CRUSH it Friend, Did you miss our Finance Team’s email yesterday? They set a massive goal of $20,000 to represent the 20 years that Liberal Lisa Murkowski has been in office and they need YOUR help to CRUSH THE GOAL. Are YOU going to help out?! If you are ready for an America First Senator, please use the link below to make a contribution toward our FEC End-of-Quarter Deadline Goal. Secure Kelly For Alaska Link: We can’t do it with you and appreciate everything you have done for us so far. Thanks, Gina Ritacco, Campaign Manager Kelly for Alaska Sent from my iPhone \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Kelly for Alaska Finance Team Date: Monday, Sep 27, 2021 Subject: FEC DEADLINE ALERT 🚨 To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, We just got off the phone with Kelly about our online fundraising and she suggested we reach out to you, to help us with ourEnd-of-Quarter Deadline Goal. Before we reached out via email, we checked your donor file and were surprised to find out that you have yet to step up for this deadline. Take a look for yourself: | FEC END-OF-QUARTER DONOR FILE Supporter: dpwillis67@gmail.com Status: Top Supporter Deadline: September 30, 11:59 PM Contribution Status: MISSING | This is a very important FEC End-of-Quarter Deadline for us. We were tipped off that Lisa Murkowski and her D.C. Insiders were going to funnel thousands of dollars to her. That is why we set a goal of $20,000 to represent the 20 years she has been in the Senate. As a Top Supporter, you understand how important it is to Kelly that we reach our goals and how saddened she would be if we didn’t reach out. That is why we have activated a 3X-Impact on all donations made before our deadline. Kelly is counting on you, we are counting on you, and we both know you won’t let us down. Tomorrow morning, we are going to look at everyone who stepped up today, and we hope to see your name. Thanks, Kelly for Alaska Finance Team | | | | ==

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Your $3 sends a powerful message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Your donations = greater grassroots power for our movement
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210928-2535-header&t=1&akid=2535%2E2526796%2ExZX6Ra)
When Alexandria speaks truth to power, her voice carries the weight of our grassroots movement with it.
That’s why we’re writing you, to ask for a little boost before our end of quarter deadline. When we close the books on our official FEC report at midnight on Thursday, the pundits and politicians are going to view our numbers as a measure of the public support for the policies we’re fighting for.
[Will you make a $3 donation before Thursday’s deadline to help us show strong support for our movement? Every contribution — no matter how big or small — builds strength for our platform and moves us one step closer to our $1.7 million fundraising goal.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210927?refcode=em20210928-2535-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2535_2526796_xZX6Ra&akid=2535%2E2526796%2ExZX6Ra)
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210927?refcode=em20210928-2535-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2535_2526796_xZX6Ra&akid=2535%2E2526796%2ExZX6Ra)**
Think about just these past few weeks alone.
* First, Alexandria went on national TV to call out Texas Gov. Greg Abbott’s deep ignorance after he enacted a six-week abortion ban and claimed he was going to “eliminate rape.”
* Then she raised more than $300,000 online for abortion funds in Texas.
* In DC, she called attention to Joe Manchin’s weekly meetups with Exxon lobbyists in the wake of his refusal to vote for the Build Back Better plan because it would move us toward a greener economy.
* And she sparked a national conversation on the urgent need to tax the rich and invest in childcare, healthcare, and climate action for all.

**You may have seen some of this in the news. Why? Because when Alexandria makes moves, the people in power pay attention.** They know that Alexandria speaks not only for herself, but for millions of people who believe in our progressive movement — the volunteers, grassroots donors, and voters who are demanding change.
**Of course, all of this puts a massive target on her back.** We know that whenever Alexandria uses her voice to call out corruption and fight for the people, well-funded special interest groups will look for ways to put a stop to our movement.
**Your donations — at an average of just $17 — make our message more powerful as we compete against the powerful and corrupting influence of big money.** In a political system where money talks, strong grassroots fundraising plays a key role in making sure our agenda, and the leaders like Alexandria who fight for our values, carry weight in Washington, D.C. and beyond.
[So, before our deadline on Thursday at midnight, we’re asking you to contribute $3 toward our $1.7 million fundraising goal.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210927?refcode=em20210928-2535-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2535_2526796_xZX6Ra&akid=2535%2E2526796%2ExZX6Ra)
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210927?refcode=em20210928-2535-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2535_2526796_xZX6Ra&akid=2535%2E2526796%2ExZX6Ra)**
Alexandria’s voice is only as powerful as the movement behind it. Publishing big fundraising numbers on our FEC report is one of the best ways we can show off the strong public support for our shared values.
We hope you can chip in to help us get over the line on the goal this quarter.
Thanks for everything,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210927?refcode=em20210928-2535-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&t=24&refcode2=2535_2526796_xZX6Ra&akid=2535%2E2526796%2ExZX6Ra)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210928-2535-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&t=25&akid=2535%2E2526796%2ExZX6Ra)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=2535%2E2526796%2ExZX6Ra) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=2535%2E2526796%2ExZX6Ra) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=2535%2E2526796%2ExZX6Ra)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=29&akid=2535%2E2526796%2ExZX6Ra)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=2535%2E2526796%2ExZX6Ra)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

Peter,

It has been five years since I was elected to represent you in office, and it has been nothing short of an honor.

But our country is facing a huge problem... Democrats.

**Inflation is at an all-time high. COVID-19 numbers are soaring. Our nation’s borders are fully open to illegal migrants. Foreign policy has been completely abandoned. And innocent Americans are trapped with terrorists.** _What more could the Biden Administration ruin?_

The Biden Democrats are driving America into the ground, and if they are to continue to win, we might as well lose all hope.

But there is a chance to fix the mess, Peter, which is taking back the majority this 2022. We only need **FIVE** seats to turn the House red, but that comes with ensuring we keep every seat we have. [**If you’re ready for the House to flip, please add your name below so I know you’re with me!**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=3adce6f12ba449afbb8fd68ba74d89f4&_e=uqFvmRN9cnYaiSJmCpf5hbxgx0_CORgZ9j1JPhlR6PFOy4ACZz526rq8uJvFN1vZQU5Kj881GrPwtgRhhZOcwe3d_3OTccMuV9MIn8MS33XgywYVMki89A3LhjbdISOzcw-tOb0OmknLXXshV79osEbV0wFDncCnbzRlogNiD5ZTYxzi_HjJqEOs6roOKyhtT1MQzU02e3WhtI4qtPA1x3MGmyS2D1J0JGSj2rZ1i0abdGijspopnW9FuNEdA9tPQXfbjdv91laDnIllxRH0r8J9nkOfXAN3fPONuofFzmvCEwJ1CGc-Ge5JvcDbOanAH_mf99vrRcOIIFHwvR645FRgEmSjNyrWThzSUpC7SgfskzNRzJftezAxWBCpQ1RJ3pkRS9s3TQAs0AknoDbatqn7x6T2l3HncIs_y_qC4z5t1Ghs7cG3Ckhsf1TW3LS4cBnyloOS1zXSJd17kv4wSHArg1mSmfdlAfcQrSI5-bIxi3qeR9Ja_M38xLBE50-Nwq7_hjiGOWKLk-dl68EcR-j578n0Xlun5hHeKAljznM%3D)

[**_FLIP THE HOUSE_**

This is nothing new, Peter - Democrats Pelosi and Schumer have been using the same playbook to carry out their wretched, inefficient radical agenda for years.

_Enough is enough._

It’s time to put an end to the Democrats’ “America LAST” agenda and expose them for the damage their radical policies are having on this country.

I’m committed to firing Pelosi, to exposing Biden’s reckless agenda, and to ensuring freedom for generations to come. But I need to know I have your support, Peter.

[**Would you consider adding your name to my list of patriots that are furious with the Democrats running our country and are dedicated to taking back the House in 2022?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=3adce6f12ba449afbb8fd68ba74d89f4&_e=uqFvmRN9cnYaiSJmCpf5hbxgx0_CORgZ9j1JPhlR6PFOy4ACZz526rq8uJvFN1vZQU5Kj881GrPwtgRhhZOcwe3d_3OTccMuV9MIn8MS33XgywYVMki89A3LhjbdISOzcw-tOb0OmknLXXshV79osEbV0wFDncCnbzRlogNiD5ZTYxzi_HjJqEOs6roOKyhtT1MQzU02e3WhtI4qtPA1x3MGmyS2D1J0JGSj2rZ1i0abdGijspopnW9FuNEdA9tPQXfbjdv91laDnIllxRH0r8J9nkOfXAN3fPONuofFzmvCEwJ1CGc-Ge5JvcDbOanAH_mf99vrRcOIIFHwvR645NAm6UsEINwjHiLJKQxoKAProUdpWQeLBB6OAQ9fMxp3X-IxgGKQC-8OP8KW6ShyYqoDS4fVF7C48nFe5JRZ-jO2s2ZIJB3_FmgcNGdFe1kRrMxPxzWx-7t6ISD9kyynWhUC5cO3Lv47l7vT0L2wRvtVRQbS3vMRd2LJB8fsQSgQ29DNjDGL-Cfi0Ph1PKYTBHNZ-8B00PXFYLGfcmpTMw8%3D)

It’s never been so important to take back leadership and get our country back on track. I, for one, can’t sit back and watch Democrats ruin our country for another second, so I hope you add your name today.

For America,
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=3adce6f12ba449afbb8fd68ba74d89f4&_e=uqFvmRN9cnYaiSJmCpf5hbxgx0_CORgZ9j1JPhlR6PFOy4ACZz526rq8uJvFN1vZQU5Kj881GrPwtgRhhZOcwe3d_3OTccMuV9MIn8MS33XgywYVMki89A3LhjbdISOzcw-tOb0OmknLXXshV79osEbV0wFDncCnbzRlogNiD5ZTYxzi_HjJqEOs6roOKyhtT1MQzU02e3WhtI4qtPA1x3MGmyS2D1J0JGSj2rZ1i0abdGijspopnW9FuNEdA9tPQXfbjdv91laDnIllxRH0r8J9nkOfXAN3fPONuofFzmvCEwJ1CGc-Ge5JvcDbOanAH_mf99vrRcOIIFHwvR645GSNpfdwTGhLp8Zg4HqR2Jkrfq2w_c6-7VVd_LHs5O8d-yzkgmVG2YHyz1JJemdDl9-iP-2YBRFGFzvGQcpw6r5iRTn0WK9DhYlTmN44qWxiUpNVstgaLPMRi_LyMj5iYWhrHCo1DmlCqFtoQStsUVemPc1ZLaWaBjgMel8CTW_osJEk8UdBHqZ7p9M2KYdt4w_MK-b3d842ln2LhGeAmxI%3D)

subject: The four amigos

body:
Anyone who supports bringing socialism to the United States must be defeated. We’re committed to getting the job done and we NEED to know that you are |
Fellow patriot,

Next year, control of the Senate hinges on our ability to knock out four of the most radical Schumer, socialist sympathizers in the Senate.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9a53712e56024911bd41e8af9c4d9f68&_e=mvZpbVAZ-JMM2lDqr4DyodaUeCtRonzK-nsXAknR7np490wQjSxRNYQjvE45tVCvsuHaILObxHI6L8ea3v0Kb3eqRAl8XcQdaMoJYknJus7uRsYFCgcitB1lq5rL4fhw-cdEtA0dJMluhkLiBjHo1i3gjsLL29DY2xVp_vj440bqGIXotjkfC2-f08xFaEpmSaZze_vcUWtuceZKNeHcYChHlikcdV1S53S1ZjDOIqTlleS5ne7OVcMSCkXjEoSFlYTwsUalY6L831iXHtenvI34EItAZ5V8nK-tfmL0KsJOX3Qw_SH8w9q9OQIYNfakqeTpOKf4y40Zc3x3dBtJqiLo2y-_HcMtbzz7n64l6AQB71QTnuH4EDFQFj8aqJ1-AJGrXJvFCmO8dQnsiQ44utK-hxdRZhjdoA8P743iAdxIdLHZR05mwgbuCnYt9kAjQI-c6iz5FKWb0Il0saSVHg%3D%3D)

Arizona, New Hampshire, Georgia, and Nevada are all states friendly to Republicans, and states in which a Republican held at least one (if not both) Senate seats as recently as 2016.

Fellow patriot, what I am trying to tell you is that **[THIS IS VERY POSSIBLE TO DO.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9a53712e56024911bd41e8af9c4d9f68&_e=mvZpbVAZ-JMM2lDqr4DyodaUeCtRonzK-nsXAknR7np490wQjSxRNYQjvE45tVCvsuHaILObxHI6L8ea3v0Kb3eqRAl8XcQdaMoJYknJus7uRsYFCgcitB1lq5rL4fhw-cdEtA0dJMluhkLiBjHo1i3gjsLL29DY2xVp_vj440bqGIXotjkfC2-f08xFaEpmSaZze_vcUWtuceZKNeHcYChHlikcdV1S53S1ZjDOIqTlleS5ne7OVcMSCkXjEoSFEb148Xqds_MNlZ2zvJmsVOSwsRxsVccTZR83qeluegWSPCZoI127XYjiPg5JktaW4xcH7o-05vjDDjyUGSPxZZWBuNWZEmLMhikKT7mxZuAb0WCszIp8FMNQE1HQ0DsMsOkbjMKUC-K4vAJlxaDPFLPf9MDZzKotABlkWUmuVc5T9UlP3LWu9bgYqPnyyaRCi51aYPO3VmYY8OVC0UN3UA%3D%3D)**

The national Democrat Party, their Senate campaign arm (the DSCC), and the four Democrat Senators we’re targeting in these states are fashioning themselves as “moderates” because they know the headwinds are against them heading into re-election.

**But here’s the conundrum: All four vulnerable Democrats are about to vote “YES” on Bernie Sanders’ $3.5 trillion reconciliation bill – a bill that will transform America into a socialist state.**

That’s not “moderate.”

We’re going to hold these four Democrat Senators accountable, and **[we need YOUR HELP NOW](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9a53712e56024911bd41e8af9c4d9f68&_e=mvZpbVAZ-JMM2lDqr4DyodaUeCtRonzK-nsXAknR7np490wQjSxRNYQjvE45tVCvsuHaILObxHI6L8ea3v0Kb3eqRAl8XcQdaMoJYknJus7uRsYFCgcitB1lq5rL4fhw-cdEtA0dJMluhkLiBjHo1i3gjsLL29DY2xVp_vj440bqGIXotjkfC2-f08xFaEpmSaZze_vcUWtuceZKNeHcYChHlikcdV1S53S1ZjDOIqTlleS5ne7OVcMSCkXjEoSF2e9fS4y3GDBJYAdqzS5lw9WG5ioYz0CZ2vnSgyRoiHR2jh-0RF1-VnIZXWD4xlwkR_saqNfGegmf8njiRRtErQZ5uzDCaHYEcpumskYktnLD4o-9bqLV3MEvB-ASNOv6OalyekqJosK8CqKoxjyex5kE7pack6uYax43X0UnSk7fK7WGM2w_ZUT25DU6F3qW2WcljUoIVgsYxKaZwVTMbg%3D%3D)**.

**_[We need to be on air with these ads and we will need cash to do this. clean_body: Anyone who supports bringing socialism to the United States must be defeated. We’re committed to getting the job done and we NEED to know that you are | Fellow patriot, Next year, control of the Senate hinges on our ability to knock out four of the most radical Schumer, socialist sympathizers in the Senate. Arizona, New Hampshire, Georgia, and Nevada are all states friendly to Republicans, and states in which a Republican held at least one (if not both) Senate seats as recently as 2016. Fellow patriot, what I am trying to tell you is that The national Democrat Party, their Senate campaign arm (the DSCC), and the four Democrat Senators we’re targeting in these states are fashioning themselves as “moderates” because they know the headwinds are against them heading into re-election. But here’s the conundrum: All four vulnerable Democrats are about to vote “YES” on Bernie Sanders’ $3.5 trillion reconciliation bill – a bill that will transform America into a socialist state. That’s not “moderate.” We’re going to hold these four Democrat Senators accountable, and . We plan to run ads in Arizona, New Hampshire, Nevada, and Georgia to show voters that their “moderate” Senators support bringing socialism to America. We anticipate that a generous group of donors will match every dollar donated before midnight tonight to help boost our ad buys in each of these states! Anyone who supports bringing socialism to the United States must be defeated. We’re committed to getting the job done and we NEED to know that you are, too. Failure is simply not an option. The voters need to know their elected officials are not who they pretend to be. Folks,

It’s tough to express just how important this FEC deadline is.

Kevin McCarthy has won reelection after reelection without fail, not because his policies work or he is popular in the district, but because he’s one of the most well-funded candidates in America.

And now, as he continues to make his case to be Trump’s favorite Congressman, he’s going to get millions of dollars from the Trump base that he’s courting.

**Proving that Bruno Amato is a viable candidate capable of taking down Kevin McCarthy starts with this fundraising deadline.

[Can you donate to our campaign to replace do-nothing Kevin McCarthy with a Navy veteran who knows what real leadership is? clean_body: Why this week is so crucial for the rest of the campaign. | | | Folks, It’s tough to express just how important this FEC deadline is. Kevin McCarthy has won reelection after reelection without fail, not because his policies work or he is popular in the district, but because he’s one of the most well-funded candidates in America. And now, as he continues to make his case to be Trump’s favorite Congressman, he’s going to get millions of dollars from the Trump base that he’s courting. Proving that Bruno Amato is a viable candidate capable of taking down Kevin McCarthy starts with this fundraising deadline. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately. Let’s do this, Team Bruno Amato for Congress | | ---|--- Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress PO BOX 22472 BAKERSFIELD, CA 93390

Hey Fellow Patriot,

It’s Tyler and I want to make sure I have your email correct. I noticed you haven’t responded to my last few messages.

I know September is busy, but this message is too important for you to wait. _It’s about the next generation of leaders._

Our country is more divided than ever, and it doesn’t just affect us now but affects the lives of our children and future generations. We can’t let Democrats continue to destroy the country we’re passing down.

As a Marine, father, and believer in the American dream, I want nothing more to try and protect the values of this nation - for my kids, and all the kids with big dreams.

I’m fighting for the kid that wants to be President. The one who wants to be an astronaut. Or a teacher. Or a mom. _All of these kids deserve a shot at the American dream._

But I can’t keep fighting the Democrats on my own. We’ve got a big quarterly deadline coming up at the end of the month, and Democrats will be scouring our numbers for any sign of weakness. [**Will you join me today to protect the dreams of our kids before it’s too late?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0af875cd35534497922b69a8f8ea6094&_e=Dg_FJJX27QyPL0MuUlljuu05Ok2pQ7b5vQURdetQBQ2ap-xXcVwgorvSX4ZPQ8_a3n9OttImittZ15Rs2rmQ7of7qPY-a1rMLeNs7E2WqjO3t_SG0GfrzSv-XNCte-6NX4_lgFdyB8QwrUhKNb9IaBUKkjD2ayIoVZNHZPJDaPB52qe8A3Dd8BATkSz-Ahq4zcJ6CvzAxuYpl3nTU0Dl62wNoGAAXj1CMozU4S3boVXp1KT2geBdSHJItYCpyff77VAfZzR8SRb0KJCbZP0I9-uIbUFqHJUyNNPmRYtBT_vJ7wtAaB_8qswcjzLGV-edeIORc3zYQIEJehs9D_BHAbofDZj7V86z083Rbl6dP1T2FATwVDuTxnjrKE5A_PQi)

Peter,

President Biden and the Democrats' failed leadership is proving to be catastrophic for the American people.

From a crisis raging at the border to a complete disaster in Afghanistan, this country is being failed by the President and his far-left allies.

What’s more, President Biden is threatening our nation’s governors. **_We both know, though, that I won’t be bullied or bulldozed by anyone._**

_This has fueled my commitment to stand up and fight for our conservative values as the next governor of Arkansas._
[**DONATE NOW**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=deb3990eb29a4d92981c961fddca9f3d&_e=3-IQVO3R7qNs9xv9BeORKsnMrgOXgGyoQTtC0bjExOm5k8vWv9V4xW-5f_DAFX1wOyFzy5-_EsAJW7IMLgX8NEnuUdqaJXsEQDI-73vHpp-O1uwsY_ue6e9tNz6yeOGXLGBzQw718mEQYaevB7N0FVzetps-S1wneTRhaPMGOSBOcNmZnLtgtpyklVoGMGVFX8vJu22datlWMkfouc9_NBnRkgdmdvMDqNLn26SxjfaV9-af8XxCNTxEAtRKaf6k30j0WTAD1Jm0uR_jAOcEv4FlPbxg366Ss3fUtxasddYPEMXQBxEHHxSxsXICMv4SW-GRecO-UhykdKFF_OEUM_DSM_DLerdnNcea2qNYhFgOS_Fg8we0tXAJ02m0z2AJd251d8D4xw5z5xgoegLC-UU1PKe-DQY6oWW0N53FE_c%3D)

[**Can you chip in to help make it happen?**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=deb3990eb29a4d92981c961fddca9f3d&_e=3-IQVO3R7qNs9xv9BeORKsnMrgOXgGyoQTtC0bjExOm5k8vWv9V4xW-5f_DAFX1wOyFzy5-_EsAJW7IMLgX8NEnuUdqaJXsEQDI-73vHpp-O1uwsY_ue6e9tNz6yeOGXLGBzQw718mEQYaevB7N0FVzetps-S1wneTRhaPMGOSBOcNmZnLtgtpyklVoGMGVFX8vJu22datlWMkfouc9_NE-F0ESw-NPIHy8BpedesVsFKhcEzvP1cv6nJ2yWBReGwoTdTXdNeg4vop7O-XQoQvLMUAQeP7z5NCZjMYsuAcCEd8RISB5vDzOXrnewB6GTyJxyE7qhPzvBdUoZCVPmuFu71S8RakQjMKCsC08CxivgNJd6FpCcMteMFOXlB0DHVTdtabqxuYnDGUbDWxL-szeKZWHCL8BMkhM_yvGKUWc%3D)

Sarah Huckabee Sanders

body:
****

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/k2KjHmAeaECR/cXB3dkpvQVQrZlNwcTI1aW9aTStxT3RIRXdzalhPTzJGSXdESUNYQlZqOUZZcWl2eWRUekQvK2hKSWQ1MlRGVnJCb09QUWdhNXJxRHNKeFBNemYxT0kzL3ozbzVXbGR6NUFralBxV1EzcFU9S0/K1VCVzlhS1kvUjFjQ2pGWktFZk0vOGZzSmh1WGFJRWZ3c0hVQmd5b3lnUT0S1) Friend, As summer turns to fall, I'm reflecting on a summer defined by Republican _inaction_ on the issues that matter most -- and harmful Republican _actions_ that attack our most basic rights. On one hand, we watched historic flooding and unrelenting wildfires consume much of our country, all while falling dangerously behind on the climate goals we set in the Paris Agreement. Republicans don't just refuse to act -- they _still_ refuse to accept the science of climate change. And on the other hand, Republicans are putting their extreme, immoral agenda ahead of science, democracy, and our basic rights: gutting reproductive rights, voting rights, and the rights of communities to keep children safe with school mask mandates. It couldn't be more clear that right now our country demands bold, progressive change -- like we're pursuing every day in Washington state. But to continue this fight, I need your support, Friend. But to keep making progress, I'm counting on supporters like you to stand with me today and invest in this movement.
[**__**[**_I 'm humbly asking you to chip in $5, or whatever you can, right now to fuel our continued work together._**](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/KaG2sL_YRDH9/cXB3dkpvQVQrZlNwcTI1aW9aTStxT3RIRXdzalhPTzJGSXdESUNYQlZqOUZZcWl2eWRUekQvK2hKSWQ1MlRGVnJCb09QUWdhNXJxRHNKeFBNemYxT0kzL3ozbzVXbGR6NUFralBxV1EzcFU9S0/K1VCVzlhS1kvUjFjQ2pGWktFZk0vOGZzSmh1WGFJRWZ3c0hVQmd5b3lnUT0S1) ](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/WeGZfaGPN0HK/cXB3dkpvQVQrZlNwcTI1aW9aTStxT3RIRXdzalhPTzJGSXdESUNYQlZqOUZZcWl2eWRUekQvK2hKSWQ1MlRGVnJCb09QUWdhNXJxRHNKeFBNemYxT0kzL3ozbzVXbGR6NUFralBxV1EzcFU9S0/K1VCVzlhS1kvUjFjQ2pGWktFZk0vOGZzSmh1WGFJRWZ3c0hVQmd5b3lnUT0S1)
Thank you for being a part of this movement, today and every day.

Jay
