Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace

Friend, this is a huge failure of leadership in Austin. Why hasn't Gov. Greg Abbott taken on the Biden regime and acted to halt the invasion?

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: This week is a test
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
Our Build Back Better agenda is on the line this week. It’s what Pramila has been working so hard on — delivering for the people. She’s fighting for long-overdue investments in climate action, paid leave, universal child care, pre-K, housing, health care, infrastructure, and more.
Just yesterday, the _Washington Post_ covered Pramila’s leadership and our progressive movement’s fight in Congress:
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/6668?refcode=em20210928-673&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=673%2E420207%2Eoan8TI)
We are at a crucial tipping point in this fight, Peter. Big money and big corporations are doing everything possible to stop Democrats from lowering prescription drug prices, fighting climate change, and giving workers time off. **That’s why Pramila is fighting so hard — and it’s why she needs you to have her back.**
[**Pramila will continue the fight for progressive change no matter what conservatives, Big Pharma, and corporate America do to try and stop her. If you stand with Pramila at this pivotal moment, can you chip in $3 to fuel her work to deliver on our promises to the people.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/6668?refcode=em20210928-673&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=673%2E420207%2Eoan8TI)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/6668?refcode=em20210928-673&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=673%2E420207%2Eoan8TI)**
In the _Washington Post_ article, Pramila spoke powerfully about her role in Congress:
"What it means to me to be here is I have a chance to fight for people whose voices never get heard. I have a chance to be in rooms that nobody like me has ever been in."
We need to stand with Pramila every step of the way as she fights for what the people need, want, and deserve.
[**Pramila is up against powerful interests. If you’re with her on securing economic relief and climate action before it’s too late, can you chip in $3 or whatever you can afford to our grassroots campaign today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/6668?refcode=em20210928-673&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=673%2E420207%2Eoan8TI)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210928-673-footer&t=24&refcode2=673_420207_oan8TI&akid=673%2E420207%2Eoan8TI)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=25&akid=673%2E420207%2Eoan8TI)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=673%2E420207%2Eoan8TI)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: NRSC Chairman
subject: AZ, NH, GA & NV
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Anyone who supports bringing socialism to the United States must be defeated. We’re committed to getting the job done and we NEED to know that you are |
Fellow patriot,

Next year, control of the Senate hinges on our ability to knock out four of the most radical Schumer, socialist sympathizers in the Senate.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=279e178d08714e9e9a0e5256ae21b0bc&_e=zNNlABwXU3eQdol3zHJnWYyciOUhDA927DkDrPQU57JDmoKJwm4JbFldaTXqj2icuToyr46d4DEFLLRwMZjBeEvIP0YKzt4-AvT6Sa3wKZOAZ-Fl4QT7Zc81hljmZRmcloa4NEdMe4nFoYJUVGRkEflQagG6wi583Gz2K3SgF-MEWlzcz7XoBbnqX-Zl52XQC4bnh5138LAOP7Hmq3rGo6OgXEsL6gDUhuLNJ75aftPQOGTxtqR3sAOHy-m9ve_15evFWUsr8VsFfGX07i60FD5PAPZQFdi1C9LFcRb5P6HY9rRnwULj9z7Ie_qSxPhsell81ZVvy-wAFPjQfnGD5iif7zH_I0eLSGTOm07AkPnUsjbyTp7zWwLxn251cnf74OMCprXFCksnzW8WON2wLLBroIZ3yYJyzVE5pK-KZCVThnQoFWSUWGPzk6aDF3CetQLLY9mtnDQN3iz8aqe1CA%3D%3D)

Arizona, New Hampshire, Georgia, and Nevada are all states friendly to Republicans, and states in which a Republican held at least one (if not both) Senate seats as recently as 2016.

Fellow patriot, what I am trying to tell you is that **[THIS IS VERY POSSIBLE TO DO.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=279e178d08714e9e9a0e5256ae21b0bc&_e=zNNlABwXU3eQdol3zHJnWYyciOUhDA927DkDrPQU57JDmoKJwm4JbFldaTXqj2icuToyr46d4DEFLLRwMZjBeEvIP0YKzt4-AvT6Sa3wKZOAZ-Fl4QT7Zc81hljmZRmcloa4NEdMe4nFoYJUVGRkEflQagG6wi583Gz2K3SgF-MEWlzcz7XoBbnqX-Zl52XQC4bnh5138LAOP7Hmq3rGo6OgXEsL6gDUhuLNJ75aftPQOGTxtqR3sAOHy-m9ve_1hqHm00cuw4hvpgYkMXyem2vTAMovPk7VfJJ1bW6SUl_9XFM8GKwY-Q5sziFpCB2YRexNodcLkYhXyRA-9AvLgiIM5KmpU-8IFqBVCd6iQn8oKZgt0KBEHC-ARif1VwPeOF-pJpKAE4TPLl4uKwsi-F8LciwAhvapIVZJCXbTykTEnfKuiaqsYLImKjBUBNvKVQ3GjoS5o_hohHEuV6YAPQ%3D%3D)**

The national Democrat Party, their Senate campaign arm (the DSCC), and the four Democrat Senators we’re targeting in these states are fashioning themselves as “moderates” because they know the headwinds are against them heading into re-election.

**But here’s the conundrum: All four vulnerable Democrats are about to vote “YES” on Bernie Sanders’ $3.5 trillion reconciliation bill – a bill that will transform America into a socialist state.**

That’s not “moderate.”

We’re going to hold these four Democrat Senators accountable, and **[we need YOUR HELP NOW](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=279e178d08714e9e9a0e5256ae21b0bc&_e=zNNlABwXU3eQdol3zHJnWYyciOUhDA927DkDrPQU57JDmoKJwm4JbFldaTXqj2icuToyr46d4DEFLLRwMZjBeEvIP0YKzt4-AvT6Sa3wKZOAZ-Fl4QT7Zc81hljmZRmcloa4NEdMe4nFoYJUVGRkEflQagG6wi583Gz2K3SgF-MEWlzcz7XoBbnqX-Zl52XQC4bnh5138LAOP7Hmq3rGo6OgXEsL6gDUhuLNJ75aftPQOGTxtqR3sAOHy-m9ve_1sRaVkW_HEE9mZlSHpGrTSs6JIxgcPEFhnceZEPx1r6jxbSFDd9Vyy2CbHy47XFMeSUYme4CPcx1WGkIp6gm3unTmqW7kF7h5azvUQHQiCg6AkyzIJ6JLPeDn1Dh1DhNcJzeuOaawSbYxoXplp6Ki8v8LEn0wP1sa4qhMajHddM2meZa44eX7qaYSQy9rkGHZNT0fo_xHQ7apJqwcJJKYqg%3D%3D)**.

We plan to run ads in Arizona, New Hampshire, Nevada, and Georgia to show voters that their “moderate” Senators support bringing socialism to America.

**_[We need to be on air with these ads and we will need cash to do this. clean_body: Anyone who supports bringing socialism to the United States must be defeated. We’re committed to getting the job done and we NEED to know that you are | Fellow patriot, Next year, control of the Senate hinges on our ability to knock out four of the most radical Schumer, socialist sympathizers in the Senate. Arizona, New Hampshire, Georgia, and Nevada are all states friendly to Republicans, and states in which a Republican held at least one (if not both) Senate seats as recently as 2016. Fellow patriot, what I am trying to tell you is that The national Democrat Party, their Senate campaign arm (the DSCC), and the four Democrat Senators we’re targeting in these states are fashioning themselves as “moderates” because they know the headwinds are against them heading into re-election. But here’s the conundrum: All four vulnerable Democrats are about to vote “YES” on Bernie Sanders’ $3.5 trillion reconciliation bill – a bill that will transform America into a socialist state. That’s not “moderate.” We’re going to hold these four Democrat Senators accountable, and . We plan to run ads in Arizona, New Hampshire, Nevada, and Georgia to show voters that their “moderate” Senators support bringing socialism to America. We anticipate that a generous group of donors will match every dollar donated before midnight tonight to help boost our ad buys in each of these states! Anyone who supports bringing socialism to the United States must be defeated. We’re committed to getting the job done and we NEED to know that you are, too. Failure is simply not an option. The voters need to know their elected officials are not who they pretend to be. subject: The Senate playing field just tipped toward Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1031%2E3611125%2EHgyxqQ ][IMG]

Folks, did you see this?

CNN: The Senate playing field just tipped toward Republicans

The Senate is tied 50-50. All Mitch McConnell has to do is flip one single
seat to take back total control. Protecting our majority is not enough --
we have to expand it.

Ohio is one of our best shots to expand the Democratic Senate majority.
That’s why McConnell and his dark-money donors are laser focused on making
sure we lose.

We have to meet our $100,000 end-of-quarter FEC goal to fight off their
attacks. But with only two days to go, we’re falling behind.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4839?t=1007&akid=1031%2E3611125%2EHgyxqQ ]Our Senate majority is literally on the line in Ohio, will you make a
$25 donation today to help us win? Every dollar makes a difference.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4839?t=1008&akid=1031%2E3611125%2EHgyxqQ ]DONATE

Time and again, Senate Republicans prioritize the ultra-wealthy over hard
working Americans. It’s time to stop them in their tracks.

It won’t be easy, but we’re confident we can overcome their network of
shady mega-donors and win this race with grassroots support from folks
like you.

Thanks for making a donation today,

Team Ryan

clean_body: This is deeply concerning. | Friend, We’re just 48 hours away from our campaign’s FIRST FEC end-of-quarter deadline and we’re still $24,915 short of our goal -- but that’s not even what’s most concerning. Nancy Pelosi and her DCCC just recorded a record-breaking fundraising month in August. The purpose of their $10 MILLION haul?To stop us from winning the 5 seats needed to take back the House. As one of those 5 seats, we MUST hit our first end-of-quarter goal, or risk losing Texas’ NEW congressional seat to Pelosi and her liberal puppets. I simply can’t overstate the importance of this FEC deadline, Friend. Since we launched our campaign in July, everything we’ve been working towards comes down to this deadline. As 1 of just 5 MUST-WIN races of the midterms, we have to come out of the gate strong and show Pelosi just how worried she ought to be. But that all hinges on us crushing our FIRST quarterly deadline of the campaign. If we can’t go toe-to-toe with Pelosi right now, then the rest of this year will be nothing but a constant stream of multimillion-dollar attacks going unanswered. Hi fellow patriot,

Shawn Collins here - the conservative Afghanistan combat veteran and active Navy reservist who is running to defeat Progressive Caucus member **Katie Porter** and flip California’s 45th District – _one of the top targeted House seats in the nation_ – back to the Republican column.

I'm reaching out because my campaign's [**first quarterly fundraising deadline since we launched is Thursday night and I need your help**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=02f150e829c84fb487cd8a092c24979b&_e=96iCHHqAJaROq4t12iZ1D5hE0jrMMKmqKPn6MPaxBp9kbLxaQkjUS34bu7aoivdWszALD4GEnSmU2EJ6IiPu2IzegJW2wsdkQUWnEwHhyYiKRcKBP3wwMjSX8Jd_ZaHZvS_hYn2O5j8TPkdzCNcneGkc2Dq55zbHQSap_8M5X0WB3_UGRikpirtOKsuQ0ZfFHnEM4DuwGZiS7eTDQQK_6zXkDqYZ6sub43zmRDIcKNaZSeTyOSNjAEy0NzVM7RIxOt3xNIXpA2Hn_dtuleWwdg2ePtu5EHg0aNE6zDPl4ZZzBB0EUoE6QvwOrJqh0A6C5VxK40dj5sFDcHOiWG3SbrJCwJuQE5YGqZHh9ar3EjZAIksyv8t1nPxGGHu6vMTa42fGEcncW49EY0KkxgnLDkOVcVgLNBupZviziZhTsXt9gbSqrRxeCKhbA2OdL1zqmd1CfTH5LP8CEUq20DPd-O_9Bf9NQcHkuG62axy7H-I%3D), _**but I wanted you to hear about what Porter just did...**_

My opponent Katie Porter just penned an Op-Ed with Ilhan Omar saying they won’t vote for Pelosi’s infrastructure bill because it’s not liberal enough and doesn’t spend enough on their leftist socialist agenda!

The radical Left is not giving up on their mission to turn America into a socialist society. **We must not allow this to happen.** Of all the members of The Squad and the Progressive Caucus, **_Katie Porter is who we have the best chance of defeating._**

[**But I’m falling short of my quarterly goal...**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=02f150e829c84fb487cd8a092c24979b&_e=96iCHHqAJaROq4t12iZ1D5hE0jrMMKmqKPn6MPaxBp9kbLxaQkjUS34bu7aoivdWszALD4GEnSmU2EJ6IiPu2IzegJW2wsdkQUWnEwHhyYiKRcKBP3wwMjSX8Jd_ZaHZvS_hYn2O5j8TPkdzCNcneGkc2Dq55zbHQSap_8M5X0WB3_UGRikpirtOKsuQ0ZfFHnEM4DuwGZiS7eTDQQK_6zXkDqYZ6sub43zmRDIcKNaZSeTyOSNjAEy0NzVM7RIxOt3xNIXpA2Hn_dtuleWwdiqFs0U32bTps1sABPlheb1aj9kAar--O-Uzr4TGErJ3uNQt9ctpwdIne-cNsTmqbJj_xNzv55ZzXxqG0YwnAR3in-LyC7WIcIu0uYQoHyofeXyx8yQ4ZrmkMAO_uiNwV-D2gOAhQDJZYxoTHqLmiTGC1Hire_D0_1mAjdmJrTghIRkif0AErE3fXJOi7_HeUqfeQzmFo-IKO07_3f2__WI%3D) and the quarterly fundraising deadline is tomorrow night.

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: quite possibly my most urgent request:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | I hate to alarm you -- **[but my Democratic Majority just fell into deep danger. And I’m calling for your immediate $3 to help save it >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

I need you to understand:

\-- Our House Majority is RAZOR-thin
\-- Republicans only need to flip FIVE seats to take it
\-- And I just watched our polling lead EVAPORATE into thin air

**Republicans have caught up to us in the polls -- we are NECK AND NECK in the race for the House Majority.**

I know I ask a lot of you, but this is quite possibly my most urgent ask:

**[Will you rush an immediate $3 to defend my House Democrats? I’m asking because our ability to meet this End of Quarter goal before my deadline in 48 hours could determine Democrats’ chances of HOLDING the House Majority and ensuring Republicans aren’t trusted with power again >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/d30Et60ad~)** | [](https://links.e.dccc.)
2021 DEMOCRATIC MEMBERSHIP STATUS: **PENDING**
[Suggested Support: $3](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

I need you to remember how hard we worked to win this Majority.

And I need you to remember how many lives have improved because of it.

I know we will never forgive ourselves if we let Republicans take it from us.

**We CAN fix this before it 's too late -- but not if we fail to meet my most consequential End of Quarter goal yet. **

I can't overstate the urgency: **[Can I count on your $3 before my End of Quarter Deadline expires in 48 hours to defend my House Democrats? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/gpgkTRw_)**
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

---
| [**Chip in $250 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Or chip in another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)
---

Thank you,

Nancy

name: John Fetterman and Gisele Barreto Fetterman
subject: love seeing your beautiful faces on the campaign trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This Thursday is a huge day for our campaign and our entire family, so we thought we'd add you to our group text today!
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210928-2811-header&t=1&akid=2811%2E434096%2EjK1oly)
| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
| Hey, Peter. It's John Fetterman. John
And meeee, your SLOP, Gisele! ❤️ Gisele |
This Thursday is a HUGE day for our campaign and our entire family, so we thought we'd add you to our group text today! Gisele |
| What she said!^ We're like ~48 hours away from our deadline, and we're hoping you can [pitch in $5 or anything you can to help get us to our goal.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32236?refcode=em20210928-2811&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2811%2E434096%2EjK1oly) John
Right! We've got big plans to meet all of yinz across PA soon, but we can only travel across the Commonwealth with your help! Gisele |
| How else will we be able to stay on the road so Gisele can hear my singing voice??? 😂 John
But actually!!! We *love* seeing all your beautiful faces on the campaign trail. Gisele |
| [Peter, will you kick in $5 or more if you can? We'd both be so deeply grateful. Thank you for being a part of our people-powered campaign to win this thing!](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32236?refcode=em20210928-2811&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2811%2E434096%2EjK1oly) John
**[Donate $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32236?refcode=em20210928-2811&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2811%2E434096%2EjK1oly)**
* * *

_Thank you for being a part of this grassroots campaign for all 67 counties in Pennsylvania. We're up against a big FEC deadline this Thursday, so any online donation, big or small, would make an immediate impact on our campaign.[Click here to donate any amount.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32236?refcode=em20210928-2811&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2811%2E434096%2EjK1oly)_

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210928-2811-footer&t=24&refcode2=2811_434096_jK1oly&akid=2811%2E434096%2EjK1oly)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2811%2E434096%2EjK1oly)

name: Republican Party of Wisconsin
subject: New Justice Gableman Video on Election Investigation
body:
| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ppw_push_gableman3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend -- To make sure you are in the loop, we wanted to make sure you saw Justice Mike Gableman’s new video about his election investigation. [**Watch on YouTube**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRYmyUO1md9oeTSjFRyV6MIL&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ppw_push_gableman3&n=2)
* * *
In the video, Gableman notes: _In trying to determine if the election was conducted properly, it is the duty of the public officials who are paid to run the election to answer questions and demonstrate that their management of the election was proper. If they refuse to cooperate, we will compel them to answer questions._ _My job as Special Counsel is to gather all relevant information, and while I will draw my own conclusions, my goal is to put everything I know before you, the citizen, so that you can make up your own mind. An obstruction of this office is an obstruction of you._
* * *
In addition, the Republican Party of Wisconsin remains hard at work in our efforts to ensure that all Wisconsinites can have confidence in the results of our elections, including our Election Reform Task Force and poll worker recruitment program. Being a paid poll worker (AKA “poll inspector”) allows us to have a direct influence over how elections are run at the local level and is one of the most effective ways to ensure the integrity of Wisconsin’s elections. **Republican county parties have the right to nominate poll workers by November 30th of this year, and these poll workers submitted by the county GOP MUST BE ACCEPTED by your municipal clerks. ** ****County parties across Wiscon sin are hard at work to recruit poll workers and help ensure election integrity in your community. If you are interested in additional details on how to get submitted as a paid poll worker before the **November 30th deadline** , sign up on our website [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0R_kNr4x5AW03jFWL_9dJJI&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ppw_push_gableman3&n=3). To find an upcoming event or training near you, click **[here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0SsIN05Kq52csGqnQtqVEFs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ppw_push_gableman3&n=4)**. Thanks, Team WISGOP
|
Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States
This email was sent to [Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com](mailto:Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://act.wisgop.org/unsubscribe?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ppw_push_gableman3&n=5).
You can also keep up with Republican Party of Wisconsin on [Twitter](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNIcJvVL3dAKuw8klLyGLeGg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ppw_push_gableman3&n=6) or [Facebook](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iVbepFGB501pMHJjXBPeT95kNZEWPezdnkYYctpRqhH&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ppw_push_gableman3&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ppw_push_gableman3&n=8), software for leaders.

body:
Anyone who supports bringing socialism to the United States must be defeated. We’re committed to getting the job done and we NEED to know that you are |
Fellow patriot,

Next year, control of the Senate hinges on our ability to knock out four of the most radical Schumer, socialist sympathizers in the Senate.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fa953c8e88fc49fb9ea9476a7209e9f2&_e=0WQDnwbVc2BaD0N9k6woV2FnPdpcWlPWXJRTJ14Dlx-EnNnrL1Tz-7kelVKLv0Ffo9UNzL12iARALW5fqK1rqGHlaxBzT9RLQPZs_2AYhgkx9lqTiWRa8iMC8u_dxsaP9p0_T-Zh9igVB3ZJB1SX9Ga-6K1OFOYmtWeByFHRfA3O8UU8j0k4BTGpvSNeBrnnWVgUdvGBg6uVc58CWs_IdInpll2qKJoKANy6Ibywp-xPz1xIzgWRPeGHl1osFGigMl5ll-rlZbySgP34fV9mqGpSOm2V8cDvK0Cst0k0ieGtwWcDo_l1lytrgSxQoxsTwRWX8RqZFysGOENhL0yCoFWGT6TJFk4XkayDwXGcx5jZneP8rZHEoC6VmjM_s5cibSSsMkIWKQIQAs_1F9_WtWA7Zp1wbS_5BsB3W5QytpEaFBu-2jKgMAmUEqsF4j8ZnomR1rAFEBlXbd0JNJyiAw%3D%3D)

Arizona, New Hampshire, Georgia, and Nevada are all states friendly to Republicans, and states in which a Republican held at least one (if not both) Senate seats as recently as 2016.

subject: We are approaching our first milestone
body:
and it's all thanks to you!

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/c2b3795e8778/we-are-approaching-our-first-milestone?e=e67cbb3f92)

Friends,

As I reflect on the last ten weeks after announcing my candidacy, I am very humbled by the support I received from you. To date, our campaign is closing in on raising 100,000 dollars, and it’s all because of supporters like you -not special corporate interest money. With your trusted contributions, I have hired a professional full-time campaign manager and a campaign coordinator. My staff is instrumental in guiding our campaign to victory in June and then November.

However, to keep our momentum building, I need your help closing out September to keep us on the path toward our next mile marker.

Please consider giving 500,100,50, or even 15 dollars to help my team raise another 10,000 dollars by the end of the day Friday. (https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=10288e599b&e=e67cbb3f92)

My campaign will use this money to expand my staff, pay for volunteer materials, and start our mail program.

Please be on the lookout for more updates and other ways our campaign will need your help, such as phone banking, throwing house parties, and eventually taking our message door-to-door!

In solidarity,

Neal Walia

body:

No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=83b9a5e57cce4aa2aa60002bbf37b68f&_t=opUC-bOFbH1C2SN0-TgwzUTeWEcRX52eBPhvue758RRqfvTI8-GZZUOMwefV1zb5NDOIdJ3MQdnzC41Vh8jaJo1F-cExPQmMWDJODbTezTNMeKQ0dEkx1a7ma_1N0KcmmG4DGR4GGafnOfoRybhcJVIoi5se5rv0zRgmxqU7L0c%3D).

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=83b9a5e57cce4aa2aa60002bbf37b68f&_e=aVFlKAZyP5cAjpb5KzR8H57o7ciSON_V1ZvpdnXHs-9TtIk1sNHW5R6ilmxmZBAOfxiXC92AxvfSXfA5O2Pz-RKNm1cSIvYPpEXU7ZMdc08IYm1revij1Kk5_B-7sHVBLZrYG4NtQH8L2TVJGYbl2B-OAYddT8Qi1ZHMFstrHRq_7-UAfhWFKhCW_tv_JmZrj0KJ9pd6NF-GuD4QItRbqXY40JhOdyL-Urr_tTUrYYlWeepBNG74JhCrmTJAnLzU-x3Lrj5lxSD6TDbT2f033Y896Y1D3e9t9ACLnLxEB0ME4gibSf_iF0bdaXmKQeLq0-2UWs2-curlf9tz4asHDPLDFeu7k9Nz93dff0RdKe3-A036_RfZtjKw2yLHYw9OkI0pt9BG2dPDrJdvHFI-9W7qU-Ph4Blw0srshqvIpqv2Jncy1gosCrsBsR5sOqW97DVm699kfgUqh25TZAkrBmZYKscPBMc63JI4J8K-xId3qUVR0OwXI1bBISruMsgs)

---
Peter,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=83b9a5e57cce4aa2aa60002bbf37b68f&_e=aVFlKAZyP5cAjpb5KzR8H57o7ciSON_V1ZvpdnXHs-9TtIk1sNHW5R6ilmxmZBAOfxiXC92AxvfSXfA5O2Pz-RKNm1cSIvYPpEXU7ZMdc08IYm1revij1Kk5_B-7sHVBLZrYG4NtQH8L2TVJGYbl2B-OAYddT8Qi1ZHMFstrHRq_7-UAfhWFKhCW_tv_JmZrj0KJ9pd6NF-GuD4QItRbqXY40JhOdyL-Urr_tTUrYYlWeepBNG74JhCrmTJAnLzU-x3Lrj5lxSD6TDbT2f033XSudapmxKtQTYspFJZm7SMK5tzZKY5iPNwN4yhs6xRVWlsUZnIJrVZ4Z4olZ1ohmIdOfBNnS5IXKuAKNB5wppx-pdO_YOHue10VHFGBmKaLaUDJJiVSbFe2UBbzk0ZWFT2xCL62CHyR5jMRFyHKU2qF9MJzirCisiTfv3Vk8U2U3_Rc7Kntfj_K1g9hFWbtNOkblyoymnY_SJfH9VOVgyDVsREPmwQGbJi6aW0Ai_Zt)
My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today.
* I’m a military veteran (**I joined at 17**),
* I’m a lawyer (**I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school**)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ _**freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction**_.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=83b9a5e57cce4aa2aa60002bbf37b68f&_e=aVFlKAZyP5cAjpb5KzR8H57o7ciSON_V1ZvpdnXHs-9TtIk1sNHW5R6ilmxmZBAOfxiXC92AxvfSXfA5O2Pz-RKNm1cSIvYPpEXU7ZMdc08IYm1revij1Kk5_B-7sHVBLZrYG4NtQH8L2TVJGYbl2B-OAYddT8Qi1ZHMFstrHRq_7-UAfhWFKhCW_tv_JmZrj0KJ9pd6NF-GuD4QItRbqXY40JhOdyL-Urr_tTUrYYlWeepBNG74JhCrmTJAnLzU-x3Lrj5lxSD6TDbT2f033ZDNB_h6aNrSS165luWjoeFel9sZnER1XzES9HMVgOlkOSUahQN0gp-g5le_BTFaE8rZCatn9yusAy6yj08zXIeEkSXb721YwCYZIUzqPq_DnhZ6pDyT6rqY7Ucl0XO7qnuNlDeNXg1q3w4it3JMOfBlUYM40oFTZSf-WsfWg-fncjKOBKJHVgUVCXjohIZ97-m5CoH2G76ImgpOch77vV-_ear-w-IWvOWsnSfJUx0d)
I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, **[please consider chipping in whatever you can spare to my campaign today](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=83b9a5e57cce4aa2aa60002bbf37b68f&_e=aVFlKAZyP5cAjpb5KzR8H57o7ciSON_V1ZvpdnXHs-9TtIk1sNHW5R6ilmxmZBAOfxiXC92AxvfSXfA5O2Pz-RKNm1cSIvYPpEXU7ZMdc08IYm1revij1Kk5_B-7sHVBLZrYG4NtQH8L2TVJGYbl2B-OAYddT8Qi1ZHMFstrHRq_7-UAfhWFKhCW_tv_JmZrj0KJ9pd6NF-GuD4QItRbqXY40JhOdyL-Urr_tTUrYYlWeepBNG74JhCrmTJAnLzU-x3Lrj5lxSD6TDbT2f033aCWlibXpgyBnuABCwNzJepM01LZiqaoiKTk1-kCb4JdPH-VKjzLsC0fANAr3ZpWoSNpnGFZxvKpuTT1em_0N4rc9ldPIUci7j3i5FlR9WlQeCQit4umHsHziNhzDaz6pVyogti2EUvRpVtQux30rApxjMA4yHhS_CmDgDrS06qc59iL8kFkcVE7cJR2ckceCCw_msiighBfEIFn6d7KMwBOAfwlVxfcdADiYLcgh2qj)**. I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for.

[** Send a 1st Generation American to Congress >>**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=83b9a5e57cce4aa2aa60002bbf37b68f&_e=aVFlKAZyP5cAjpb5KzR8H57o7ciSON_V1ZvpdnXHs-9TtIk1sNHW5R6ilmxmZBAOfxiXC92AxvfSXfA5O2Pz-RKNm1cSIvYPpEXU7ZMdc08IYm1revij1Kk5_B-7sHVBLZrYG4NtQH8L2TVJGYbl2B-OAYddT8Qi1ZHMFstrHRq_7-UAfhWFKhCW_tv_JmZrj0KJ9pd6NF-GuD4QItRbqXY40JhOdyL-Urr_tTUrYYlWeepBNG74JhCrmTJAnLzU-x3Lrj5lxSD6TDbT2f033ekgtFkw6LxvMJFZ37CGm4L37Yl9AmgokQYwYbjPLPUxkqsulcUuiaB9WFa42LdFGvRNNtz_KBe9CliTbUYWAeEFrrZhjukboJXMBCjE-Y4pRago0VmVqYJawwEnj7Gejs09HDcf2yw7_ZeUs5brjyO9WQ3bqnPSekPZDfiA6zjN18e8ZCwLlC22NPyOYYOHCZcuoIgAKMH_LrQ5l3OiJl5Q9lGijt6nukuUOACTgIBR)
Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts.

I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. **I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice**. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=83b9a5e57cce4aa2aa60002bbf37b68f&_e=aVFlKAZyP5cAjpb5KzR8H57o7ciSON_V1ZvpdnXHs-9TtIk1sNHW5R6ilmxmZBAOfxiXC92AxvfSXfA5O2Pz-RKNm1cSIvYPpEXU7ZMdc08IYm1revij1Kk5_B-7sHVBLZrYG4NtQH8L2TVJGYbl2B-OAYddT8Qi1ZHMFstrHRq_7-UAfhWFKhCW_tv_JmZrj0KJ9pd6NF-GuD4QItRbqXY40JhOdyL-Urr_tTUrYYlWeepBNG74JhCrmTJAnLzU-x3Lrj5lxSD6TDbT2f033f4f9b9QAbVilYM78MpoJV-MfPFwXQVr6ItUkXj3BqHK8BFDCRAtUFCRn5JcjjrbKJL-682ip_tZYkHrLCOE6IBafH2qZzCpZb9fmJ3DSW3tebn8225ACpURhX0l82GHmha3bGSQ8FO97QgxxqKJ0Hgb2if2IPxk9v2D2KAFcB-nJ-D1HiP8HeFiyh9JYh5zXbf12jbFYcyOLpOVAfMJvuY5X5zuXlaGzJD45mNdk0O_)
**I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. **

Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but _**what is worth having in life that is easy?**_ I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts.

If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, **[would you please consider a contribution to my campaign for Congress today?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=83b9a5e57cce4aa2aa60002bbf37b68f&_e=aVFlKAZyP5cAjpb5KzR8H57o7ciSON_V1ZvpdnXHs-9TtIk1sNHW5R6ilmxmZBAOfxiXC92AxvfSXfA5O2Pz-RKNm1cSIvYPpEXU7ZMdc08IYm1revij1Kk5_B-7sHVBLZrYG4NtQH8L2TVJGYbl2B-OAYddT8Qi1ZHMFstrHRq_7-UAfhWFKhCW_tv_JmZrj0KJ9pd6NF-GuD4QItRbqXY40JhOdyL-Urr_tTUrYYlWeepBNG74JhCrmTJAnLzU-x3Lrj5lxSD6TDbT2f033c-P78jTSyUfrVfYke5VhhCuPC2lAU7Lu6ReGj2AsQ2i6swmGUfxNzw4cs7ovEE02FiM94RtLSqPnZWnzCkDuEdCVdjuK-sL-4OE0YxQLrZLxsVTsbO3B8IrxThv94iKKrg0pUbfelkjVxMoWUZMRlEV7OJRDScaE4vW-POnhndYdoENX_dvcyAM2h3M9nFuTIHanCd3E284R79lYsYlMSnrGxAh5_r0cmAYnmG_9v4_)** I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress.

[** Send a 1st Generation American to Congress >>**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=83b9a5e57cce4aa2aa60002bbf37b68f&_e=aVFlKAZyP5cAjpb5KzR8H57o7ciSON_V1ZvpdnXHs-9TtIk1sNHW5R6ilmxmZBAOfxiXC92AxvfSXfA5O2Pz-RKNm1cSIvYPpEXU7ZMdc08IYm1revij1Kk5_B-7sHVBLZrYG4NtQH8L2TVJGYbl2B-OAYddT8Qi1ZHMFstrHRq_7-UAfhWFKhCW_tv_JmZrj0KJ9pd6NF-GuD4QItRbqXY40JhOdyL-Urr_tTUrYYlWeepBNG74JhCrmTJAnLzU-x3Lrj5lxSD6TDbT2f033eSC9lX3OfaqJCx0hWtiJF28zll7-ymRYXDmPbM-bespLJUk7fFWVyxlipOnGqVMPAWXIfez7gVAVSNi4tRDOYPEi9M46kCywkNmog6EW1UQzbCskwWJ2BAcqXJckBJMwepnjdCEZMq36UN-oD-vcrS80qHnNBqXJHpJ69uBhHp0nRVyI-f4Fn82S3YyqEz78lJOCMJSDJ6r_uJHppTOq_DXXRVSM49MtUCKbyinIvnY)
Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration.

For Country,

Rod Dorilas

[** I'M WITH ROD >> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=83b9a5e57cce4aa2aa60002bbf37b68f&_e=aVFlKAZyP5cAjpb5KzR8H57o7ciSON_V1ZvpdnXHs-9TtIk1sNHW5R6ilmxmZBAOfxiXC92AxvfSXfA5O2Pz-RKNm1cSIvYPpEXU7ZMdc08IYm1revij1Kk5_B-7sHVBLZrYG4NtQH8L2TVJGYbl2B-OAYddT8Qi1ZHMFstrHRq_7-UAfhWFKhCW_tv_JmZrj0KJ9pd6NF-GuD4QItRbqXY40JhOdyL-Urr_tTUrYYlWeepBNG74JhCrmTJAnLzU-x3Lrj5lxSD6TDbT2f033QvrA_-ftY8pko0sRB2vcXqWJzRXh1GCCsdMvWqlw6Scut0CytfZ5ivCw8Hh0z3ERb8GmcrxJwJs1lwPfNGVzUcaxZZpGTKQld9xTGMrftZYfBSt4kKPVNYr4LN5G3Kmp5vbn0_Zgpa1ywWuPrEltRBgLB1sYjLgLd8Fi5rU7Lj5pxP9MuQ1tuYPpVKS_cw_m_XNcR6H-Yhkkl_PrDfutmG74YGo7sRucueggrxlX6CA)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=83b9a5e57cce4aa2aa60002bbf37b68f&_e=aVFlKAZyP5cAjpb5KzR8H57o7ciSON_V1ZvpdnXHs-9TtIk1sNHW5R6ilmxmZBAOfxiXC92AxvfSXfA5O2Pz-RKNm1cSIvYPpEXU7ZMdc08IYm1revij1Kk5_B-7sHVBLZrYG4NtQH8L2TVJGYbl2B-OAYddT8Qi1ZHMFstrHRq_7-UAfhWFKhCW_tv_JmZrj0KJ9pd6NF-GuD4QItRbqXY40JhOdyL-Urr_tTUrYYlWeepBNG74JhCrmTJAnLzU-x3Lrj5lxSD6TDbT2f033fRGx555NYvYVSvg6nL39wjTdTunQgxOfOzDf3VJhaUnPFq2HSukvP0Nc8rJ294qpEpZsgxvtyBZSFTBVYa456mleiZEJ7w5CKDkjwWH2y5KrCL8FCL-dISR8SK2txBtG8zByhCPXsAUlWsNYWF4ibHkTCbWFleBJJx_TL1Mat08AcJLZVRW-xmnnbSu7kikP1ArPQELjrFu2B7emw81x_nFAxqQxW-dDlbW6diGBB85)
---

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
---

This message was sent to your email address ending in @gmail.com because it was listed as the best way to contact you.

However, if this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any more of our emails...

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=83b9a5e57cce4aa2aa60002bbf37b68f&_t=opUC-bOFbH1C2SN0-TgwzUTeWEcRX52eBPhvue758RRqfvTI8-GZZUOMwefV1zb5NDOIdJ3MQdnzC41Vh8jaJo1F-cExPQmMWDJODbTezTNMeKQ0dEkx1a7ma_1N0KcmmG4DGR4GGafnOfoRybhcJVIoi5se5rv0zRgmxqU7L0c%3D).

Friend,

It’s been the honor of a lifetime to serve you and the American people.

Together, we’ve worked to combat the socialist agenda, secure our southern border, and stop the relentless attacks by the far-left on our God-given freedoms.

With your help I was able to win the closest House race in the country by just six votes and stop Nancy Pelosi from overturning the will of the American people.

It’s always extremely humbling to see how much support I have behind me as I fight every day to preserve the American Dream for generations to come. With that being said, the fight’s not over and I’m once again asking for your help.

This is the most important End-of-Quarter deadline I’ve had yet and I need to crush this fundraising deadline to show Nancy Pelosi and the far-left that there’s NO WAY that I’m going to let them destroy America.

With that being said, if you’re able, could you chip in below using the secure link to rush a donation to my campaign so we can continue fighting the Left?
